title: Social Media Manager/Graphics Designer
description:
We are looking for a creative, tech-savvy Social Media Manager to join our rapidly evolving podcast production and social media marketing business. You will be responsible for creating high-quality graphics, editing AI-generated copy, and scheduling content using Cloud Connect.



This is an output-based role designed for a professional who is efficient with their time and enjoys being rewarded for their production. We are looking for a long-term partner who can grow with us as the role evolves.



Compensation & Structure:

Base Pay: $40.00 USD per week (Guaranteed minimum for weekly meetings,
 management, and 30 minutes of coordination).

Production Pay: Once your weekly output exceeds the base, you are paid per item (Reels, Podcast Posts, Graphics). Our goal is for a standard workload to result in $100 per week.

Software Stipend: A $20.00 monthly stipend is provided to assist with your software subscriptions.



13th Month Pay: Eligible after 6 months of service.



Responsibilities:

Strategy: Use ChatGPT Plus/Gemini to help ideate and build monthly social media calendars. (We have built GPT's/GEMS for brand language)

Content Creation: Design custom graphics in Adobe Photoshop (no Canva-only designers, please).

AI Copywriting: Use AI to draft captions and hashtags, then edit them for brand voice and accuracy.

Scheduling: Fully manage the Cloud Connect dashboard to ensure all posts are scheduled and live.



Reporting: Join a weekly 30-minute meeting to review analytics and adjust strategy.

Workflow: Manage all tasks and deadlines within Asana.



Required Tools (VA Provided):

Adobe Photoshop (Latest Version)

ChatGPT Plus Subscription

Stable High-Speed Internet



Qualifications:

Proven experience in Social Media Management (experience with "Cloud Connect" or "Cloud Campaign" is a huge plus).

High proficiency in Adobe Photoshop.

Strong understanding of how to prompt and refine AI-generated content.

Excellent English communication (written and verbal).

title: CRO Specialist (E-commerce – Health Niche)
description:
About Zantriel



At Zantriel we believe a winning product only truly wins when everything is extracted from it. We are one of the fastest-growing dropship businesses in the healthcare niche, active in markets like Israel, France, Germany, the UK, and the Netherlands, with the US next on the list. We operate with a team of A-players and are building a business that is scalable, profitable, and relentlessly optimized.



To make that happen, we are looking for a CRO Specialist who does not stop at "good enough."



As a CRO Specialist at Zantriel, you are responsible for the performance of our winning products. You make sure we extract the maximum from our winners by staying focused on conversion rate, AOV, and overall profitability every single day. This is not a supporting role: you work at the core revenue engine of the business.



What you will do:

- Funnel analysis: You analyze funnels end to end and identify exactly where performance breaks down.

- Conversion and AOV optimization: You structurally improve conversion rate and average order value through sharp, deliberate changes.

- Offers, bundles, and pricing: You optimize offers, bundles, and pricing structures to maximize profitability.

- Post-purchase flows: You build and improve post-purchase upsell flows.

- Tooling: You work hands-on in Funnelish and similar tools.

- Data analysis: You go deep on campaign and funnel data to recognize patterns and back decisions with numbers. Testing and implementation: You run tests, draw conclusions, and push improvements live.



When metrics are off, you find out why. When we have a winner, you make sure we get everything out of it.



We are looking for you if:

- You have proven CRO experience and are well past the beginner stage. 

- You have worked with funnel builders like Funnelish or ClickFunnels

- You know your way around e-commerce, with the health niche being a strong plus.

- You understand AOV optimization, conversion rate optimization, upsell and post-purchase flows, and offer structure from the inside out. 



You can write copy that converts, or at minimum you understand what makes copy work.



We are not looking for agencies or freelancers doing this on the side. We want someone who goes all-in and becomes part of the team.



For your information:

- The starting salary for this role is $8 per hour. We start at 40 hours per week, with the possibility to scale up quickly. On top of that, we work performance-based: good work is rewarded well with high bonuses.

- We work from 10:00 to 19:00 UK time.

- Our selection process is strict, with multiple interview rounds and cases. We test whether you are sharp, ambitious, and driven, and whether you are committed to becoming the best in your field.

- We always start with a trial month. After that, we evaluate performance and potential. At Zantriel you can move fast, as long as you take ownership, deliver results, and keep learning. Growth is not a promise here, it is an opportunity you create yourself.

- At Zantriel you get the space, resources, and freedom to become the best version of yourself. We invest in your growth, with courses like Evolve ($1,500/month value) and support in your setup, all aimed at helping you flourish and get the most out of yourself.

- We reinvest into our people to build long-term stability for them and their families.



Fill in this form to apply:

title: Content Writer for SEO/Blog/YouTube
description:
Hi there,



I'm looking for someone to write SEO articles for a blog on my website, and that is able to convert these SEO articles into YouTube video scripts.



My business is a music education company, primarily focused on 1 on 1 guitar lessons, but expanding into the launch and sale of online courses.



Successful applicant must be able to work well on a team. Submitted articles and scripts will be treated as drafts. If the suggestions would decrease the likelihood of a search based video, or an SEO article showing up in search, you must be able to provide relevant points about that to team members. 



Looking to start someone at 8 hours per week, will increase hours as needed. Raises and bonuses available after first three months. Guitar lessons available to successful applicant as a bonus perk of the job as well.



Knowledge of music, and of the guitar, especially niche guitar spaces like fingerstyle/classical guitar is an asset, but not required for the position. When applying, please set the subject line of your reply to "I want to work for you [name]" and where it says [name] insert the last name of a classical guitar composer. Creative choices are more likely to catch my attention. 



Looking forward to hearing from you!

Troy





P.S. If you do not disclose when you use AI for script writing or article writing, you will be immediately terminated without notice. Using these tools is part of our work life now, but passing off copy and pasted responses from what you prompt as your own work is unacceptable.

title: Merchandise Administration Coordinator
description:
Merchandise Administration Coordinator

Global headwear brand — Remote (must work 9am–5p
lbourne / AEST Mon–Fri)

 Pay: $245 USD per week (paid weekly)

Contract: Ongoing (we’re looking for someone long-term who can grow into more senior merchandising/admin responsibilities).

Start: ASAP / by mutual agreement.



Love merchandising, data and making product launches run smoothly? We’re looking for a tidy-minded merch admin who lives in PLM, gets inventory reporting, and has real-world experience in fashion/accessories/footwear. This is a hands-on, highly visible role — you’ll sit at the intersection of Product, Sales, Customer Service and Inventory and help keep the engine running.



Why this role is great

- Work with a global headwear brand and play a key role in product launches and program execution.

- Remote, but fully aligned to Melbourne hours (so you’re paid to collaborate with senior merchandisers and cross-functional teams in real time).

- Weekly pay, stable ongoing contract — ideal for merch admins who want reliable hours and a clear scope of work.



What you’ll own

- PLM data creation & maintenance — create and manage product MIDs/attributes, season/collection fields, program and custom MIDs, and ensure data architecture supports commercial reporting and forecasting.

- Order form & program setup — develop accurate order forms for launches, confirm deadlines, and ensure global MIDs are created in advance of programs.

- Inventory & sales reporting — produce weekly SOH, NOS/ATP, residual stock, sell-through and weeks-cover reporting; support wholesale and B2B reporting.

- Global range & program support — manage cancelled MIDs/program communications, post program wrap-ups, assist with global launches and forecasts.

- Cross-team collaboration — liaise with Product, Sourcing, Sales, Customer Service and Master Data teams to keep everyone aligned.

- Continuous improvement — spot data gaps, propose fixes, and improve the PLM/master data setup for smoother reporting and fewer exceptions.



What is a Product MID (short and useful)

A product MID — short for Material ID (also called Master Item ID or Style ID) — is the single, system-level identifier for a product family in your PLM/ERP.



- It’s the master record for a style or concept; individual SKUs/barcodes are created from that master.

- Typical MID fields: season, collection, product name/description, category/family, colour range, size range, composition/materials, BOM/components, cost, vendor/sourcing info, HS code/GTIN, images, and launch + sales end dates.

- Why it matters: the MID is the single source of truth for launches, costing, customs/program tracking, ordering and reporting. Clean MIDs = fewer exceptions, faster launches, and reliable inventory & sell-through reporting.



What we need from you (must-haves):

- PLM experience — essential. You’ve used PLM day-to-day (MID creation, attribute input, order form creation).

- Fashion / accessories / footwear experience — essential. You’ve worked in retail/wholesale merchandising or product admin for apparel, footwear or accessories.

- Strong Excel and data skills. Comfortable with data entry, cleanups, pivot tables and basic reporting.

- Excellent English communication. You’ll be collaborating heavily with Australia-based teams.

- Organised, accurate, and deadline-driven. You manage high volumes of product data without dropping the ball.

- Availability: Must be available 9:00am–5:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT) Mon–Fri.



Nice-to-haves:

- SAP experience highly regarded — not essential, but a big plus.

- Experience with BI/HANA or other reporting tools.

- Knowledge of master data best-practices and product lifecycle.

- Previous work with global program launches and sourcing teams.



What success looks like (first 3 months):

- PLM inputs for new programs and customs are timely and accurate.

- Order forms and program deadlines are consistently correct and shared on time.

- Weekly inventory and sell-through reports delivered on schedule, with clear, actionable commentary.

- Fewer data exceptions and faster program wrap-ups thanks to cleaner master data.



How to apply (please be concise)



1. When you apply, send:

- Short cover note (2–4 sentences): why you’re a fit and confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- CV with recent merch/admin roles highlighted.

- Brief PLM summary (system name, how long you used it, and 3 core PLM tasks you owned).

- Example/report: a short description (or a redacted sample) of an inventory or sell-through report you created.



2. Screening questions (answer these in your application):

- Name the PLM system(s) you’ve used, years of experience, and the top 3 PLM tasks you owned.

- Do you have any SAP experience? If yes, describe briefly.

- Confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- Are you comfortable with the weekly pay of $245 USD/week?

title: ***URGENT HIRING! Customer Service Representative for Amazon FBA and Walmart WFS - Full Training Provided***
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Representative



As a Customer Service representative, you will be responsible for providing exceptional customer service and support to our clients through phone and non-phone interactions. You will serve as a vital link between our company and our customers, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring a positive customer experience. This role is critical to maintaining and enhancing our reputation for excellent customer service.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Phone and
 Customer Support: Handle calls and
s from customers with professionalism and courtesy, actively listening to their concerns and providing solutions or information.

2. Issue Resolution: Investigate and resolve customer inquiries, complaints, or issues efficiently, striving for a first-call resolution whenever possible.

3. Product Knowledge: Develop in-depth knowledge of our products or services to provide accurate information and guidance to customers.

4. Documentation: Maintain detailed and accurate records of customer interactions, including the nature of the inquiry and the steps taken to resolve it.

5. Customer Education: Offer guidance, instructions, and information to customers to help them make informed decisions and use our products effectively.

6. Upselling and Cross-Selling: Identify opportunities to promote additional products or services to customers and achieve upselling and cross-selling targets.

7. Quality Assurance: Ensure that all interactions meet or exceed company standards for quality, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.

8. Adherence to Policies: Follow company policies and procedures, especially in cases of customer returns, refunds, or warranty claims.

9. Team Collaboration: Work closely with other tea ---------- mbers and departments to address complex customer issues and provide comprehensive solutions.

10. Feedback Loop: Provide feedback and insights to the management team regarding recurring customer issues, potential improvements, and market trends.

11. Adhoc: If there are not many calls, help with research and ad-hoc tasks



Qualifications:

- Previous experience in customer service (minimum 2 years).

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

- Active listening and empathy in dealing with customer inquiries.

- Strong problem-solving abilities and patience.

- Ability to adapt to changing customer needs and business requirements.

- Willingness to work flexible hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays as required.



Attributes:

- Strong customer focus and dedication to delivering exceptional service.

- Ability to remain calm under pressure and handle difficult or upset customers with professionalism.

- Positive attitude, reliability, and a willingness to go the extra mile to ensure customer satisfaction.

- Strong interpersonal and teamwork skills.

- Adaptability and the ability to learn quickly and apply new knowledge to support customer needs.



In this role, you will play a crucial part in ensuring our customers receive the support they need, which contributes to our company's success and growth. If you are passionate about providing exceptional customer service and enjoy resolving customer inquiries via phone, we encourage you to apply for the position of Customer Service Phone Support. Join our team and help us maintain our commitment to customer satisfaction.





Other Details (MUST READ):



This is not a regular job post for you just to make some money and for me to get a “virtual assistant”. This is very different. I am not looking for just “another VA”, I am looking for somebody who always strives for excellence, pushes for more, and never settles for mediocrity. I am looking for a reliable teammate to build the last and long-term relationship with, and to grow and make money together. I am looking for someone who can step into bigger shoes, try new things, and assume meaningful responsibilities! This is a CAREER OPPORTUNITY, there will be many growth opportunities, for a salary increase and bonuses! I truly believe in integrity and fairness, so I always will be more than happy to reward outstanding work. Though you will start with just a few responsibilities and lower pay, later on, it will ultimately be up to you to d ---------- whether you want to widen your set of responsibilities and increase the pay accordingly!



I recognize nothing but excellence. Please DO NOT apply for this job post if you are okay with average, and want to “coast”. I expect your full effort in anything, whether it is just sending a simple
 or something more complex. My expectations are high but so are the rewards. Don’t worry though, I am not expecting you to come in and be a superstar from the first Day. I will provide sufficient training and there will be plenty of opportunities to ask questions and to clarify things, and I would be very happy to go through everything and anything. I expect some mistakes and a learning curve in the beginning, it is fine as everybody makes them. As long as you learn from them and never repeat the same mistake twice! Once you get some time and practice, I expect you to be excellent at it and always over-deliver. I do not micro-manage and won’t be a crazy “boss”. I just give you the job and expect excellent results. Anything else outside of it is not my business (how exactly you have done it, when etc). At the end of the day, I want you to truly be able to say that you’ve realized your potential.



I believe in fair compensation and creating an environment where people can be successful. At the same time, I don’t want people that need a lot of hand-holding. I expect that the people we hire can hit the ground running and start making an impact immediately.



I am very reasonable, fair, and flexible. More than happy to provide vacation time, sick days off, bonuses, flexible schedules, really anything, as long it makes sense. Nobody takes advantage of anybody. As long as the job gets done at the best level, and everything is fair to everyone, I am more than happy to discuss anything. I am also more than happy to be wrong, because we are not always right, and we take our mistakes very seriously too. So there will be plenty of room for discussing this type of thing.



This is a great opportunity to build the whole career! As I mentioned there will be plenty of opportunities to grow, to learn new skills, to get rewarded and even to get management positions! You will be given meaningful responsibilities as I will be hiring more people and growing a bigger team! It will ultimately be up to you to d
, how much work you want to put in, how hard to try, and how far to grow! Even the sky is not the limit! I can’t wait to start working together with you! I can’t wait to see the leader you will become.

title: Remote Sales Enquiries Coordinator for Creative Company
description:
We are a long-established UK print, signage and creative production business with a reputation built over decades for quality, reliability and strong customer service. We work with businesses and organisations that value fast responses, practical solutions and a team that knows how to get things done.

We are looking for a highly organised and commercially aware Remote Sales Enquiries Coordinator to help manage inbound enquiries, support the sales process, and ensure customers receive timely, professional and well-written responses.

This role sits between customer communication and internal delivery. You will help qualify opportunities, coordinate with our internal quoting team, and use AI tools intelligently to draft customer responses that match our brand tone of voice and service standards.

The Role

You will be one of the first points of contact for inbound sales enquiries. Your job is to help move enquiries forward efficiently, making sure customers feel looked after, internal teams have the right information, and responses go out quickly and clearly.

You will also use AI as a practical tool to improve speed and consistency, while applying human judgement to ensure every message feels natural, accurate and aligned with the brand.

Key Responsibilities

Manage inbound sales enquiries from
, website, phone notes and other channels

Review customer requirements and extract the key information needed for quoting

Liaise closely with the internal quoting and estimating team to ensure quotes are progressed promptly

Draft and send customer responses in a professional, friendly and commercially aware tone

Use AI tools to help prepare responses, summaries and follow-ups while maintaining company voice

Ensure all communication is clear, accurate, well-written and tailored to the customer’s needs

Follow up on open enquiries and quoted opportunities to help improve conversion rates

Keep internal systems, notes and enquiry records updated and organised

Escalate urgent, high-value or complex enquiries to the relevant team member quickly

Help improve internal workflows, templates and AI-assisted response processes over time

What We’re Looking For

Strong written English and excellent communication skills

Experience in customer service, sales support, internal sales, account coordination or a similar role

Comfortable working remotely and managing tasks independently

Strong attention to detail and ability to handle multiple enquiries at once

Good judgement in balancing speed with accuracy

Confident working with internal teams to gather information and move jobs forward

Commercial awareness and an understanding of how strong communication supports sales

Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT or similar platforms to improve efficiency

Able to learn and apply a specific company tone of voice consistently

Ideal Experience

Experience in print, signage, manufacturing, creative services, branded products or a related sector

Experience supporting a quoting, estimating or sales admin process

Familiarity with CRM systems, shared inboxes and workflow tools

Experience writing customer
s that feel polished, helpful and human rather than robotic

What Success Looks Like

Enquiries are responded to quickly and professionally

Internal quoting teams receive accurate and complete information

Customers feel looked after and informed throughout the process

AI is used well to improve speed without sacrificing quality or tone

Follow-up discipline improves quote conversion and customer experience

Communication reflects the quality, credibility and professionalism 

Personal Attributes

Calm, organised and dependable

Friendly and professional in written communication

Proactive and solutions-focused

Commercially minded

Comfortable with structure, process and continuous improvement

Able to represent the company well through every customer interaction

Why Join us

Be part of a respected and established UK business

Work remotely with flexibility

Help modernise and improve how a growing company handles sales communication

Play an important role in combining human judgement with AI-enabled workflows

Opportunity to grow with the business as systems and sales operations evolve

How to Apply

Please send your CV along with a short covering note explaining:

Your experience handling inbound customer or sales enquiries

Any experience working with quoting, estimating or sales support teams

How you have used AI tools to improve communication or workflow



Please note the salary will be made up of a base salary of $400 per month, then additional performance bonus of $400 per month too

title: Job Title: AI Voice Agent Specialist (Retell AI)
description:
Hello,



I’m looking for an AI Voice Agent specialist to help me build and scale voice automation systems for service-based businesses.



I run an Australian digital marketing agency with 200+ active clients, primarily in the trades (plumbers, electricians, roofers, etc).

You can view our business here: 



Objective

We are building systems that:

 • Answer missed calls 

 • Capture key job details 

 • Turn enquiries into qualified leads automatically 

This role will focus on building scalable, reusable AI voice agent systems that can be deployed across multiple businesses.



Responsibilities

 • Build and refine templated AI voice agents using Retell AI 

 • Create systems that are easily adaptable across different businesses and use cases 

 • Improve conversation flows (lead capture, FAQs, booking logic, etc.) 

 • Integrate with tools like Zapier, webhooks, and SMS platforms 

 • Troubleshoot and optimise performance post-launch 

 • Provide strategic input on how we can improve and expand the product 



What This Role Offers

 • Work across 200+ real client deployments 

 • Flexible working hours to suit your lifestyle and schedule 

 • Be part of building a scalable productised service 

 • Ongoing, consistent work with room to grow

Not a Fit If

I’m looking for someone to work closely with long-term and help build something valuable.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Tim

title: High-Growth Video Strategist & Editor (US Market | Viral Logic | AI-Savy)
description:
? About the Brand

Thryve Superfoods is a premium wellness brand bridging ancient artisan wisdom with modern bio-hacking. We showcase rare, potent superfoods (like Antrodia Cinnamomea) through the lens of a "Master Craftsman." We don't just sell supplements; we sell the story of 100-year growth and nature's purity.



? Why Join Us?

- Creative Partnership: You aren't a "hands-for-hire." You are a strategist. We value your input on hooks, pacing, and performance.

- AI-First Culture: We don't use AI to replace you; we use AI to empower you. You’ll have the freedom to experiment with the latest tools to stay ahead of the curve.

- Growth Opportunity: Start as an editor, grow into a Content Lead/Strategist. We believe in long-term partnerships.

- Premium Assets: Work with high-quality, cinematic footage of rare nature and traditional craftsmanship.



? Requirements

- US Market Expert: Minimum 2+ years experience editing for US-based YouTube, TikTok, or IG. Must provide client accounts and performance metrics.

- Cultural Fluency: You "get" US internet culture, humor, and visual language.

- The "Viral" Formula: Deep understanding of Hook, Body, and CTA.

- Data-Driven Optimizer: Analyze data, see where people drop off, and adjust edits.

- AI Tool Integration: Proficient in AI (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, etc.) for scripts, hooks, and data analysis.

- Strategic Logic: Ability to deconstruct viral videos, create SOPs, and build logical prompts.





? The Workflow & Compensation

- Trial Phase: Paid trial period (1 month or a set number of videos).

- Budget: $5 - $8 per hour (Negotiable based on your experience and proven track record).

- Long-term: Transition into long-term collaboration and content planning as our lead video strategist.



?  How to Apply

1. Send portfolio (Specifically TikTok/Reels/Shorts).

2. Mandatory: List US accounts worked with and performance data.

3. AI Task: Briefly explain your favorite AI tool and how it helps optimize performance.

4. Secret Code: Start application with the phrase "Mastering the Growth".

title: Virtual Front Desk Coordinator
description:
Virtual Front Desk Coordinator (Dental) – Remote

About the Role



NovaCare Dentistry is not looking for a typical virtual receptionist. This role is for a high-level remote coordinator who can think critically, manage patient flow, and protect production in a fast-paced private practice.



You will act as the control center of the schedule and patient communication, ensuring the doctor maintains a productive day (target: TBD/day adjusted production) while delivering a smooth, professional patient experience.



This is a performance-driven role where accuracy, initiative, and ownership directly impact the success of the practice.



Who You Are



A Critical Thinker

You anticipate problems before they happen. You can resolve scheduling gaps, insurance questions, and patient concerns independently.



Detail Obsessed

You aim for zero-error execution in scheduling, insurance communication, and documentation.



Highly Organized & Efficient

You can manage multiple conversations (calls, texts, software) without losing accuracy or focus.



Assertive but Professional

You are comfortable discussing finances, collecting payments, and setting clear expectations with patients.



Coachable & Adaptable

You implement feedback quickly and adjust to refined systems without resistance.



Growth Minded

You want long-term growth and take pride in contributing to a high-performing practice.



Key Responsibilities



Patient Communication (Primary Role)



Answer inbound calls and texts promptly and professionally

Schedule new and existing patients efficiently

Confirm appointments and reduce no-shows

Handle patient questions using structured communication protocols



Schedule & Production Management



Maintain a full and productive schedule daily

Fill cancellations quickly and proactively

Prioritize high-value treatment and optimize provider time

Coordinate treatment sequencing and timing



Financial Coordination



Clearly communicate treatment costs, expectations, copays and outstanding balances before appointments

Support payment arrangements according to office policy



Insurance & Administrative Support



Communicate with insurance team to resolve insurance questions (as needed)

Ensure accurate and complete patient notes

Support accounts receivable follow-up workflows

Tools & Work Setup

Reliable high-speed internet (non-negotiable)

Quiet, professional work environment

Comfortable using dental software (or able to learn quickly)

Experience with VoIP systems, scheduling platforms, and messaging tools preferred

Qualifications

Preferred: 1+ year in dental front desk, virtual dental support, or similar role

Strong English communication skills (phone and written)

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment



Preferred:



Experience with dental insurance and treatment coordination

Familiarity with practice management software

Spanish-speaking is a plus

Strong understanding of inventory management principles (reorder points, lead time, buffer stock)

Experience with invoicing and billing

Strong analytical and basic math skills

Comfortable using Excel / Google Sheets

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Able to work independently and communicate clearly



Nice to Have (but not required):

Basic bookkeeping knowledge



Work Details:

Work from home

US-based client (EST-some overlap with US hours may be needed)

$5/hour

title: Senior Interior Designer
description:
Senior Interior Designer - Philippines 



Australian Business hours - Mon to Fri, 9am - 5pm AEST



Remote Location Philippines



Full time contract - Start asap!



About us: 



We’re authentically different

We get it done

We have a can do attitude

We care

Do they resonate with you? If so, we’d love to hear form you —apply today!



We are one of Australia’s leading providers of commercial furniture, helping businesses of all sizes create productive, stylish and functional work environments. Our purpose is to enable people to do great work.



About the Role:



JasonL Design Studio is seeking a high-calibre Senior Interior Designer (8+ years’ experience). This is a technical, delivery-focused role designed for a professional who can translate high-level workplace strategy into “build-ready” construction sets.



We are looking for a design-led thinker, not just a drafter. You must be a specialist with extensive experience in commercial office design and fit-outs, possessing the ability to interrogate a brief and provide creative solutions. 



Working remotely from the Philippines. You aren’t just an “operator” —you are a designer who understands the “why” behind a floor plan, ensuring every layout is compliant, functional, and aesthetically aligned with the JasonL brand.



Key Responsibilities:



Space Planning & Strategy: Execute rapid, high-efficiency workplace test-fits and furniture layouts adhering to Australian standards for circulation and ergonomics.



Full Construction Documentation: Produce comprehensive, ”tender-ready” packages including:

                    - Demolition and New Partition Plans.

                    - Reflected Ceiling Plans (RCP) with integrated Lighting.

                    - New Power & Data Plans.

                    - Wall and Floor Finishes Plans.



Detailed Joinery Design: Develop manufacture-ready joinery packages (reception desks, kitchenettes, boardroom credenzas, storage walls, and bespoke storage) with precise dimensions and material call-outs.



Compliance Oversight: Ensure all designs align with the National Construction Code (NCC/BCA) and AS1428.1 (Accessibility) standards.



Technical Coordination: Review shop drawings, respond to RFIs (Request for Information), and coordinate with Australian project managers and suppliers.



Visual Storytelling: Prepare professional presentation decks, mood boards, and FF&E schedules using Photoshop, PowerPoint, & Google Slides.



Technical Requirements & Software:



The Essentials:

AutoCAD (Expert): Deep knowledge of Layer Management and Sheet Sets. Speed and accuracy are non-negotiable.

Adobe Creative Suite: High proficiency in Photoshop (rendering/collages) and (client presentations/FF&E schedules).

Google Workspace: For internal collaboration and data management.

AI Design Integration: Demonstrated ability to use AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, Midjourney) to streamline workflows or generate concept narratives.

Hand Sketching: Ability to communicate design intent through quick digital or hand sketches.



Desirable:

SketchUp: For rapid 3D massing and concept visualization.

Revit: Experience in a BIM environment is a advantage.

InDesign: Familiarisation is beneficial.



Remote & Contract Requirements:

Software Licensing: As a contractor, you are required to hold and maintain your own valid, legal professional licenses for all essential software (AutoCAD, Adobe Creative Suite, etc.) required to perform the role.

Hardware: A high-specification PC/Laptop capable of handling large AutoCAD files and 3D rendering.

Connectivity: Reliable high-speed fiber internet connection (minimum 50Mbps) with a documented backup power/internet solution.

Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English for real-time collaboration with the Sydney team.



Qualifications: 

Experience: Minimum 8+ years in Commercial Interior Design (specifically Workplace/Office Fit-outs).

Portfolio: Must showcase office design space planning, full technical drawing sets, detailed joinery, and mood boards from past commercial projects.

Education: Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Interior Design or Interior Architecture.



To apply, please send your application to 



JasonL acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country. We pay our respects to them and their cultures, and Elders, past, present and future.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
We are a US-based real estate investment company looking for a reliable, motivated Virtual Assistant to make outbound cold calls to property owners. Your goal is to identify homeowners who are interested in selling their property and set appointments for our acquisitions team.

This is a long-term position for the right person. We provide the call script, lead lists, dialer software, and training. No prior real estate experience required, but it is a plus.

Responsibilities:



Make 200+ outbound calls per day using a provided dialer

Follow the provided cold calling script to identify motivated sellers

Qualify leads by asking about property condition, motivation, timeline, and price expectations

Log every call result accurately in our tracking spreadsheet or CRM

Schedule follow-up calls with warm and hot leads

Set appointments for our acquisitions team with qualified sellers

Leave professional voi
s when owners don't answer

Provide a daily summary report of calls made, leads generated, and appointments set



Requirements:



Excellent English speaking skills with clear pronunciation

Reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps) and a quiet workspace

Own headset with noise cancellation

A computer capable of running a web-based dialer

Available to work during US business hours (flexible on timezone, but must overlap with 9 AM - 5 PM EST)

Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls and handling rejection

Honest, dependable, and detail-oriented

Previous experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or customer service is a plus



Nice to Have (Not Required):



Experience in real estate wholesaling or cold calling

Familiarity with CRMs (Podio, REI BlackBook, Follow Up Boss, etc.)

Experience with dialers (Batch Dialer, Mojo, PhoneBurner)

Skip tracing experience (PropStream, BatchLeads)



Compensation & Schedule:



Pay: $3/hour USD (paid weekly via Wise, PayPal, or direct deposit)

Schedule: Full-time (40 hrs/week) or Part-time (20 hrs/week) available

Hours: Must overlap with US business hours

Bonuses: Performance bonuses available for leads that convert to closed deals

Long-term position with potential for raises based on performance



What We Provide:



Full training on our process and script

Daily lead lists (you never have to source your own leads)

Dialer software (no cost to you)

CRM / tracking spreadsheet access

Ongoing coaching and support



How to Apply:

Please send a voice recording (1-2 minutes) of yourself reading the following paragraph:

"Hi, my name is [Your Name]. I'm a virtual assistant with experience in outbound calling. I'm calling today because I noticed you own a property at 123 Main Street. I work with a local real estate company, and we're interested in making you a fair cash offer. Would you be open to hearing what we could offer? There's no obligation at all."

Also include: your relevant experience, available hours and timezone, internet speed (screenshot from speedtest.net), and why you're interested in this position.

title: Facebook Groups Community Marketing
description:
We are building an AI tool for parents of young children. The parents can create custom offline activities for their children (ex: a customized coloring book) that are much more engaging than their generic competition (ex:  a coloring book purchased at the store).



We are looking for a community marketer with excellent English conversational skills to gracefully test different value propositions in English-language
 groups for parents of young children. Over time the role will evolve into focusing on the proven value propositions and recruiting customers within these
 groups.



This community marketer will not be posting at the top level of these groups, but rather will engage in organic discussions already occurring (typically within the comments). The community marketer must be linguistically and emotionally dextrous so that the parents don't feel like they're being marketed to directly. The community marketer must also be able to project a trustworthy

title: GHL Automation Expert
description:
I’m looking for a highly experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) automation specialist who can build, optimize, and scale advanced workflows for my business.



Please do NOT apply if you only have basic experience. I’m specifically looking for someone who has built complex, revenue-generating systems inside GHL.



When applying, please answer the following:



1. What is the most advanced GHL automation system you’ve built?



   * Describe the workflow in detail (triggers, conditions, branching logic, integrations, etc.)

   * What was the goal of the system?

   * What were the measurable results (conversion rate, time saved, revenue impact)?



2. Walk me through how you would build the following system:



   * Lead comes in (form, SMS, or ad)

   * Automatically qualifies the lead

   * Sends personalized follow-ups (SMS/email/VM drops)

   * Books appointments

   * Handles no-shows and reactivation

   * Moves leads through pipeline stages automatically



3. What’s your approach to:



   * Avoiding automation errors or loops

   * Debugging broken workflows

   * Tracking performance inside GHL



4. What integrations have you worked with?

   (Examples: Stripe, Zapier, Make,
 Ads, Google Ads, Webhooks, APIs, etc.)



5. Have you worked with SaaS mode, sub-accounts, or white-label setups in GHL?



6. Share 2–3 examples (Loom/video/screenshots) of systems you’ve personally built.



7. If hired, how would you improve an existing underperforming GHL funnel/automation?



Bonus:



* Experience with lead scoring, AI follow-ups, or multi-channel campaigns

* Experience in [credit repair, real estate, agencies, coaching, etc.]



I’m looking for someone long-term who can take ownership of our automation systems and continuously improve them.

title: Estimating
description:
We are seeking an experienced Estimator to take ownership of pricing, take-offs, and tender submissions across waterproofing and resin flooring projects.

This is not a junior role — we need someone who can think, question drawings, and build accurate, profitable quotes.

Key Responsibilities

Review drawings, specifications, and scopes

Complete accurate take-offs (m², LM, details, penetrations, etc.)

Build detailed costings (labour, materials, plant, logistics)

Prepare and submit professional quotes/tenders

Identify risks, exclusions, and value engineering opportunities

Liaise with suppliers (Hychem, Ardex, Tremco, etc.)

Work with operations team to align pricing with delivery

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in waterproofing, epoxy/resin flooring, or remedial construction estimating

Strong understanding of:

Membrane systems (PVC, liquid, cementitious)

Epoxy/PU systems (car parks, ramps, P4/P5 finishes)

Surface prep requirements (grinding, shot blasting, moisture)

Ability to read and interpret construction drawings properly

Experience with take-off software (Bluebeam, CostX, etc.)

Strong commercial awareness (not just “copy & paste” pricing)

Detail-oriented and fast

Bonus (Highly Regarded)

Experience pricing car parks or large-scale coating projects

Knowledge of Australian Standards for waterproofing

Experience with Ascora, Procore, or similar systems

Supplier relationships or product familiarity

What You Get

Work with a growing

Strong pipeline of commercial projects

Autonomy — we trust people who know what they’re doing

Competitive salary (based on experience)

Opportunity to grow into senior/lead estimator role

title: Local SEO & Google Business Profile (GBP) Specialist
description:
About Us:



We are a premier construction company specializing in high-end outdoor living spaces, luxury home remodels, and commercial renovations. We are currently looking for a dedicated Local SEO & Map Pack Specialist to partner with us and elevate the local search visibility of our primary Google Business Profile.



About the Role:



In this collaborative role, you will work closely with our team. We handle the heavy lifting of website building and sourcing images, and our target city pages are already built. While content creation can be collaborative if you'd like to contribute, your primary focus will be purely on Local SEO strategy and technical execution.



You will manage our single Google Business Profile (GBP), technically optimize the existing city pages, and execute the tactics needed to expand our Map Pack reach to a 10-15+ mile radius so we rank in neighboring wealthy suburbs. A key part of this role is knowing how to research and target keywords that specifically attract high-value clients looking for luxury remodeling and outdoor living transformations, rather than just cheap lead volume.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage, optimize, and grow our single Google Business Profile (GBP).

- Identify and target high-intent keywords that attract high-value clients for services like outdoor living, general construction, and luxury remodels.

- Technically optimize our already-built city and service pages (metadata, schema, local keywords, internal linking).

- Collaborate with the team on content creation, providing SEO recommendations and keyword guidance to ensure pages rank.

- Work with the team on building and cleaning up citations to expand our map visibility to a 10-15+ mile radius.

Track Map Pack grids, monitor performance metrics, and provide proactive weekly updates.



Requirements:

- Proven experience specifically in Local SEO and Google Business Profile management.

- Strict adherence to modern, safe SEO practices (no outdated tactics, spam, or black-hat strategies)

- Track record of expanding Map Pack rankings across a 10-15+ mile radius into neighboring cities and suburbs.

- Familiarity with targeting keywords that attract high-value clients in luxury remodeling, outdoor living, or high-end construction.

- Strong English communication skills to collaborate smoothly with our team.

- Hands-on experience with modern SEO tools (e.g., BrightLocal, GA4, GSC, etc.).



How to Apply:



Please provide a brief introduction of your experience and share your Map Pack portfolio.

title: SEO Specialist Needed for Website Launch & Lead Generation
description:
I am looking for an experienced SEO specialist to optimise my website for launch and ensure it is fully set up to generate leads and rank on Google, particularly in the Sydney area.



This is a one-time project to start, with potential for ongoing monthly work depending on results.



My business operates within the NDIS / healthcare / service-based sector, so experience in local SEO and service businesses is highly preferred.



Scope of Work:



I need a complete SEO foundation set up, including:



1. Technical SEO Setup



Website audit and fixes (site speed, mobile optimisation, errors)

XML sitemap setup and submission

Full setup and optimisation of Google Search Console

Ensure all pages are properly indexed on Google

Fix any crawl/indexing issues



2. On-Page SEO



Keyword research (focused on Sydney/local keywords)

Optimisation of all main pages (titles, meta descriptions, headings, content)

Proper keyword placement across the website

Internal linking structure



3. Local SEO



Full optimisation of Google Business Profile

Assistance with setting up local citations (directories)

Advice on how to generate reviews and improve local ranking



4. SEO Strategy



Provide a clear keyword strategy for my niche

Recommend content/blog ideas to improve rankings

Basic competitor analysis



Deliverables:



Fully optimised website ready for ranking

Confirmation that all pages are indexed

Keyword list + strategy document

Summary report of all work completed



Requirements:



Proven experience with SEO (please provide examples or results)

Experience with local SEO (Australia preferred, Sydney is a bonus)

Clear communication and ability to explain what’s being done



Budget:

Open to offers (fixed price preferred for initial setup)



To Apply:

Please include:



Examples of websites you’ve worked on

What your process looks like

Estimated timeframe

Any quick suggestions you already have for my website



Looking for someone reliable who can potentially work with me long-term as the business grows.

title: Community Engagement Specialist – Real Estate Forums (Reddit & BiggerPockets)
description:
About Us

DealScore is a real estate deal analysis tool that helps house flippers and investors calculate ARV (After Repair Value) and construction costs by zip code. We have a freemium model with a growing user base and we need help getting the word out in the communities where our users spend their time.



The Role

You'll be our voice in online real estate investing communities — primarily Reddit and BiggerPockets. Your job is to monitor relevant threads, provide genuinely helpful answers to investor questions, and naturally introduce DealScore when it's relevant. This is NOT spamming links or copy-pasting sales pitches. Think of it as being the most helpful person in the room who happens to know about a great tool.



What You'll Do Every Day (1–2 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Monitor 3–5 subreddits and BiggerPockets forums for relevant threads using keyword alerts

Draft and post 3–5 thoughtful, authentic replies per day

Post 1 original thread per week (deal analysis, tip, or discussion question)

Track all activity in a shared Google Sheet

Send a weekly summary report every Friday



You'll Create Your Own Accounts

You will create fresh Reddit and BiggerPockets accounts for this role (not your personal accounts). You'll need to build karma and credibility naturally in the first week before engaging on behalf of DealScore. We'll provide a full onboarding playbook with tone guidelines, example replies, and a list of keywords to monitor.



Must-Haves

Strong English writing skills — conversational, not corporate

Familiarity with Reddit (you understand karma, subreddit rules, and community culture)

Ability to write responses that sound like a real person, not a marketer

Self-directed and consistent — you'll work independently with weekly check-ins

Reliable internet and available during US business hours (at least partial overlap with EST)



Nice-to-Haves (Not Required)

Familiarity with real estate investing concepts (ARV, rehab costs, flipping)

Experience with BiggerPockets forums

Previous community management or forum engagement experience

Experience using keyword monitoring tools (F5Bot, etc.)



First Two Weeks

Week 1 is an approval period — you'll draft replies and I'll review before you post. Week 2 shifts to independent posting with spot-checks. Full onboarding playbook provided on Day 1.

Compensation

$300–400/month depending on experience, paid monthly. Bonus opportunity: per-referral bonus for tracked paid signups from your engagement.



To Apply

Please include in your application:

A short paragraph about any experience you have with Reddit or online forums

A sample reply to this thread: "First time flipper — how do I figure out what a house will be worth after I renovate it?"

Your Reddit username if you have one (not required, but helpful)



Note: If you don't know much about real estate investing yet, that's okay — we'll train you. What matters most is your writing quality and understanding of how online communities work.

title: Estimator
description:
Responsibilities includes but are not limited to:

- Assist the BD and Sales teams with quote preparation and any other ad hoc work that may arise.

1. Cost Estimation and Proposal Assistance: 

o Create project limits via Google Earth Pro, take a screenshot, save a copy in the designated folder and paste it in the RFP form for subcontractor, if needed.

o Requesting estimated to subcontractor

o Assist in researching travel costs (airfare, hotel, land travel, labor, per diem)

o Support the preparation and formatting of detailed cost estimates, proposals, and vendor bids.

o Help review estimates for accuracy, completeness, and adherence to company pricing strategies.

o Analyze project documents: Review blueprints, site plans, specifications, and other documents to understand the full scope of the project.

Stay updated on market trends: Monitor current market prices for labor rates, and other relevant costs to ensure estimates are competitive and realistic. Check other platform that we can bid on.



2. Bidding and Proposal Preparation

1. Gather quotes: Obtain and compare quotes from subcontractors, suppliers, and vendors to secure the best prices.

2. Prepare bids and proposals: Compile all cost data and project information into a detailed, professional, and competitive bid package.

3. Collaborate with teams: Work closely with operations and sales/estimator teams to ensure the estimate aligns with project goals and timelines.

4. Present estimates: Clearly communicate the estimate to clients, management, and other stakeholders, explaining the basis of the costs and offering recommendations for cost-saving options.

5. Monitor bid progress: Track the bid progress. Check back with client’s timeline and fees submitted accordingly.

• Prepare reports and maintain databases: Keep a detailed and organized database of historical cost data, quotes, and project information to improve the accuracy of future estimates via Zoho and sales dashboard excel sheet. Coordination with the team for the sales updates and progress.



3. Project Monitoring and Management

• Process change orders(if needed): Re-evaluate and adjust estimates as needed to account for any changes in the project scope or client requests. Change order line items will be coming from Operations

• Essential Skills and Qualifications: Strong mathematical and analytical skills: The ability to perform complex calculations and analyze large sets of data is fundamental.

• Attention to detail: Even minor miscalculations can have a significant impact on the project's bottom line.

• Proficiency with software: Expertise in standard office programs like Microsoft Excel, Word and PDF software are essential. use CRM and other related software program is a plus.

• Excellent communication and negotiation skills: The role requires frequent interaction with clients, vendors, and team members. 

• Organizational and time management skills: Estimators often work on multiple projects simultaneously and must meet strict deadlines.

• Industry knowledge: A deep understanding of site plans, civil work, constructions staking, and other market segments and Asana systems is crucial.



4. Customer Relationship Management(CRM): 

• Track Lead Status: Knowing exactly where a bid stands in the sales funnel.

• Historical Data: Looking back at past wins or losses to see if their margins are consistently too high or too low.

• Communication Log: Ensuring that every change order or client request is documented so there are no "he-said, she-said" disputes later.

• Automation: Using the CRM to send follow-up reminders, ensuring bids don't "go cold" after submission.



5. Campaign Deployment & Lead Intelligence

• Outreach Execution: Facilitate the execution of targeted direct mail and digital outreach initiatives. 

• Lead Qualification: You will be responsible for monitoring multi-channel recipient engagement—analyzing click-through rates and interaction metrics—to identify high-intent prospects. By maintaining rigorous oversight of these analytics, you will qualify and transition high-interest leads to the Sales team for timely follow-up, ensuring a seamless handoff within the business development pipeline.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Job Description:

We are a US-based real estate investment company looking for a reliable, motivated Virtual Assistant to make outbound cold calls to property owners. Your goal is to identify homeowners who are interested in selling their property and set appointments for our acquisitions team.

This is a long-term position for the right person. We provide the call script, lead lists, dialer software, and training. No prior real estate experience required, but it is a plus.

Responsibilities:



Make 200+ outbound calls per day using a provided dialer

Follow the provided cold calling script to identify motivated sellers

Qualify leads by asking about property condition, motivation, timeline, and price expectations

Log every call result accurately in our tracking spreadsheet or CRM

Schedule follow-up calls with warm and hot leads

Set appointments for our acquisitions team with qualified sellers

Leave professional voi
s when owners don't answer

Provide a daily summary report of calls made, leads generated, and appointments set



Requirements:



Excellent English speaking skills with clear pronunciation

Reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps) and a quiet workspace

Own headset with noise cancellation

A computer capable of running a web-based dialer

Available to work during US business hours (flexible on timezone, but must overlap with 9 AM - 5 PM EST)

Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls and handling rejection

Honest, dependable, and detail-oriented

Previous experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or customer service is a plus



Nice to Have (Not Required):



Experience in real estate wholesaling or cold calling

Familiarity with CRMs (Podio, REI BlackBook, Follow Up Boss, etc.)

Experience with dialers (Batch Dialer, Mojo, PhoneBurner)

Skip tracing experience (PropStream, BatchLeads)



Compensation & Schedule:



Pay: $3/hour USD (paid weekly via Wise, PayPal, or direct deposit)

Schedule: Full-time (40 hrs/week) or Part-time (20 hrs/week) available

Hours: Must overlap with US business hours

Bonuses: Performance bonuses available for leads that convert to closed deals

Long-term position with potential for raises based on performance



What We Provide:



Full training on our process and script

Daily lead lists (you never have to source your own leads)

Dialer software (no cost to you)

CRM / tracking spreadsheet access

Ongoing coaching and support



How to Apply:

Please send a voice recording (1-2 minutes) of yourself reading the following paragraph:

"Hi, my name is [Your Name]. I'm a virtual assistant with experience in outbound calling. I'm calling today because I noticed you own a property at 123 Main Street. I work with a local real estate company, and we're interested in making you a fair cash offer. Would you be open to hearing what we could offer? There's no obligation at all."

Also include: your relevant experience, available hours and timezone, internet speed (screenshot from speedtest.net), and why you're interested in this position.

title: Meta Ads `Manager
description:
We're a UK-based sales and growth agency managing backend operations for high-ticket coaches and consultants. We're looking for a sharp, experienced Meta Ads Manager to run paid campaigns across multiple client accounts simultaneously. This is a fast-paced role - you'll be working directly with our team and reporting on performance regularly, so clear communication is non-negotiable.



What You'll Be Doing



Managing and optimising Meta ad campaigns across multiple client accounts at once

Building and testing ad creatives, copy, and audiences from scratch

Monitoring daily spend, CPL, ROAS, and flagging issues fast

Running A/B tests and iterating based on data

Producing weekly performance reports with clear insights and next steps

Collaborating with our content and ops team to align ad strategy with organic funnels

Scaling winning campaigns without sacrificing efficiency





What We're Looking For



4+ years of hands-on Meta Ads experience (not agency-side account management - actual campaign building and optimisation)

Proven experience managing multiple accounts at the same time

Strong understanding of high-ticket offer funnels, lead gen, and conversion campaigns

Confident reading data and making decisions quickly - you don't wait to be told

Excellent spoken and written English - you'll be on calls with our UK team regularly and need to communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally

title: Data Validation Expert
description:
About Fundable



At Fundable, we are building a new-age startup intelligence platform. We combine

advanced web-scraping and LLMs to track VC-backed startups in real-time, sourcing

and extracting key financing details from the latest press releases. Our mission is to

provide the most comprehensive, accurate, and up-to-date data on the startup

ecosystem, offering real-time deal coverage and transparent sourcing as a cost

effective alternative to industry leaders.



Job Description: Data Validator

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data Validator to assist with reviewing, verifying, and

validating data ingested from our pipeline.



This is an integral role for our startup. As an early-stage company, this position offers

the unique opportunity to wear many hats. While your primary focus will be data

validation, you will be encouraged to learn about, and potentially contribute to, other

functions such as sales, growth, or product development based on your interests and

evolving company needs.



Responsibilities

- Review and meticulously verify the accuracy of newly reported funding rounds

and related data.

-- Related data consists of (but not limited to)

-- Investors, Angel Investors, Lead Partners, Valuations, etc

- Research companies to find missing funding rounds

- Validate company slugs (linkedin, x, pitchbook, crunchbase, etc)



Requirements

- Understanding of the Venture Capital (VC) and startup ecosystem.

- General understanding of finance (what is an investor, M&A, IPO, etc.)

title: Insurance Appointment Setter

This is a high-volume, performance-driven role best suited for someone who genuinely enjoys talking to people and doesn't take rejection personally.



What You'll Be Doing

Qualifying prospects across personal lines (home, auto) and commercial lines (GL, WC, BOP)

Handling and overcoming common objections ("we're all set," "not interested," "I'll call you back")

Booking qualified appointments and warm transfers for producers

Following up on leads via phone, text, and

Meeting or exceeding daily call volume and appointment-setting targets

title: Experienced Funnelish Funnel Builder (Health/Beauty/Gadgets) - Advertorial & Shopify Checkout Expert

have only watched tutorials, this role is not a fit.

WHAT YOU WILL BUILD:

- Advertorial pages (long-form, story-style layouts)

- Product pages optimized for conversion

- Mobile-first, clean, conversion-focused layouts

- Funnels based on existing references and instructions

CRITICAL REQUIREMENT:

You must know how to correctly connect Shopify checkout to a Funnelish

sales page. This is non-negotiable. Customers will checkout directly through

Shopify from the Funnelish funnel page.

Note: You will NOT be building upsells/downsells in Funnelish - these are

handled in Shopify. Your focus is on the advertorial funnel and product page

with proper Shopify checkout integration.

REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE):

? Proven experience building funnels inside Funnelish

? Experience with advertorial funnels specifically

? Experience building product pages for conversion

? MUST have experience connecting Shopify checkout to Funnelish sales

pages - this is critical

? Experience in health, beauty, or gadgets niches

? Strong attention to detail and ability to follow exact instructions

? Ability to work independently and deliver fast, clean builds

PROOF OF EXPERIENCE (MANDATORY):



To be considered, you must provide:

- Live Funnelish funnel links with working Shopify checkout, OR

- Screenshots of funnels you built in Funnelish (especially showing Shopify

checkout integration), with a short explanation of what you built

Applications without proof of Funnelish work and Shopify checkout

integration will be ignored.

TEST TASK:

A small PAID test task will be required before any long-term work.

If you are not willing to complete a test task, please do not apply.

IMPORTANT:

This is an experience-only role.

If you cannot show previous Funnelish work with Shopify checkout integration

and complete a test task, please do not apply.

To confirm you have read this, start your application with:

"I have real experience building Funnelish advertorial funnels with Shopify

checkout integration."

Applications that do not follow the instructions above will not be reviewed.

AVAILABILITY REQUIREMENTS:

- Must be available 7 days a week

- This is a long-term role for the right candidate

- Looking for someone committed to growing with the company



APPLY NOW:

If you meet all the requirements above, please submit your application with:

1. Proof of previous Funnelish work (links or screenshots - especially showing

Shopify checkout)

2. Your application starting with the required phrase

3. Brief explanation of your experience in health/beauty/gadgets niches

4. Examples of how you've integrated Shopify checkout into Funnelish funnels

title: Instructional Content Developer
description:
About the Role

I'm looking for an Instructional Content Developer to support the creation of engaging, effective learning experiences for both self-paced online learning and instructor-led training. This role is ideal for someone who can turn complex information into clear, learner-friendly content and is comfortable both designing learning materials and developing them in modern eLearning tools.



The ideal candidate is a strong writer, an independent learner, and a thoughtful collaborator who can research unfamiliar topics, organize information clearly, and build polished learning assets from start to finish.



Key Responsibilities

 • Design and develop online courses using tools such as Rise 360, Camtasia, Vyond, and/or Synthesia

 • Create clear, engaging learning content for self-paced and instructor-led training

 • Develop lesson plans, facilitator guides, learner activities, and assessments

 • Write scenario-based learning content, including realistic case studies and practice activities

 • Research topics independently and gather information from available resources to create accurate and effective training materials

 • Collaborate with stakeholders and team members to clarify content needs and align deliverables with learning goals

 • Organize content and project materials in a clear, manageable way

 • Review and revise content based on feedback while maintaining consistency and quality



Qualifications

 • Experience developing learning content for online and instructor-led training

 • Strong skills in one or more authoring/development tools such as Rise 360, Camtasia, Vyond, or Synthesia

 • Ability to write clear, structured, learner-focused content

 • Experience creating lesson plans, activities, assessments, and scenario-based learning materials

 • Strong research skills and ability to learn new subject matter independently

 • Comfortable working collaboratively with a team as well as independently managing assigned work

 • Highly organized with strong attention to detail

 • Ability to work within EST/EDT time zones



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience developing both eLearning and facilitator-led training materials

 • Experience creating case studies, applied scenarios, or problem-based learning activities

 • Familiarity with adult learning principles and instructional design best practices

 • Ability to balance multiple projects and deadlines effectively

title: Front End Manager - Dropshipping Shopify Stores
description:
We are a fast-scaling e-commerce company operating 8 active Shopify stores across two niches: fashion and home & decor. Our stores run across multiple European markets including the Netherlands, Belgium, Italy, Denmark, Poland, and Ireland.



We are looking for a Front End Manager who will take full ownership of our stores, product feed and listing team. This is not a task-execution role. We need someone who thinks like an operator, manages a team with confidence and takes initiative without being told what to do.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

Listing Review & Quality Control



- Review and approve all product listings before they go live

- Check every listing for full GMC compliance: titles, descriptions, GTINs, images, variants, prices and shipping classes

- Provide structured feedback to listers and maintain an error log per tea
mber



Team Management



- Hire, onboard and manage a team of product listers across fashion and home & decor

- Set daily targets, review output quality and hold the team accountable to KPIs

- Build and maintain SOPs and Loom training videos for all listing processes



Feed Hygiene & GMC Health



- Run daily checks across all 8 GMC accounts for errors, warnings and disapprovals

- Diagnose and resolve disapproved products quickly and structurally

- Keep all feeds fully compliant across all active markets and languages



Product Performance & Pricing



- Analyze weekly performance data per product: CTR, ROAS, conversion rate and margin

- Optimize underperforming listings by adjusting titles, images, descriptions or pricing



Storefront & Collections



- Keep all collections clean, accurate and logically structured across every store

- Execute seasonal switches and ensure every store looks professional at all times



Media Buyer Collaboration



- Work directly with our media buyers to execute product optimizations based on ad performance

- Handle domain switches, post-audit adjustments and other front end requests independently



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Proven experience managing Shopify stores in a dropshipping or e-commerce environment

- Deep understanding of Google Merchant Center, feed compliance and Google Shopping

- Experience managing a remote team and holding people accountable to results

- Strong eye for detail: errors in listings, feeds and stores do not slip past you

- Solid understanding of CRO and what makes a store convert

- Available 6 days per week with overlap during CET business hours

- Fluent in English, clear communicator, responsive



WHAT YOU WILL GET



- $7 USD per hour

- Performance-based bonuses tied to feed health and team output

- Direct access to the founders and real ownership over your department

- A stable, long-term role with a fast-growing company



EARNING MORE OVER TIME



If your performance is consistently strong and the stores grow because of the work you put in, we will reflect that in your compensation. For the right candidate, we move toward a structure that includes performance bonuses and flat fees tied directly to store output. The better the stores perform, the more you earn.



HOW TO APPLY



Send us the following:



- A Loom video of 1 to 2 minutes introducing yourself, walking through your experience with Shopify and GMC, and explaining why you are the right fit

- Your updated PDF resume

- A brief description of the most complex Shopify or GMC issue you have ever resolved



Important: Start your application message with the words ready to manage. Applications that do not include this will not be reviewed.

title: VA Admin Support
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.
