title: Part time Credit Repair Specialist
description:
About the Role:  

I’m looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Credit Repair Specialist who actually understands the process—not someone who sends out the same generic dispute letters for every client.



This role is for someone who knows how to analyze, think, and execute with intention to get real results.



---



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Reviewing and analyzing full credit reports (all 3 bureaus)

- Identifying negative items and determining the best dispute strategy

- Creating custom, targeted dispute letters (NOT templates for every situation)

- Submitting disputes through proper channels (mail, CFPB, etc. if applicable)

- Tracking client progress and updating dispute rounds

- Understanding how to challenge:

  - Collections

  - Charge-offs

  - Late payments

  - Inquiries

  - Personal information inaccuracies

- Applying consumer laws (FCRA, FDCPA, etc.) where necessary



---



What I’m Looking For:

- Strong understanding of credit repair (this is NOT an entry-level learning role)

- Ability to read and break down a credit report confidently

- Knows how to strategically target different types of accounts

- Does NOT rely on generic, copy-paste dispute letters

- Attention to detail and critical thinking skills

- Organized and able to manage multiple clients

- Ability to educate and bring value beyond execution (you should be able to teach and improve processes, not just follow instructions)



---



Bonus Skills (Not Required, but a BIG Plus):

- Experience removing evictions (including ones not reporting on credit)

- Familiarity with CFPB complaints and advanced dispute tactics

- Experience with Metro 2 compliance or data furnisher disputes



---



Current Business Context (Important):

- I currently have ~40 active clients that need to be worked through and organized within my credit repair system  

- At the moment, most clients are using Experian and Credit Karma reports (not imported reports)  

- Over the next few weeks, I will be transitioning all clients to MyFreeScoreNow (7-day free trial) so reports can be properly imported and managed  



You should be comfortable working with both non-imported reports AND transitioning into a more structured system.



---



What This Is NOT:

- This is NOT for someone who just downloads templates and sends them out  

- This is NOT for someone guessing their way through disputes  



---



What This IS:

- A role for someone who understands how to get results  

- Someone who thinks before they act and moves with strategy  



---



How to Apply:

When applying, include:

1. A brief explanation of your experience with credit repair  

2. Your approach to handling a negative account (example preferred)  

3. Any results you’ve helped clients achieve  



---



If you’re someone who takes pride in getting real results and not just “sending letters,” this is for you.

About Us



We are a fast-growing finance software company dedicated to delivering innovative solutions that transform the way businesses manage their finances. We thrive on precision, efficiency, and ambition—and we’re looking for someone who shares that mindset.

title: Project Manager (Content & Client Ops)
description:
FOR ORGANIZED OPERATORS WHO LOVE MAKING THINGS RUN SMOOTHLY



If you get energy from keeping things on track, following up without being asked, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks, this is for you.



You won’t be creating content or strategy, but your job is essential to our success. You make sure everything gets done on time and to standard. We’ll train you on our systems, and you’ll bring ownership, communication, and reliability.



To be considered, you MUST apply here: [
](
)



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS ROLE



- Immediate impact: Your work directly affects client results and team performance

- Real ownership: You’re not assisting — you’re making sure everything actually gets done

- Clear systems: We have structured workflows, checklists, and processes (you won’t be guessing)

- Flexible + remote: Work from anywhere with a small, high-performance team

- Growth opportunity: As we grow, this role can evolve into a true operations lead



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



1. OWN PROJECT EXECUTION

- Turn client requests into clear tasks and timelines

- Assign work to both in-house and freelance strategists, editors, and assistants

- Track deadlines and ensure everything is delivered on time

1. CLIENT COMMUNICATION

- Respond to client
s and requests

- Send review links, updates, and follow-ups

- Collect assets and approvals

- Keep communication clear, organized, and proactive

1. TEAM COORDINATION

- Ensure everyone knows what they should be working on daily

- Check in on progress and follow up when needed

- Keep priorities clear and aligned

- Flag issues before they become problems

1. QA / QUALITY CONTROL

- Review videos and copy before sending to clients

- Ensure content meets brand and quality standards

- Catch mistakes before they go live

1. FREELANCER COORDINATION

- Source freelancers when needed

- Assign briefs, timelines, and expectations

- Manage them through completion

1. TASK & WORKFLOW MANAGEMENT

- Turn meetings into clear action items

- Update timelines as priorities shift

- Keep systems clean and up to date

- Make sure nothing falls through the cracks



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



- Nothing gets missed

- Clients always feel taken care of

- Projects are delivered on time

- The team always knows what to do next

- The team’s schedule is maximized without overlapping tasks

- You don’t need to be told to follow up because you already did



YOU’RE A FIT IF



- You love social media, marketing, and entertainment

- You are highly organized and naturally detail-oriented

- You take ownership and don’t wait to be told what to do

- You communicate clearly and confidently (written + verbal)

- You’re comfortable managing multiple moving pieces at once

- You enjoy being the person who keeps everything running smoothly



THIS IS NOT A FIT IF



- You struggle to follow systems, checklists, or structured workflows

- You need constant direction instead of taking initiative

- You have difficulty prioritizing tasks when multiple things are happening

- You don’t enjoy working inside tools like Notion, project trackers, or organized systems

- You tend to let small details slip or miss deadlines

- You’re looking primarily for a creative role rather than an execution-focused one



ABOUT US



Straight Shot Post is a social media agency focused on helping brands grow through high-quality, systemized content.



We combine creativity with structure, meaning we care just as much about execution and reliability as we do about great content.



OUR CORE VALUES



- Effort

- Empathy

- Transparency

- Simplicity

- Authenticity



LOGISTICS



- Contractor

- 20-40 hrs/week

- $10–$20/hr

- Paid in USD

- Remote

- Available from 10am - 6pm EST



To be considered, you MUST apply here: [
](
)



We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

title: VSL Video Editor – Full Edit + Sourcing (German Ads)
description:
Hiring: VSL Video Editor – Full Edit + Sourcing (German Ads)



Looking for an experienced video editor to create VSLs and video ads for my Shopify dropshipping store (health & wellness niche).



You're not just a video editor — you think like a marketer.



You understand:

- Hooks, pattern interrupts & scroll-stopping openers

- Pacing, rhythm & retention (when to cut, pause, punch)

- How visuals, text & sound drive emotion and action

- Guiding viewers from attention ? desire ? conversion

- Customer psychology & buying triggers



You edit for performance, not just aesthetics.



Your job: Take my script/copy and turn it into a complete, ready-to-run VSL.



Full process you'll handle:

1. Receive script/copy from me

2. Generate AI voiceover (German)

3. Source relevant B-Roll footage (no stock-looking clips!)

4. Edit everything together (pacing, transitions, text overlays)

5. Use AI to enhance VSL with authority figures if needed

6. Add product animations, testimonial clips, creator footage (provided by me)

7. Deliver final video ready to launch



Assets I provide:

- Script / Copy

- Product animations

- Creator holding product clips

- Testimonial clips

- Product videos

- Briefs



What you source/create:

- AI voiceover

- B-Roll material (authentic, no generic stock footage)

- Text overlays / captions

- Transitions / effects

- Final edit



Requirements:

- 2+ years video editing experience

- Experience with VSLs / direct response ads

- Must be able to source B-Roll footage independently (no stock-looking clips)

- Proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut

- Experience with AI voiceover tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs, etc.)

- Strong understanding of retention, watch time & conversion psychology

- Fluent in visual storytelling (clear, persuasive, emotionally driven edits)

- Fluent in German or English (communication)

- Ads are in German – must be comfortable editing German content

- Fast turnaround and reliable delivery



What you'll get:

- Part-time, ongoing work

- Clear briefs, scripts & creative direction

- Performance bonuses on winning ads

- Long-term opportunity for the right editor



Why work with me?

I'm building a multi-million euro brand, not just a quick side hustle. My team is sacred to me – I take care of the people who take care of my business.



I'm looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with me. If you perform well, there's room to grow – more responsibility, more projects, better pay. Loyalty gets rewarded.



I'll take you on a journey.



Looking for long-term commitment only. No job hoppers.



We're looking for someone who edits like a marketer, not just a video technician.



Trial period required. Serious applicants only.

title: Online ESL Instructor
description:
Join Our Mission:



At Everest English School, our mission is to open up a world of opportunities for young learners. Unlike English education, which often focuses on test-driven learning, heavy on conventional grammar and translation, we are dedicated to equipping students with practical English communication skills. We bridge the gap between traditional education and the essential skills needed for global interactions.



We are seeking experienced and adaptable Online ESL (English as a Second Language) Instructors to teach Japanese students from Grade 1 to Grade 12. As our company continues to grow and innovate, we are entering a dynamic phase where teaching methods may evolve. Therefore, we value instructors who are open to ongoing training and flexible in adapting their instructional approaches. You will play a vital role in supporting students’ language development while helping shape the future of our learning programs.



Responsibilities:

Teach English to Japanese elementary, junior high, and high school students (ages 6–18) in a one-on-one online format

Deliver engaging, age-appropriate lessons tailored to each student’s needs and proficiency level

Adapt teaching strategies based on feedback, training, and evolving curriculum standards

Monitor student progress and provide regular feedback to both students and parents

Participate in training sessions and tea
etings to stay updated on instructional changes

Maintain accurate lesson records and communicate proactively with support staff



Qualifications:

Native or Near-Native English fluency with no requirement for Japanese.

Bachelor’s degree required (preferably in Education, English, or a related field)

TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification strongly preferred

Minimum of 2 years of teaching or tutoring experience, preferably with children and/or teens

Experience teaching Japanese students is a strong plus

Ability to deliver dynamic lessons and manage classroom behavior in a virtual setting

Openness to learning and adapting teaching methods through training and feedback

Proficiency with online teaching tools; reliable internet, headset, and quiet workspace required



Working Hours:

Each workday will include at least two 25-minute lessons (totaling an hour or more per day).

The expected monthly working hours are approximately 24 hours.

Lessons can be scheduled between 5:00 AM and 11:00 PM (JST).

Priority will be given to those who can teach during weekday mornings and on weekends.



Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate based on experience, qualifications, and performance



If you are interested, we kindly ask you to submit the following two items.

Please be aware that missing either item will result in an incomplete application.

1.Your most recent resume

2. 1-minute self-introduction video in English



This will be an outsourcing (independent contractor) agreement, not a part-time employment contract.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a graphic designer for a female brand to join our team. The job will involve designing monthly stationery collections and creating mockups of those collections.



We are looking for someone highly creative, artistic, with a sense of feminine design and an extreme attention to detail who is able to create anything from floral designs to modern minimalist designs. 



You will be working with pre-created illustrations and graphics packs that you will then add to our stationery templates. So you won't have to create the illustrations from scratch, but will be putting pre-made illustrations together to make a cohesive stationery collection.



Your will have extensive knowledge of Canva but will also need to be proficient in Illustrator and Photoshop to create the mockups.



We hold a brief tea
eting on Zoom every Monday (around 6pm PHP time) which you should be able to join. If you are unable to meet at this time, you will need to meet with the owner 1:1 briefly at another time as it's important that our team are all on the same page each week.



Please note that this job requires a high level of design skill, so do not apply if design is not your main role or if you have not had experience doing highly creative design. We are looking for an artist with an intensive attention to detail!



This is a part time position as your work on the monthly stationery collections can be completed flexibly in 1-2 weeks. Our monthly collections have a release deadline, so you will be working within a framework to ensure we do not miss release dates.



When applying for this position, let us know your favourite Bible verse and why you like it and also what you like to do in your spare time. Also tell us who your favourite artist is and why.

title: Innovative Accountant
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a smart, innovative, forward-thinking, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy Accountant to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong Australian accounting experience with a natural interest in technology, automation, and AI-powered accounting system.



This role is focused on using, guiding, and improving our internal accounting tool and improving and streamlining accounting processes, particularly in reconciliation and financial workflows, while contributing to the development of smarter, more efficient AI-powered accounting system.



You will not be building automation from scratch, but you will play a key role in ensuring the system performs accurately by validating outputs, refining workflows, and helping train the system over time.



Key Responsibilities:

•Perform bookkeeping and accounting tasks using our internal AI-powered system

•Review, verify, and validate outputs (e.g., reconciliations, financial data) for accuracy

•Identify errors, inconsistencies, or edge cases and provide feedback for improvements

•Help “train” the system by refining instructions, workflows, and use cases

•Ensure high accuracy in Australian accounting processes and compliance

•Collaborate with the team to continuously improve system performance



Requirements:

•Minimum 2–3 years of experience in Australian accounting and bookkeeping

•Strong understanding of Australian accounting standards and practices

•Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and use new tools and platforms

•Comfortable working with modern digital tools (e.g., ChatGPT or similar platforms, or basic coding knowledge is a plus)

•Analytical, creative, and solution-oriented mindset

•Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills



Nice to Have:

•Experience working with accounting software (Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks)

•Exposure to AI tools or workflow-based systems

•Background in QA, auditing, or process validation



Application Instructions:

To confirm you’ve read this post carefully, please include the word “AI” at the top of your application.

Also, attach your latest resume/CV and briefly highlight your experience in Australian accounting and any tools or technologies you’ve used.

title: Operations Assitant
description:
For this role:

You’re the kind of person who loves to organize, puts people first, and thrives on variety. Tech-savvy, quick to learn, fast-moving, and detail-obsessed (yes, even with grammar ????). Adaptable, driven, and fueled by doing work you can be proud of.

Responsibilities:

The daily responsibilities in this role include, but are not limited to:



schedule marketing content across platforms (and keep the content calendar updated)

manage calendars (booking, confirmations, reminders, reschedules)

manage multiple email and whatsapp inboxes and client communication (respond, triage, follow up, keep next steps clear)

support sales admin (send quotes and proposals and follow-up with leads)

support client onboarding (collect logins/access, assets, details, forms)

assist with client/project workflow management in Notion (statuses, tasks, deadlines, follow-ups)

provide technical admin assistance for SEO/Google Ads projects (organize access, upload assets, basic QA checks, keep tasks moving)

update/create SOP’s

write marketing material and assist with publishing, review AI generation outputs for projects



Requirements:

Attention to detail and impeccable follow through

Coachable and open to critique in order to increase skills

Great personal time management skills

Positive attitude

1+ years in an assistant/associate role

Must maintain a consistent schedule (set hours)

Proficient in Google Suite, including Gmail and Google Calendar

Results:

Client onboarding is consistent: 100% of new clients receive a welcome pack and request list within 24 hours

Fewer new client delivery delays: access and info are collected early, and blockers are followed up every second day

Sales pipeline moves: proposals sent quickly, follow-ups done, calls booked reliably

Projects stay on track: every client has a current status, next steps, and assigned owner in the workflow tool





Not required, but nice to have:

Familiar with the following tools:



 ? Notion



 ? GoHighLevel (GHL)



 ? Basic familiarity with Google Ads / GA4 / Google Search Console



 ? Claude Cowork









About Us

We’re a South African-based digital marketing agency helping service-based businesses generate consistent, high-quality enquiries through Google Ads and SEO.

Our clients are primarily in the automotive, trades, and medical industries, both locally and internationally. Everything we do is built around results.

We’re a lean, mean team  where everyone plays an important role. We’re very focused on innovation and growing with the latest marketing and AI technologies.



Our Culture

We value:

Ownership – You take responsibility and see things through



Attention to detail – This sets us apart in the eyes of our clients



Clear, direct communication – We work mostly async but with good systems



Practical problem-solving – We focus on what works



We move quickly, test ideas, and improve as we go. You’ll work closely with the founder, so your work has a direct and visible impact on the business.

We also understand real life. Flexibility matters, and we aim to create a working environment that’s sustainable long-term.



How We Work



Part-time role with flexible hours

Remote-first, small team with direct communication

Systems and processes are constantly evolving

Results and reliability matter more than clocking hours

Opportunity to grow into a bigger role as the business expands

title: Video Editor for a YouTube Channel
description:
We are looking for a video editor for a YouTube channel focused on Antiques Roadshow items. The editing style is light, clean, and informative.



What’s provided:



1.Full script

2. Voiceover

3. Links/references for the antique items

4. Official editing manual/guidelines



What you’ll do:



1. Edit videos by following the provided manual

2. Add relevant images, clips, and other external content that match the antique item being discussed

3. Use creativity where appropriate while still following the channel’s editing style



Rate:



$1.35 per minute

Each video is usually around 40 minutes, more or less



Requirements:



Must submit a portfolio/sample work

Good sense of pacing and informative editing

Able to source fitting visuals for historical/antique-related content



If you're interested, please send your portfolio and sample work.

title: Book Publishing Assistant - 26K-30K PHP/month - Long Term
description:
We are a growing book publishing company looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to join our team. You'll play a hands-on role across a variety of areas, it won't ever get too boring. 



This isn't a passive admin role. We need someone who takes genuine ownership of their work, follows processes carefully, and communicates proactively without needing to be chased. If you take pride in doing things right and want to grow with a company that values your contribution, we'd love to hear from you.



Responsibilities

- Research topics and use your creativity to craft outlines/plans for new fiction & non-fiction books

- Edit and proofread content using Grammarly/Originality/other software.

- Plan, launch & manage Amazon Ad campaigns. Training provided.

- Learn how to format books using Atticus & Vellum.

- Create book descriptions, research keywords & plan book promotions.

- Communicate directly with writers, narrators & illustrators — providing feedback, updates, and deadlines to the team.

- Follow established SOPs for all workflows

- Manage general admin tasks and file organisation

- Keep projects on track and flag issues early

- Participate in our daily 30 minute tea
etings.



You Are

- Someone with strong attention to detail — nothing slips through the cracks

- An excellent communicator in written English

- Confident using Google Sheets & Docs

- Able to follow SOPs consistently and accurately

- A team player, who wants to grow personally + help the business grow.

- Self-motivated & pro-active — you take ownership and don't wait to be told what to do

- Reliable and available during Philippines business hours (9AM–5PM PHT)

- Not working multiple jobs at the same time - we’ll notice the lack of commitment/investment in your work.  





Nice-to-Haves

- Passionate about books & reading

- Familiarity with Trello, Slack, Google Drive, etc  

- Experience/skills with coding, or other things that could bring value. 



Why Join Us?

- Stable, full-time remote position

- 13th month + other benefits.

- Clear path for salary increases and expanded responsibilities based on performance

- Be part of a growing team where your contributions directly shape the work we publish



How to Apply

-Our hiring process has three stages:



Stage 1: Application

Please
 me with the following two things, to:  
 

- Your answers to the 8 questions below

- A 2-minute video introduction (using Loom) OR a written cover letter — tell us who you are and why this role is a good fit. A video is strongly preferred and applicants who include one are far more likely to progress. If you choose not to include a video at this stage, one will be required before moving to the final interview.



Application Questions

1) Do you currently have a job? If yes, what do you do and how many hours per week? If no, what was your previous job & what were your responsibilities?

2) Why does this role attract you, and what about your experience or background makes you a strong fit for the tasks involved?

3) How much salary are you looking to make? (Please state in PHP per month)

4) Do you have any experience with working as a VA or in a similar role? Please describe.

5) What does "being proactive" in your work mean to you? Give a brief example from a previous role.

6) Are you comfortable following detailed SOPs and processes, even when they feel repetitive? How do you stay consistent?

7) Please attach a link to your OJ profile.

8) Please attach a Loom video (PREFERRED!) OR a cover letter written without AI. 





Stage 2: Skills Test

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete an online skills test covering attention to detail, problem solving, and editorial ability.



Stage 3: Interviews

A small number of candidates who pass the skills test will be invited to a Zoom interview to assess fit, communication, and working style.



---

We review every application carefully. We look forward to hearing from you. Initial applications will close on Weds 25th March.

title: AI Video Creator
description:
I am an Australian lawyer looking to create a professional AI-generated video avatar of myself for use on my website and ongoing content.



This is not a basic or template avatar project. The result must be realistic, professional, and suitable for a legal services brand.

You must demonstrate experience creating an avatar based on a real person’s photos (not template avatars). Applicants that dont provide these will not be considered. 



Scope (Initial Project):



Create a realistic AI avatar based on my images (not cartoon or generic avatar)

Integrate or clone my real voice (audio samples will be provided)

Produce a 60–90 second website introduction video

Ensure natural lip sync, pacing, and professional delivery



Deliverables:



HD video suitable for website use

Clean, professional audio

Reusable avatar setup for future videos



IMPORTANT:

This must resemble a real person and feel credible for a professional services website. Generic or template-style avatars are not suitable.



Budget:

Fixed price: PHP16,000 total



Milestones:



PHP 2,000 – Test sample (10–15 seconds) – only for shortlisted candidates

PHP 10,000 – Avatar build and draft full video

PHP 4,000 – Final delivery and revisions



Process:

Only 2–3 candidates will be shortlisted. A paid test will be offered to shortlisted candidates only before proceeding.



Ongoing Work:

I am looking for a long-term working relationship. Once the avatar is created, there will be regular ongoing videos which will be simpler and priced separately.



Requirements:



Strong English communication

Experience with AI video tools (e.g. HeyGen, D-ID, Synthesia, Runway, ElevenLabs or similar)

Ability to create realistic human-style avatars (not templates)



To Apply:



Provide 1–2 examples of realistic AI avatar work (real-person style)

Briefly explain your process and tools

Confirm you are comfortable with milestone-based work and the shortlist + test process

Include the word "pineapple" in your application so i know you have read this.

title: SEO Specialist (Reddit & Quora)

You will focus on community-driven marketing, creating valuable contributions that naturally promote our brand while aligning with search engine optimization best practices.



Need the employee who can work 9 AM - 6 PM EST.



Off-Page SEO Responsibilities:

Generate high-quality referral traffic via contextual linking and discussions

Build brand authority through consistent, value-driven participation in niche communities

Identify backlink opportunities through relevant threads and answers

Use targeted keywords naturally within responses to support SEO goals

Monitor brand mentions and manage online reputation

Analyze off-page performance metrics such as backlinks, referral traffic, and engagement

Stay updated with platform algorithms and SEO trends to maximize impact

title: VSL Video Editor - Skincare Brand
description:
Summary

We are a rapidly expanding direct-to-consumer (D2C) beauty brand on a mission to help 1 million people achieve healthier, more radiant skin with our premium, science-backed skincare. Our in-house marketing team is one of the most efficient and innovative in the D2C space and we’re looking for a results-oriented Video Editor to help us scale even faster by producing impactful, high-converting ad creatives.

If you thrive in a dynamic environment, love blending storytelling with data, and get excited about creating video ads that directly drive sales, this could be the role for you.



Purpose of the Role

This position is all about turning creative concepts into scroll-stopping, performance-driven video ads for Meta platforms. You won’t just be piecing together footage — you’ll be creating assets that help us grow profitably, reach millions of customers, and make a genuine difference in how people feel about their skin. You’ll work within a fast-moving, highly collaborative remote team that values speed, initiative, and measurable results.



Key Responsibilities

- Edit short-form, conversion-focused video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

- Produce multiple variations of each concept for A/B testing

- Transform UGC, product shots, and testimonials into engaging ad creatives

- Source on-trend B-roll and UGC from TikTok, YouTube, and other relevant platforms

- Enhance videos with captions, animations, and AI-powered tools (voiceovers, avatars) when relevant

- Keep up to date with trends on TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts — especially in the beauty niche

- Continuously optimize creatives based on ad performance and team feedback





What We’re Looking For

- 1–2+ years editing performance ads for e-commerce (beauty experience is a bonus)

- Strong skills in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar software

- Experience adding light animation or motion graphics

- Solid understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

- Familiar with Meta Ads, UGC ad styles, and
 Ad Library research

- Able to source high-quality clips and content from TikTok, YouTube, and stock platforms

- Organized and comfortable using project management tools like ClickUp

- Reliable workstation, strong internet connection, and efficient file management habits





This Role Won’t Suit You If You:

- Care only about aesthetics and not ad performance

- Need constant guidance and struggle with self-management

- Have no interest in analyzing or improving results based on metrics

- Lack a reliable work setup or juggle too many other commitments

- Can’t adapt quickly to feedback and fast-paced changes

- Only have experience editing social videos for influencers or personal brands





Why You’ll Love Working With Us

- Join a high-performing international team that moves fast and collaborates openly

- Have genuine creative ownership with a clear link to business growth

- Work in a flat, feedback-driven environment without unnecessary bureaucracy

- Enjoy free and discounted skincare products

- Be part of a brand on track to lead its category

- Create content that inspires confidence and improves people’s lives





Ready to Apply?

h t t p s : / / j o b s . a d e l i r a . n l / v i d e o - e d i t o r (remove spaces



Complete the short Typeform (it only takes 5 minutes) — you’ll hear from us within 5 days. We don’t review private messages.

title: Customer Service Representative - E-commerce (Skincare Brand)
description:
We're hiring an experienced e-commerce customer service rep for Adelira - a premium skincare brand for women 50+ selling in the Netherlands and Belgium.



You'll take full ownership of customer support using Commslayer (our helpdesk), Shopify, and ClickUp.





WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Process
 tickets: shipping questions, product inquiries, order issues, complaints

- Handle Instagram and
 
 and comments through the helpdesk

- Look up orders in Shopify: verify status, check tracking, confirm fulfillment

- Prioritize tickets by urgency using our workflow

- Use saved replies and macros for brand-safe communication

- Handle refund requests using our retention-first process

- Escalate complex cases to management via ClickUp

- End-of-day handover: clear queue, update tasks, summarize open items





MUST-HAVES

- Previous customer service experience for an e-commerce brand (non-negotiable)

- Comfortable working in Shopify: order lookup, fulfillment, tracking

- Experience working for Netherlands or Belgium-based e-commerce stores

- You know how PostNL, DHL, and DPD tracking works

- Good written English (we use AI translation for Dutch customer communication)

- Experience with a helpdesk tool (Commslayer, Gorgias, Zendesk, Freshdesk, or similar)

- Work independently: manage your own queue without being micromanaged

- Empathetic, calm communication style (our audience is women 50+)

- Reliable: stick to agreed hours, don't leave tickets hanging

- Comfortable following SOPs and using templates





BONUS POINTS

- Background in skincare, beauty, or health e-commerce

- Experience handling social media DMs through a helpdesk

- Refund management and de-escalation experience

- ClickUp experience

- Understanding of the 50+ female demographic





WHAT YOU GET

- Fully remote

- Clear SOPs, templates, and escalation workflows ready for you

- Free SkinFuse products so you know what you're supporting

- Growth potential: start part-time, grow with the brand

- Flexible hours: we agree on a schedule that works for both sides





HOW TO APPLY

Apply through our application page: 


 (copy and remove spaces)

No formal CV needed. Just be honest and specific about your experience.

title: Accounts Receivable Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY — PLEASE READ BEFORE PROCEEDING



Applications are processed ONLY through our official application form:





DO NOT send your application through OnlineJobs.ph messages,
, or any other channel. Those will not be reviewed.

If you did not complete the form, you are not in the application process — regardless of how you reached out. Only candidates who submit the form will be contacted for evaluation.



WORK SETUP: Remote / Work from Home

SCHEDULE: Recurring weekly deadlines (Tuesday, Friday, Saturday)

REPORTS TO: Finance Supervisor / Finance Lead



ABOUT THE ROLE

Brands Capital Group is looking for a detail-oriented Accounts Receivable Specialist to join our Finance team. You will own the full receivables cycle — from issuing client invoices and recording incoming payments to monitoring outstanding balances and producing recurring financial reports across multiple client accounts.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Issue and distribute daily client invoices via Slack; upload all supporting files to the company drive

Maintain the Sendex Customer Balances Sheet (EUR, USD, GBP)

Log into Payoneer to record incoming payments and reconcile them against outstanding invoices

Send payment acknowledgment messages to clients using approved French-language templates

Process custom invoice requests submitted through Airtable

Monitor account balances and proactively issue payment reminders via Slack; escalate overdue accounts as needed

Send End-of-Week balance updates every Saturday

Prepare and send the Payoneer & Client Summary Report every Tuesday and Friday

Maintain individual client balance sheets with correct tab color-coding

Onboard new clients into the billing system using approved French-language templates





REQUIREMENTS

Proven experience in accounts receivable, billing, or a closely related finance role

Exceptional attention to detail and a high standard of numerical accuracy

Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel (formulas, multi-tab workbooks)

Familiarity with Payoneer or similar payment platforms is a strong advantage

Professional written communication in both English and French

Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

Comfortable using Slack as a primary day-to-day communication tool

title: Klarna & PayPal Dispute Expert
description:
We are an e-commerce company focused on providing excellent products to our customers, primarily through platforms like Klarna and PayPal. As our business continues to grow, we are seeking an experienced Klarna & PayPal Dispute Agent to join our team. You will play a key role in managing and resolving payment disputes efficiently to ensure a smooth customer experience.



Responsibilities:



•Review and manage Klarna and PayPal disputes in a timely and professional manner.

Investigate chargebacks and customer claims by analyzing transaction details, policies, and customer history.

Communicate with customers, Klarna, and PayPal to resolve disputes, ensuring compliance with company policies.

Prepare and submit documentation to Klarna and PayPal to defend chargeback cases.

Track the status of ongoing disputes and keep relevant records up to date.

Ensure that customer queries related to payment disputes are resolved to maintain customer satisfaction.

Provide clear and concise reports on dispute resolutions and outcomes.

Suggest improvements in internal dispute handling procedures based on experience.

Skills & Qualifications:



Proven experience in handling Klarna and PayPal disputes, chargebacks, and refunds.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce transaction systems and policies for Klarna, PayPal, and other payment processors.

Excellent communication skills with the ability to handle sensitive situations empathetically.

Ability to analyze transaction data and identify patterns in disputes.

Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills to manage multiple disputes concurrently.

Proficient in using dispute resolution tools and platforms (Shopify, Freshdesk, PayPal, Klarna dispute portals, etc.).

Problem-solving mindset, capable of identifying issues and providing effective resolutions.

Strong knowledge of e-commerce and consumer protection laws.

A background in customer service is highly beneficial.

Preferred Experience:



Experience working in a fast-paced e-commerce environment.

Familiarity with dispute resolution strategies to minimize chargeback rates and protect business revenue.

Multilingual capabilities are a plus (particularly Dutch, English, and German).





What We Offer:



Flexible working hours with the possibility of remote work.

A dynamic and growing company with opportunities for advancement.

A supportive and friendly work environment.





If you are a proactive, detail-oriented individual with expertise in managing Klarna and PayPal disputes, we would love to hear from you! Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience with payment disputes.

title: Customer Support Specialist

title: Operations Assistant – Website & Content Administration (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a reliable Operations Assistant to support the day-to-day systems of a growing website-based business.



This role focuses heavily on administration, organisation, and completing tasks carefully. The majority of the work involves managing website content, organising files, and maintaining operational processes.



This is not a creative marketing role. It is best suited to someone who enjoys structured work, checklists, and making sure details are correct.



You will work closely with our operations coordinator who manages the workflow and assigns tasks.



---



Key Responsibilities



Website Content Administration  

• Upload and format articles in WordPress  

• Insert and check internal and external links  

• Upload images and ensure formatting is correct  

• Prepare posts for publishing



Content Scheduling  

• Write short titles and descriptions for posts  

• Schedule content using online tools  

• Check that links and images are working correctly



Administrative Organisation  

• Organise files in OneDrive and Dropbox  

• Maintain spreadsheets and tracking systems  

• Perform data entry and operational tasks  

• Assist with maintaining digital workflows



Quality Checks  

• Review content before publishing to ensure links, formatting, and images are correct  

• Follow checklists carefully to avoid mistakes  

• Flag anything unusual or unclear



---



This Role Is Best For Someone Who:



• enjoys organised and structured work

title: Senior Funnel Builder (Team lead position)
description:
We’re a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the health and beauty niche, currently scaling across multiple markets. Our team consists of 15 experienced professionals working with stable workflows, clearly documented SOPs, and a consistent stream of high-quality projects. 



We’re not looking for beginners. We’re looking for someone who’s already built high-converting funnels and is ready to take ownership—from strategy to execution. 



As Funnel Builders Team Lead, you'll be responsible for:

- Reviewing, optimizing, and publishing Funnelish + Shopify funnels

- Managing internal funnel builders (currently 2–3 part-time builders)

- Setting up daily SOPs, checklists, and QA systems to eliminate errors

- Ensuring every funnel is ready for launch from both technical and CRO perspectives

- Acting as the last line of defense before a funnel goes live

- Owning funnel KPIs (launch speed, conversion rate, error rate)

- Regular review of active winning funnels and improving CR of it.

- Scaling winners with custom advertorials, increasing AOV .



What You Need:

- 1–2 years experience in funnel building (Shopify + Funnelish)

- Sharp eye for detail, QA, and conversion optimization

- Fluent English, clear communicator, and fast executor

- Comfortable managing a small team and giving feedback

- Strong experience with chatGPT and Direct Response copywriting, custom advertorials.

- marketing knowledge (CRO, increasing AOV, a/b tests )

- experience with Klaviyo. 



Questions:

1. Share an example of funnels with advertorial you have built.

2. What do u think is crucial in a funnel for becoming a winner?

3. Have u managed the team before? Did you build any processes? Elaborate pls.

4. How did you optimized winners for better CR?

5. Have you written an advertorial from scratch? (not just translated, share example)

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Technical Customer Support
description:
Role title. Technical Customer Support.



Role summary.

You will provide technical support for FibreMax business voice and internet services, with a strong focus on VoIP and Australian NBN environments. You will own tickets end to end, keep customers updated, and work with suppliers to resolve faults.



What you will do.



1. Respond to support requests promptly, diagnose issues, and communicate the next steps clearly.

2. Troubleshoot VoIP issues, including registration, call routing, one way audio, call quality, and device setup.

3. Support NBN connectivity basics, including router setup, WiFi troubleshooting, and LAN configuration.

4. Provision and change services, extensions, numbers, call flows, IVR menus, queues, voi
 to
, and after hours routing.

5. Manage number porting tasks and service transfers, including checking forms and required details.

6. Escalate to suppliers with good diagnostics, follow up until resolved, confirm fixes with customers.

7. Keep accurate ticket notes, update documentation, improve runbooks and FAQs.



Must have skills and experience.



1. Australian telco experience is essential. 

2. Experience in VoIP, ISP, PBX, or technical customer support.

3. Solid understanding of SIP basics, NAT, codecs, DIDs, and common PBX features.

4. Basic networking knowledge, IP addressing, DHCP, DNS, WiFi, and routers.

5. Clear written and verbal communication, strong attention to detail, calm under pressure.

6. Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and take full ownership of outcomes.



Nice to have.



1. Familiarity with Australian NBN processes and supplier fault handling.

2. Experience with PBX administration and handset support, Grandstream, Yealink, softphones.

3. Comfort reading logs, using portals, and working across multiple systems.



Work requirements.

Remote full time role aligned to AWST. Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and a USB noise cancelling headset.



Performance expectations.

Fast acknowledgement during rostered hours, high quality escalation notes, accurate provisioning, low ticket reopen rates, and regular documentation improvements.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (Mini VSLs) – Long-Term Position – $700/month
description:
Full-Time Video Editor (Mini VSLs) – Long-Term Position – $700/month



We are looking for a full-time video editor to join our growing team. This is a long-term opportunity for someone reliable, fast, and committed to producing high-quality video ads and mini VSLs.



Important: This is a full-time position only. We do not accept freelancers working multiple jobs. We need someone fully focused on our company.



Position Overview



You will be editing mini VSL videos (3–5 minutes) used for online marketing campaigns. These videos include:



-AI spokesperson videos

-AI-generated B-roll

-UGC-style footage

-Motion graphics and captions



On average, you will be expected to produce 2.5–3 minutes of finished video per day.



We provide SOPs, detailed training, and step-by-step video tutorials explaining our entire workflow.



Tools & Workflow



We provide access to all required tools, including:



-AI spokesperson tools

-AI B-roll generators

-Envato Elements

-Canva

-Other AI video tools



You will only need to provide your own video editing software (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Final Cut, etc.).



Our workflow is organized through:



-Trello (task management)

-Slack (daily communication)



Languages & Markets



We create videos for multiple markets, including:



-United States

-Germany



You do not need to speak these languages. We provide English transcripts for all videos so you can follow the structure easily.



Responsibilities



-Edit mini VSL videos (3–5 minutes)

-Generate AI spokesperson videos

-Create AI B-roll footage

-Source UGC-style clips from TikTok and other platforms

-Add captions, transitions, and engaging visual elements

As you take on more responsibility, you will also have the chance to grow financially and develop into additional positions. Please add 'push boundaries' as your last word in your application.

title: Senior QuickBooks Bookkeeper / Financial Controller (Construction Industry Preferred)
description:
< READ>

???? Job Overview

JAC Dreamscapes is a growing outdoor living design-build company based in the East Bay, California.

We are looking for a highly experienced QuickBooks expert who can take full ownership of our bookkeeping and financial organization.

This is NOT a data-entry role.

We need someone who:

Has years of real bookkeeping/accounting experience

Understands construction job costing

Can build clean financial systems from scratch

Can take initiative and lead

Can teach and guide the owner on financial clarity

We currently do not have structured bookkeeping in place. You will help build it properly.

???? Responsibilities

You will:

• Set up and organize QuickBooks Online properly

• Clean up and structure chart of accounts

• Categorize and reconcile past transactions

• Create job costing structure for construction projects

• Track revenue, cost of goods, materials, labor, and overhead

• Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards monthly

• Create monthly Profit & Loss reports

• Create cash flow tracking system

• Build financial dashboards in Google Sheets

• Track project profitability per job

• Create budget forecasting spreadsheets

• Monitor accounts payable and receivable

• Ensure sales tax tracking accuracy

• Prepare reports for CPA when needed

• Educate the owner on financial health metrics

You must be able to take initiative and recommend improvements.

???? Required Experience

• 3+ years QuickBooks Online experience (Required)

• Strong understanding of bookkeeping & accounting principles

• Construction / job costing experience strongly preferred

• Experience building financial systems from scratch

• Advanced Google Sheets skills (formulas, dashboards, tracking)

• Strong reconciliation experience

• Ability to explain financial reports clearly

???? We Are NOT Looking For

• Beginner bookkeepers

• Data entry clerks

• Someone who needs to be micromanaged

• Someone who just categorizes transactions

We need leadership in this role.

???? Ideal Candidate

You are:

• Detail-oriented

• Organized

• Confident in your accounting knowledge

• Comfortable correcting mistakes

• Comfortable taking control of financial systems

• Proactive in identifying problems

• Able to build clean, simple reporting systems

Bonus if you:

• Have worked with US-based construction companies

• Understand job costing deeply

• Have worked with companies doing $500K–$5M annually

???? Work Setup

• Part-time to start (10–20 hours/week)

• Long-term opportunity

• Must overlap with PST time zone at least 2–3 hours daily

• Must communicate clearly in English

???? How to Apply

Please include:

Your years of QuickBooks experience

Your experience with construction/job costing

A description of a bookkeeping system you built or cleaned up

What financial reports you believe are most important for a construction company

The word “Dreamscapes” at the top of your application

???? Final Note

We are building this company into a multi-million dollar operation.

We need financial clarity and structure.

If you are confident in your ability to take ownership of accounting systems and bring order to financial chaos — we want to hear from you.

?

?

?

?



Important



Accuracy is extremely important. All work will be reviewed before final submission.



We are looking for someone who is:

• Reliable

?



How to Apply

title: Digital Advertising Specialist| Remote | Flexible Hours | High-Impact Work
description:
Digital Advertising Specialist: 100% Remote, Flexible Hours, Global Team, Global Impact



WHO WE ARE:



We’re Trialfacts. We connect patients to clinical trials, helping research teams enroll participants faster and more effectively. Our work supports leading organizations like AstraZeneca, Harvard, and Stanford—and ultimately contributes to advancing global health. We’re a fully remote, entrepreneurial team that values ownership, flexibility, and meaningful impact.



YOUR JOB:



As a Digital Advertising Specialist, you will own the performance and optimization of our paid advertising campaigns, directly contributing to patient enrollment across clinical trials.



This is not a set-and-forget role. You’ll continuously analyze, optimize, and refine campaigns to drive measurable results.



You’ll primarily work within Meta 
/Instagram), while also leveraging other platforms such as Google, TikTok, Craigslist, or programmatic channels where relevant.



You’ll collaborate cross-functionally with Client Success, Tech, and Recruitment to ensure campaigns are aligned with study goals and continuously improving performance.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



-Developing and executing high-performing paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms

-Monitoring performance and making data-driven optimizations to improve ROI

-Analyzing campaign data to identify trends, insights, and opportunities

-Managing budgets effectively to maximize results

-Optimizing middle-of-funnel performance (landing pages, forms, and conversion flows)

-Staying up to date with platform changes, trends, and best practices

-Collaborating with internal teams to ensure alignment with campaign and study objectives



SUPPORT THAT HELPS YOU THRIVE:



Competitive pay – Stable monthly pay

Unlimited PTO you’ll actually use – Take paid leave whenever you choose

Real flexibility – Work from anywhere and set your schedule, with reasonable overlap for collaboration

Paid learning and growth – We invest in your development through courses, tools, and training

Meaningful work – Contribute to advancing medical research and improving lives through better patient recruitment



YOU’RE A STRONG FIT IF YOU BRING:



Paid Advertising Expertise – Proven experience managing and optimizing paid campaigns, with strong Meta 
/Instagram) performance skills; experience with other platforms is a plus

Performance-Driven Mindset – You focus on outcomes, continuously test and iterate, and take ownership of results

Analytical Strength – You’re comfortable working with data, identifying patterns, and making informed optimization decisions

Middle-of-Funnel Optimization Skills – Experience improving landing pages, forms, and conversion flows to increase performance

Proactive Ownership – You don’t wait for direction—you identify opportunities and act on them

Clear Communication – You can explain performance, insights, and decisions clearly to cross-functional teams

Collaboration in Remote Teams – You work effectively across functions in a distributed, global environment

Mission Alignment – You’re motivated by contributing to meaningful work in health and medical research

Bonus: Experience in healthcare, clinical trials, or regulated industries



READY TO JOIN US?



If this role feels like the right fit, we’d love to hear from you. Apply here:

title: Product Lister (Shopify)
description:
???? Product Lister – Shopify eCommerce (Home Decor | Fashion)



???? $0.50 per product listed (raises depending on position, quality and time with us)

? Full-Time | Remote | Flexible Hours

???? Growth opportunity into Product Manager role



---



ABOUT US



We are a fast-growing eCommerce company running multiple Shopify stores across the US and UK markets in home decor, lighting, and fashion. We are in a big growth phase this year — expanding into new stores, new niches, and new markets — and we are building the team that is going to make that happen.



We take our team seriously. Everyone we hire is someone we want to grow with long term. We are not looking to fill a seat. We are looking for the right people who want to be part of something that is genuinely scaling and want to grow with it.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



This is a product listing role on our Shopify stores. The job itself is straightforward — we have a step-by-step SOP and a custom AI-powered tool we built in-house that does all the heavy lifting for you. It generates the titles, descriptions, and SEO content automatically. Your job is to follow the process correctly, apply everything in Shopify, and make sure every product is up to our standard before it goes live.



Our current worload is 30-40 products uploaded every 3 days. This can increase or decrease depending on which store you work on.



We will be honest with you: this role does not require advanced skills. What it requires is someone who actually cares about doing it right. The process is laid out for you. There are no excuses for cutting corners.



This is one of our most important roles because it requires extra attention to detail as that is what is needed for these niches. We only market on Google which is why we are constantly adding new products that perform well seasonally.



You will start on our Home Decor USA store and expand to more stores as you get comfortable and we review your work.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Use our custom AI tool to generate product titles, descriptions, SEO meta titles and meta descriptions

• Paste and format generated content correctly in Shopify

• Follow our pricing SOP — rounding prices and setting compare-at prices correctly

• Clean up product images following our image guidelines

• Work closely with our Image Generator employee to coordiante correct images and any revisions needed from both sides.

• Set vendor, categories, collections, URL slugs and metafields correctly in Shopify

• Complete a compliance checklist before publishing every product

• Track your daily output and maintain consistent volume



---



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This is the most important part. Read it carefully.



The job is simple. That means the only thing that will set you apart is your attitude and work ethic. We need someone who:



• Goes above and beyond without being asked — you notice something is off and you fix it, you do not wait to be told

• Takes pride in their work even when the task is repetitive — every product that goes live represents our brand

• Is reliable every single day — not just the first week

• Follows instructions precisely — our SOP exists for a reason and we expect it to be followed exactly

• Is proactive — if you spot a problem, you flag it. If you finish early, you ask what is next

• Wants to grow — this role is a starting point, not a ceiling



If you are looking for easy money to do the bare minimum, this is not the right team for you. If you are someone who genuinely takes ownership of their work and wants to grow inside a company that is scaling fast, we want to hear from you.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



• $0.50 per product listed — with our AI app tool the process is fast and efficient, allowing you to build strong daily volume

• Full-time remote work — work from home, flexible hours

• Full training and SOP provided — you will know exactly what to do from day one

• A real team culture — we communicate openly, support each other, and move fast

• Clear growth path: strong performers will be promoted to Product Manager, responsible for training new listers and overseeing quality across all our stores

• Long-term stability with a company that is actively expanding — you will not be stuck doing the same thing forever



---



GROWTH PATH



We are building a team this year that we intend to keep and grow. The person who does this role well will become our Product Manager — the person who owns the listing process, sets the standard, trains new hires, and grows with the business as we scale into more stores and markets. We have done this with other roles in our company and we are serious about it.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send us:

1. A short introduction — who you are and why this role is a good fit for you

2. Your experience with Shopify or eCommerce (even basic experience is fine)

3. Your availability and timezone

4. Any examples of previous listing, data entry, or admin work



One last thing: in the first line of your application, write the word DETAIL. We do this to see who actually reads the full job post. Applications that do not include this will not be reviewed.

title: Music Fulfillment Specialist (Full-Time, Full Remote)
description:
Role: Music Fulfillment Specialist (Music & Playlist Curation)

Location: Remote

Schedule: Full-Time | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EDT (Toronto, Canada Time) 



Role Overview



We’re looking for someone with a strong foundation in music. Not just as a listener, but with real understanding of how music works across production, culture, and the business side of the industry.



As a Fulfillment Specialist, you’ll be responsible for executing music promotion campaigns by placing songs into the right environments. This requires more than basic genre knowledge. You should understand how a track is made, where it fits culturally, and how it can perform in a promotional setting.



A key part of this role is the ability to critically evaluate music, to confidently determine whether a track is strong, average, or below standard, and adjust placement decisions accordingly. This judgment plays a direct role in maintaining the overall quality of campaigns.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Execute music promotion campaigns with accuracy and consistency

- Analyze tracks based on sound, production quality, and overall vibe

- Identify the right genre, subgenre, and audience for each song

- Evaluate and rate music quality to guide placement decisions

- Place songs in environments where they make sense both creatively and commercially

- Manage campaigns while maintaining organization and attention to detail

- Adjust or improve campaigns when needed

- Collaborate with the team to ensure smooth and consistent execution



What We’re Looking For

- Background in music production, audio, or business

- Strong understanding of music culture, scenes, and evolving trends

- Awareness of the music business (promotion, audience targeting, growth strategies)

- Ability to critically assess and rate music quality with confidence

- Strong ear for detail (mixing, arrangement, originality, overall execution)

- Good taste and instinct when it comes to placement decisions

- Detail-oriented, reliable, and consistent in execution



Performance Expectations

- Quality with quantity: placements should be intentional and make sense for the track

- Maintain a consistent and reliable workflow

- Apply both creative judgment and strategic thinking in decisions

- Use music quality assessment to guide placement levels and expectations

- Give additional attention to higher-value or long-term campaigns

- Deliver accurate work with minimal errors



How Success Is Measured

- Strength and relevance of placements

- Consistency in meeting turnaround expectations

- Ability to accurately judge and rate music quality

- Reliability and attention to detail

- Contribution to an organized and effective workflow



Tools & Workflow

- Internal campaign and fulfillment platforms

- Streaming platforms for music review

- Tracking systems and internal documentation tools

- Team communication platforms



Success in This Role Looks Like

- You can quickly determine if a track is high-quality, average, or needs improvement

- Your placements reflect both taste and informed judgment

- You consistently deliver quality work across all campaigns

- You bring insight from music production, culture, and business into your decisions

- You become a trusted voice in evaluating and executing campaigns



Who This Is Perfect For

title: Social Media Outreach VA for Publisher & Book Launch Networking
description:
We are looking for a skilled and dependable Social Media Outreach VA to help grow a free Messenger-based community for professionals involved in book launches. Experienced applicants are encouraged to apply.



This role is for someone who is strong at:



natural outreach

relationship-building

identifying the right people

starting real conversations that lead to action



This is not a mass messaging job.

This is not a copy-paste spam job.

This is not a one-message close job.



This role is specifically about book launches for authors and publishers. It is not about software launches, webinar launches, product launches, or internet marketing funnels.



WHAT THE GROUP IS



This is not just a general networking group.



It is a free Messenger-based mutual-support group for publishers, launch marketers, promo admins, launch team organizers, and similar professionals involved in the book launch ecosystem.



The main purpose is simple:



Members can share launch-day book campaigns and support other members’ launches by buying books on launch day, with the expectation of mutual support in return.



So the value is not random conversation. The value is being part of a focused group of people who understand book launches and participate in reciprocal launch-day support.



This role is not about inviting random people. It is about finding people in the book launch ecosystem who understand and value that kind of support.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You will:



find qualified people on
 and similar platforms

reach out to publishers, launch marketers, promo admins, launch team organizers, and similar professionals

start natural conversations with them

determine whether they are a fit

introduce qualified people to the group

log qualified invites in a shared tracker

communicate clearly if you have a question, issue, or blocker



WHAT MATTERS MOST



This role is results-based.



The main goal is qualified people actually joining the group.



We are not mainly measuring:



number of messages sent

number of people contacted

generic lead generation claims

activity without results



We care most about:



good judgment

strong communication

consistency

natural outreach

actual outcomes



IDEAL CANDIDATE



You may be a strong fit if you:



write English clearly and naturally

are confident starting conversations online

know how to build rapport without sounding scripted

can follow instructions carefully

understand the difference between quality and quantity

are coachable and dependable

ask good questions when needed instead of guessing

want a role where performance and trust matter



Experience in publishing or book launches is a plus, but not required.



WE OFFER



Weekly pay

Paid trial period

Opportunity for ongoing work if the fit is strong

Clear expectations

Direct communication

Honest and fair working relationship

Room to grow if you perform well

A role where results matter more than empty activity

A chance to work with a business owner who values communication, reliability, and long-term fit



IMPORTANT APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To show that you read this post carefully, put the phrase quiet blue rocket in the subject line of your application.



Keep your application under 150 words.



In your application, include:



One sentence explaining the main purpose of this group

One short first message you would send to a publisher, launch marketer, or promo admin

One sentence explaining why you believe you fit this role



Do not use AI to generate a generic application for this role. I review applications carefully for fit, specificity, and real understanding of the work. Generic, overly polished, or off-target responses will not move forward.



Shortlisted applicants may be invited to a short text-based screening step before trial.



TO APPLY



Apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions above carefully.



We are looking for someone who wants more than just a job. We want someone who wants to do good work, communicate well, and be part of something that can grow over time.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Intermediate Cloud Accountant
description:
Join the Team as a Senior Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+ years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Social Media Manager (Instagram & TikTok) for Ace & Taylor
description:
Ace & Taylor is a fast-growing D2C e-commerce brand selling premium hair tools across Europe. We focus on high-performing short-form video content and daily organic posting on Instagram and TikTok to grow brand awareness, trust, and sales.



We are currently active in The Netherlands and Belgium and expanding across Europe.



What You’ll Do (Your Core Responsibility)

You will fully own our organic social media presence on Instagram and TikTok.

This means you are responsible for planning, posting, captions, stories, community management (DMs & comments), and daily execution.



This is NOT just scheduling content.

We are looking for someone who can run our social media channels independently and consistently.



Your Weekly Tasks

- Post 1–2 times per day on Instagram & TikTok

- Create strong captions & CTAs (engaging, on-brand, conversion-focused)

- Post daily stories (product usage, UGC, behind the scenes, promos)

- Reply to DMs & comments within 24 hours

- Plan and manage the content calendar

- Repurpose existing videos into social posts

- Coordinate with video editors & creative team

- Track basic performance (views, engagement) and report weekly



We Are Looking For Someone Who

- Has proven experience managing Instagram & TikTok for brands

- Understands short-form content and social media trends

- Can work independently without daily hand-holding

- Is proactive: asks questions if something is unclear

- Is highly organized and consistent with daily posting

- Understands brand tone and can adapt copy per platform



Important (Read Carefully – This Filters Out 90% of Bad Applicants)

We post daily. This role requires consistency and ownership.

If you:

- Miss posting deadlines

- Are inconsistent

- Don’t reply to DMs/comments on time

- Don’t ask questions when confused

- Or treat this as “just scheduling posts”



This will clearly not be a fit.

title: Experienced Fullstack Developer
