title: Product Image Generator
description:
????? AI Product Image Generator – Shopify eCommerce (Home Decor)



???? $1.50 per product

? Full-Time | Remote | Flexible Hours

???? Growth opportunity into Image & Creative Manager role



---



ABOUT US



We are a fast-growing eCommerce company running multiple Shopify stores across the US and UK markets in home decor, lighting, and fashion. We are in a major growth phase this year — uploading 30-40 products every 2-3 days — and we need a talented image generator who can keep up with that pace and grow with us.



We take our team seriously. We are not looking to fill a seat. We are building the right team of reliable, skilled people who want to grow inside a company that is genuinely scaling fast.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



You will be responsible for generating high-quality, realistic lifestyle and product images for our home decor and lighting store using AI image generation tools. Our products are imported and the product lister handles the copy — your job is to make each product look stunning, realistic, and ready to sell on Google Ads.



You will work closely and coordinate directly with our product lister. When they finish listing a batch of products, you need to have the images ready so products can go live without delays. Speed and consistency are just as important as quality.



This is not a role for someone who produces generic, obviously fake AI images. Our customers and ads demand realism. Every image needs to look like it belongs in a real home.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Generate realistic AI lifestyle images for home decor and lighting products following our image SOP (provided on hire)

• Place products into styled, realistic home settings that match the US market aesthetic

• Deliver the correct number of images per product and variant as specified in our SOP

• Ensure all images meet our quality standards — clean, professional, no fake or plastic-looking AI artifacts

• Upload completed images into Shopify in the correct order and format

• Coordinate with the product lister to ensure batches are completed on time

• Deliver 30-40 products worth of images within 1-2 days per batch



---



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This is the most important part. Read carefully.



We have worked with image generators before who were slow, needed constant revision requests, and could not keep up with our upload schedule. We are done with that. We need someone who:



• Produces clean, realistic images on the first attempt — not someone who needs 3 rounds of revisions per product

• Is fast and reliable — 30-40 products in 1-2 days is the expectation, every batch. We need this because we currently are uploading 30-40 products every 2-3 days.

• Has strong AI prompting skills — you know how to get realistic, non-fake results from your tools

• Takes initiative — you follow the SOP but you also have an eye for what looks good and will flag anything that does not

• Communicates proactively — if something is taking longer than expected, you say so in advance, not after the deadline

• Goes above and beyond — you treat every product image like it is going on your own store



If you are someone who does the bare minimum, needs constant hand-holding, or cannot hit a consistent deadline, this is not the right team for you.



---



TOOLS



We are open to whichever AI generation tools you work best with — Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, Leonardo AI, or others. What matters is the end result: realistic, high-quality images that do not look AI-generated. If you use Photoshop or compositing alongside AI tools, even better.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



• $1.50 per product — at 30-40 products per batch every 2-3 days, this adds up to strong consistent earnings

• Full-time remote work — work from home, flexible hours

• Clear SOP and guidelines provided — you will know exactly what is expected for every product

• Real growth path: top performers will move into an Image & Creative Manager role, overseeing image quality and output across all our stores as we expand

• Long-term role with a company actively growing into new niches and markets this year



---



GROWTH PATH



We are building a team in 2026 that we intend to keep and promote. The right person in this role will eventually become our Image & Creative Manager — the person who sets the visual standard for all our stores, manages other image generators, and grows with the business as we scale. We have done this with other roles in our company and we mean it.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send us:

1. A short introduction — who you are, what tools you use, and why you are the right fit

2. Examples of previous AI-generated product or lifestyle images you have created

3. Your availability and timezone

4. A TEST IMAGE — this is required. Generate 2-3 realistic lifestyle scene using a lighting product and include it in your application. This is how we separate serious applicants from everyone else. Applications without a test image will not be reviewed.



One last thing: in the first line of your application, write the word REALISM. Applications that do not include this will not be reviewed.

title: Claude AI Expert for Ad Research & High-Converting Recruiting Ads (Life Insurance Niche)

title: Meta Creative Designer – Fashion Ad Creatives (UK Women's Fashion | Dropshipping)
description:
About the role

We are looking for an experienced creative designer to join our team on a full-time basis. Your primary responsibility will be producing high-converting ad creatives for test products in the UK women's fashion market. This is a production-focused role: you will deliver 6 to 8 product creatives per day, working efficiently while maintaining quality.



What you will be doing



Creating product ad creatives daily, including single images, carousels, and collages (2, 3, or 4 photos)

Maintaining a smart balance between creative formats, with a strategic approach to what works best for each product

Keeping creatives clean, simple, and optimised for paid social performance

Using AI tools as part of your daily workflow to speed up production and enhance output quality

Analysing and taking ownership of ad performance metrics — specifically CTR, CPM, and Unique CTR — and adjusting your creative strategy accordingly





What we are looking for

Experience is the single most important factor in our hiring decision. We are not looking for someone still learning — we want someone who has done this before and has the results to show for it.

Specifically, you must have:



Proven experience creating ad creatives for fashion dropshipping, ideally in the UK women's fashion niche

A strong portfolio showing creatives that have generated measurable ad performance (strong CTR, low CPM, high Unique CTR)

A personal creative strategy — not just execution skills, but a genuine understanding of why certain creatives perform and others don't

Hands-on experience with AI tools used in the design and creative production process

Proficiency in producing all three creative formats: single images, carousels, and multi-photo collages

The ability to work independently, manage your own daily output, and deliver consistently without micromanagement





What we value



Real, demonstrable experience over credentials or tool knowledge alone

A data-driven mindset — you understand that creatives are made to perform, not just to look nice

Consistency and reliability in hitting the daily output target

Creative range: knowing when a single clean product shot outperforms a collage, and vice versa





To apply

Please send your portfolio or examples of past work alongside a short introduction about your experience with fashion ad creatives, the UK market, and how you currently use AI in your workflow.

To confirm that you have read this job post in full, please include the word 'orange' in your application.

title: Architectural Document Controller / Admin (AU)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a boutique retail design practice seeking a detail-oriented project administrator to support our studio team across multiple concurrent commissions. You will be the operational backbone of project delivery, managing documentation, permits, consultant relationships, and day-to-day coordination so our designers can focus on the work.



LOCATION

AU

 

RESPONSIBILITIES

Permits & compliance

– Prepare and lodge building permit applications

– Liaise with local councils on approvals and queries

– Track permit status and flag critical dates

– Maintain compliance registers across active projects

Document control

– Manage drawing registers and revision histories

– Uphold project standards and naming conventions

– Distribute documentation to consultants and clients

– Archive project files at milestones and at close-out

– Manage material technical specification and information sheet

Consultant & team liaison

– Coordinate with structural, services, and other consultants

– Follow up on outstanding information and deliverables

– Provide day-to-day support to the project team leader

– Prepare and circulate meeting agendas and action items

Scheduling & administration

– Manage team calendars, tasks, and project deadlines

– Record and distribute meeting minutes via Fireflies

– Maintain project trackers in Procore or equivalent

– Prepare correspondence, reports, and studio documents

 



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

*please don't submit your resume if you're not confident you can handle the role.

 

– Demonstrated experience in a project administration or coordinator role, ideally within architecture, interior design, or a related built environment practice

– Working knowledge of building permit processes and local council submission requirements

– Proficient in Procore or a comparable project management platform

– Competent with Adobe InDesign and the broader Adobe Suite for document preparation and presentation formatting

– Strong written and verbal English communication skills; able to draft clear, professional correspondence independently

– Highly organised with a natural instinct for detail, document structure, and follow-through

– Comfortable managing multiple concurrent projects and adapting quickly as priorities shift

 

HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV and a brief cover note to

title: Amazon Operations Lead (Remote)
description:
COMPENSATION

$1,500–$2,000 USD/month (based on experience and capability)





ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a fast-growing eCommerce brand in the home décor space.



We are hiring a high-ownership Amazon Operations Manager to work directly with the founder as a right-hand operator.



Your role is to take over day-to-day operations and help grow the business. The goal is to reduce founder involvement and build a system that runs smoothly and scales.



This is not a task-based VA role. You are expected to think, identify problems, and take ownership of outcomes.



Over time, the expectation is that you can run operations independently and potentially manage a small team.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Inventory & Supply Chain



Ensure no stockouts on top SKUs

Manage demand planning and reorders

Coordinate with suppliers and freight forwarders

Maintain clean tracking of inventory



2. Amazon Account Management



Manage listings, variations, and backend issues

Handle cases and resolve account problems

Maintain account health and listing accuracy



3. PPC & Performance Monitoring



Monitor ad performance (TACOS, CVR, CPC)

Identify inefficiencies and improvement opportunities

Maintain overall account performance



4. Data & Reporting



Maintain accurate daily and monthly reporting

Track key KPIs

Highlight anomalies early



STRATEGIC RESPONSIBILITIES (HIGH IMPACT)



1. International Expansion



Launch products into new marketplaces (EU, UK, etc.)

Handle localization (listings, keywords, compliance)

Coordinate inventory and logistics

Monitor and optimize performance



2. Listing Optimization & Growth



Run structured A/B tests on images, titles, and content

Analyze conversion rate and performance changes

Work with designers to improve listings



3. Product Launch Support



Coordinate new product launches

Ensure listings, inventory, and ads are aligned

Track performance and iterate



4. Business Ownership



Identify problems without being told

Propose solutions and take action

Take ownership of outcomes



Systems & Process Improvement



Build SOPs

Reduce inefficiencies

Improve operational reliability



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



No stockouts on top products

Problems solved before escalation

Clean and accurate reporting

Continuous improvement in listings and ads

Reduced founder involvement



REQUIREMENTS



Experience with Amazon Seller Central

Strong attention to detail

High ownership mindset

Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

Good written English

Ability to work independently



STRONG PREFERENCE



Inventory planning and forecasting experience

Experience working with Chinese suppliers

Experience launching products or marketplaces

Strong analytical thinking

AI-Literate



NICE TO HAVE



Amazon PPC experience

Experience with off-Amazon growth (Shopify, Walmart, Meta, Google, TikTok)

Figma / Adobe / design experience

Familiarity with Helium 10



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT



Not a beginner VA role

Not a task executor role

Not short-term

Not a role where you wait for instructions



WHAT THIS ROLE IS



This is an ownership role.

You are not measured by hours worked, but by outcomes:



Inventory stays in stock

Problems are solved quickly

Performance improves over time

Conversion rate improves through testing



There is flexibility in how you work, but full responsibility for results is expected.



BENEFITS



13th month pay

10–15 days paid time off

Performance-based bonuses

Growth path into a management role



HOW TO APPLY



Submit the following:



Short introduction (3–5 sentences)

Brief description of your Amazon experience

Your expected monthly salary (USD)

Attach your CV / resume (or link)



Start your application with the word CLOCK at the beginning of your message.



Example:

CLOCK – your introduction



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.



SCREENING PROCESS



Shortlisted candidates will complete a practical test task.

Top candidates will proceed to interview.

title: SEO and Social Media Specialsit
description:
Job Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time

Department: Marketing

Reports To: Digital Marketing and Automation Manager

Shift: 9:00 AM - 5:30 PM

Direct Report(s):N/A

 

OVERVIEW

We believe that meaningful growth starts with strong digital visibility, authentic engagement, and brands that connect with their audience. We’re looking for an SEO & Social Media Specialist who can combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution to strengthen our online presence, drive organic growth, and build an engaged community across platforms.

If you’re passionate about SEO, content, and social media, enjoy turning insights into action, and thrive on delivering measurable results, this role is for you. If you’re ready to roll up your sleeves and make an impact, this role is for you.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES

Search Engine Optimization (SEO)

Develop and execute comprehensive SEO strategies to improve organic search rankings and drive qualified traffic to 
.

Conduct in-depth keyword research, competitive analysis, and technical SEO audits.

Optimize website content, landing pages, and blog posts for search engines, ensuring all content adheres to best practices.

Manage and monitor backlink profiles, and implement link-building strategies.

Monitor and report on SEO performance using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and other SEO platforms.

Social Media Management (SMM)

Create, curate, and manage all published content (images, video, written) across key social media platforms (e.g., LinkedIn,
, Instagram) to build brand awareness and generate leads.

Develop and implement a social media content calendar aligned with marketing goals and product launches.

Monitor, listen, and respond to users in a professional "social voice," fostering community engagement and cultivating sales leads.

Analyze social media campaign performance (reach, engagement, conversions) and provide actionable insights to optimize future efforts.

Content Strategy & Reporting

Collaborate with the marketing team to ensure all digital content is optimized for both search and social engagement.

Monitor SEO and user engagement metrics and suggest content optimization for improved performance. Stav up-to-date with the latest SEO and social media trends. tools. and best practices.



QUALIFICATIONS

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

2+ years of proven experience in managing both SEO and professional social media accounts.

Solid understanding of performance marketing, conversion, and online customer acquisition.

Proficiency with SEO tools (e.g., SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz) and web analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console).

Excellent writing, editing, presentation, and communication skills.



 

PREFERRED

Experience in the healthcare, medical supply, or B2B e-commerce industry.

Familiarity with content management systems (CMS) and basic HTML/CSS.

Certification in Google Analytics or other relevant digital marketing platforms.



KPI SCORECARD

CULTURE COMPETENCIES

To achieve or exceed individual monthly goals.

 

Eliminate Friction Everywhere

Every Client, Every time, Matters

Accountable for Excellence

Each person shapes the client experience

Teach, Learn, and Grow Together

Say Yes Before Saying No

Deliver Sustainable Growth



Why Join US?

Impact: Play a critical role in a company that is making healthcare supply more efficient and focused on patient care.

Growth: Be part of a growing company with opportunities for professional development and career advancement.

Culture: Work in a collaborative, mission-driven environment where innovation is encouraged.

Benefits: Competitive salary, comprehensive health benefits, and paid time off.

title: HR Generalist
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking an experienced HR Generalist with a strong healthcare background to support the full spectrum of Human Resources functions within a fast-growing healthcare organization.



The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience supporting healthcare teams such as providers, pharmacy staff, clinical support teams, and healthcare operations, while ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations, employment laws, and company policies.



This role will play a critical part in recruitment, employee relations, HR operations, performance management, and compliance while helping scale the organization’s workforce in a structured and compliant manner.



Key Responsibilities

1. Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

Manage the end-to-end recruitment process for healthcare roles including:

Pharmacists

Pharmacy Technicians

Nurses / Nurse Practitioners

Clinical staff

Healthcare administrative roles

Coordinate interviews with hiring managers and leadership teams.

Screen resumes and evaluate candidates with healthcare or clinical experience.

Support onboarding of new hires including documentation, compliance checks, and training coordination.



2. HR Operations & Administration

Maintain and update employee records, HRIS systems, and personnel files.

Assist in preparing offer letters, employment contracts, and onboarding documentation.

Ensure proper documentation for employee lifecycle management (hiring, promotion, termination, offboarding).

Track employee attendance, leaves, and HR compliance documentation.



3. Employee Relations

Act as a point of contact for employee concerns, HR inquiries, and workplace matters.

Support leadership in addressing employee performance issues, disciplinary actions, and conflict resolution.

Promote a positive workplace culture and employee engagement initiatives.



4. Compliance & Healthcare Regulations

Ensure compliance with healthcare industry regulations and labor laws.

Maintain knowledge of relevant compliance standards including:

HIPAA awareness

Healthcare employment regulations

Credential verification and licensing (if applicable)

Assist in HR audits and regulatory compliance checks.



5. Performance Management

Assist with performance review processes and KPI tracking.

Support managers in setting employee performance goals and improvement plans.

Help implement HR programs related to training, development, and career progression.



6. Training & Development

Coordinate employee onboarding and training programs.

Assist in developing training initiatives for healthcare teams.

Support learning and development initiatives aligned with organizational growth.



Qualifications

Education

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Healthcare Administration, Business Administration, or related field.



Experience

3+ years of HR experience, preferably within a healthcare organization.

Experience supporting recruitment for healthcare or clinical roles.

Familiarity with healthcare operations, medical terminology, or clinical environments is highly preferred.



Skills

Strong knowledge of HR best practices and employment laws.

Experience with HRIS systems (Zoho People, BambooHR, Workday, etc.).

Strong organizational and documentation skills.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to handle confidential information with integrity and professionalism.



Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with pharmacy, medical device, telehealth, or healthcare service organizations.

Knowledge of credential verification and licensing requirements for healthcare professionals.

HR certification (SHRM-CP, PHR) is a plus.



What We Offer

Competitive salary

Career growth opportunities

Collaborative and mission-driven work environment

title: Recruiter and Onboarding Specialist (with US Healthcare Experience)
description:
Join Our Team :)



About the Role:

We are seeking a dynamic and organized Recruiter and Onboarding Specialist to join our growing team. In this dual-function role, you will be responsible for sourcing and hiring top talent while ensuring new hires have a smooth and engaging onboarding experience. You’ll play a key role in shaping a positive candidate journey from first contact through their successful integration into the company.



Key Responsibilities:

Recruitment (Talent Acquisition)

Collaborate with hiring managers to understand job requirements and candidate profiles.

Write and post job descriptions on internal and external job boards.

Source candidates through databases, LinkedIn, job boards, and referrals.

Screen resumes and conduct initial interviews to assess qualifications and cultural fit.

Coordinate interview schedules and facilitate communication between candidates and hiring teams.

Maintain and update applicant tracking systems (e.g., Zoho Recruit, Greenhouse).

Manage the offer process, including negotiation and documentation.



Onboarding

Own the onboarding lifecycle from offer acceptance through Day 1 and beyond.

Prepare and send onboarding documents, equipment requests, and welcome kits.

Facilitate new hire orientation sessions and ensure timely completion of compliance documentation (e.g., I-9, W-4).

Coordinate with IT, Facilities, and other departments for system and workspace readiness.

Monitor and support employee integration during their first 30/60/90 days.

Solicit feedback from new hires to continuously improve the onboarding experience.



Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Psychology, Business, or related field preferred.

2+ years of experience in recruiting and/or onboarding with remote client EXPERIENCE

Familiarity with ATS and HRIS systems (e.g., Justworks, Zoho, BambooHR).

Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Detail-oriented with exceptional organizational and time management abilities.

Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

A passion for delivering an outstanding candidate and new hire experience.



Preferred Skills:

Experience recruiting in healthcare, tech, or a high-growth environment.

Knowledge of employment laws and onboarding best practices.

Comfortable working cross-functionally with hiring managers and HR teams.



Technology Requirement:

Minimum 80 mbps Internet Speed

Minimum intel i5 8th gen with 8GB of RAM

Webcam and Headset

Designated Office Space in your home



Perks of the Job:

Very competitive salary

Fully Remote WFH Setup

Paid Time Off 10 days

Opportunity for professional growth and development

A supportive and inclusive work environment where your voice is heard and your ideas are valued



Ready to Join the Team?

If you're ready to be the heartbeat of our HR department and make a meaningful impact on our organization, we want to hear from you! Send us your resume and tell us why you're the perfect fit for the role.

Don't miss your chance to be part of something extraordinary. Apply now and let's shape the future of HR together!

title: eCommerce Google Search Ads Expert
description:

title: 3D Visualizer (Retail & POSM)
description:
Job Summary:



We are seeking a skilled 3D Visualizer with experience in a creative or agency environment to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for translating design concepts into high-quality, realistic 3D visualizations for retail environments and Point of Sale Materials (POSM). You will work closely with designers and account managers to produce compelling visuals that effectively communicate design intent and meet client expectations.



Key Responsibilities:



-Create detailed 3D models using SketchUp and produce high-quality renders using Enscape.

-Develop visualizations for full retail store layouts, merchandising displays, and POSM units.

-Collaborate with Senior Interior Designers and Account Managers to ensure designs align with project requirements and client briefs.

-Ensure accuracy in textures, lighting, materials, and spatial proportions to achieve realistic and visually compelling results.

-Revise and refine visualizations based on feedback while maintaining project timelines.

-Maintain organized project files and adhere to internal design standards.



Requirements:



-Expert-level proficiency in SketchUp and Enscape.

-Proven experience working in a creative or design agency, preferably within retail design or brand activation.

-Strong attention to detail with the ability to deliver high-quality work under tight deadlines.

-Excellent communication and collaboration skills with a proactive and dependable work ethic.



A strong portfolio showcasing retail environments, store layouts, and detailed POSM or product displays is a MUST

title: Influencer & Creator Partnerships Manager (with US Market experience)
description:
We are seeking an enthusiastic, highly organized, and strategically-minded Influencer & Creator Partnerships Manager to lead our outreach and seeding efforts. This is a part-time, remote role (20 hours/week) designed for a specialist who doesn’t just execute tasks but brings high-level judgment to creator selection and content strategy.



We prioritize candidates who move beyond simple execution. You should have a deep "content sense"—the ability to understand what feels native to a platform, what resonates with an audience, and how creator activity drives genuine brand growth.



Work Structure & Requirements

Type: Part-time (20 hours/week).



Location: Remote.



Timezone: Must be available to work within New Zealand Standard Time (NZST) hours.



Exclusivity: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure dedicated focus.



Market Priority: Deep familiarity with the US or UK markets is essential. You must understand the specific consumer behaviors, platform trends, and cultural nuances of these regions.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Research & Content Evaluation



Identify creators who align with a purpose-driven mission and high-end storytelling style.



Move beyond "database searching" to conduct deep evaluations of content quality, storytelling strength, and commercial potential.



Outreach & Partnership Execution



Execute highly personalized outreach to creators and talent managers.



Draft creative briefs that ensure content feels platform-native while staying aligned with the brand’s belief system.



Growth & Community Monitoring



Coordinate seeding logistics and monitor platforms for mentions and high-performing tags.



Use content intuition to identify new "waves" of partnership opportunities that drive both engagement and conversion.



Required Skills & Experience

Purpose-Driven Experience: Proven track record working with brands built around a clear mission or belief system (especially in Wellness, Personal Care, or Beauty).



Platform Mastery: Deep, hands-on expertise in at least one core platform (TikTok or Instagram). You should know how to produce or guide content that feels native and high-performing.



High-Level Judgment: While tools/AI can track data, we value your intuition. You must be able to judge what content will actually drive outcomes.



Market Expertise: Strong understanding of platform behaviors and consumer expectations specifically in the US or UK.



System Mindset: 5+ years of experience bringing structure to creator workflows and improving efficiency over time.



Commercial Awareness: A clear understanding of how creator storytelling connects to brand performance and conversion.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.



Crucial: Please also include examples of past work (e.g., a content portfolio, specific campaign results, or platform-specific case studies) that demonstrate your ability to drive outcomes through content.

title: E - Commerce Outbound Sales Representative
description:
Overview

We are seeking a high-energy, execution-focused Outbound Sales Representative to join the team. Based in New York City, we are a "better-for-you" snack brand offering clean-label candied nuts and organic dried mangoes to major distributors and retail partners.



This is a pure execution role with high activity, clear metrics, and no fluff. You will be responsible for high-volume prospecting to engage cold leads, re-activate stalled accounts, and drive reorders from existing customers.



Work Structure & Requirements

Location: Remote (Must have a quiet, professional calling environment).

Schedule: Full-time, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST.

Requirement: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure total focus on hitting daily activity targets.

Tech Needs: Reliable high-speed internet and strong computer literacy to multitask across sales tools.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Outreach: Execute high-volume outbound
s and daily cold calls to prospects and warm leads.

Account Management: Follow up with inactive accounts and call current customers to facilitate reorders, expansion, or reactivation.

Lead Response: Respond promptly to all inbound calls and
 inquiries.

CRM Discipline: Log all activity accurately in Salesforce, maintaining clean data and clear next steps for every lead.

Performance: Consistently hit daily activity targets and monthly pipeline goals.



Required Skills & Experience

Sales Background: Prior experience in outbound sales, inside sales, or lead generation.

Communication: Fluent English (reading, writing, and speaking) with the ability to write concise, non-spammy cold
s.

Phone Presence: Confident, natural delivery on the phone—no monotone script reading.

Resilience: Comfortable handling objections, basic discovery, and repetitive outreach.

Efficiency: Fast typing skills and high attention to detail.



Traits We Value

Metrics-Driven: Comfortable being measured by clear KPIs and pipeline creation.

Coachable: Open to feedback and a direct communicator who strictly follows the established sales process.

Reliable: Consistent and self-disciplined in a remote work setting.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video introducing yourself.

title: CRM & Client Intelligence Manager (Full-Time then Part-Time Retainer)
description:
The Stellaris Collection is hiring a CRM operator to build and maintain the central nervous system of our business. This role owns the accuracy, structure, and intelligence of our client database inside HubSpot CRM. Every client interaction must become clean, usable data that drives revenue.



We sell high-end luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet) and are expanding into a dedicated jewelry vertical. Transactions regularly range from $10,000 to $100,000+. Precision, discretion, and high-level logic are required.

 

Your Core Responsibility



Ensure zero clients are lost, miscategorized, or untracked. You will manage the full lifecycle of client data:

Capture ? Clean ? Enrich ? Organize ? Activate

 

What You Will Do



1) Data Capture Oversight (Daily)

• Monitor incoming contacts from Podium (SMS/Webchat), Outlook, and Shopify

• Ensure all contacts are properly synced into HubSpot; create, identify and fix broken automations in Zapier or Make

• Own CRM data flow integrity across all systems (Podium,
, Shopify)



2) CRM Data Management & Hygiene

• Merge duplicate contacts and standardize naming conventions (Proper Case, no shorthand)

• Maintain a complete, single source of truth for each client (no duplicate or fragmented records)



3) Client Tagging & Intelligence

• Categorize every lead by Brand Interest, Client Tier (Spend), Buyer Type (Collector/Dealer), and Budget Range

• Extract and log key client signals (important dates, specific watch requests, preferences, urgency)



4) Deal Tracking & Reporting

• Move deals through pipelines accurately (Sales vs. Sourcing)

• Create a deal whenever a client shows clear buying intent or discusses pricing

• Generate weekly/monthly lists: Top LTV clients, Inactive high-value leads, and jewelry upsell opportunities

 

Compensation & Long-Term Structure



This role is structured in two distinct phases to reward the heavy lifting required at the start:



Phase 1: The Build (First 2–3 Weeks)

• Workload: Full-time (40 hours/week) for historical audit and setup

• Rate: $8–$10/hour depending on experience (top candidates will be hired at the high end)

• Focus: Importing historical data, cleaning duplicates, and mapping custom properties



Phase 2: The Pulse (Long-Term Maintenance)

• Workload: Part-time (approx. 10 hours/week)

• Pay: $400–$500 monthly retainer (based on performance and speed)

• Focus: Daily data audits, tagging new leads, and preparing outreach lists

• Note: As our jewelry vertical scales, this role has the potential to grow back into a larger position

• This role is designed for long-term stability with consistent monthly income after the initial build phase

 

Requirements

• Expert-level HubSpot experience: You must understand custom properties, deal workflows, and pipeline logic

• Automation fluency: Experience with Zapier or Make is required

• Luxury mindset: You understand that data errors directly impact revenue and client experience at a high-ticket level

• Work hours: During Phase 1, a 4-hour overlap with PST is required (9am–1pm Los Angeles time)

 

Hiring Process (Strict Evaluation)



Step 1: Loom Video

Submit a 2–3 minute Loom video showing you navigating HubSpot. Show how you would:

• Create a contact

• Tag them for “Rolex interest”

• Move a deal stage



Step 2: Technical Test (Data Precision)

Top candidates will be sent 10 messy CSV rows to clean, standardize, and categorize.

100?curacy is the passing grade.



Step 3: Logic Test (Conflict Resolution)

Scenario: A Shopify order comes in for a Rolex, but the client is already tagged as a “Patek Collector.”

Explain how you would:

• Preserve historical data

• Expand tagging correctly

• Update the client profile



Step 4: Written Screening (Applied Thinking)

A new lead texts via Podium asking about a pre-owned Rolex Daytona. Budget is unknown.

Explain exactly:

• Which HubSpot properties you would populate

• How you would structure the record

• How you would prepare it for follow-up

 

How to Apply



Subject line MUST be:



The Stellaris Collection CRM Manager 2026



Include:

1. A brief summary of your HubSpot and automation experience

2. Your Loom video link

3. Your answer to the Step 4 written screening question

4. Strongly preferred: links to screenshots or a brief description of a CRM you’ve built or managed

title: Executive Assistant - Remote
description:
Company Overview



Join the leader transforming healthcare waste management across America.



MedPro Disposal is the nation's largest privately-held medical waste management company, serving 35,000+ providers across 48 states in a $2+ billion market. Since 2009, we've been the trusted partner helping healthcare facilities save up to 30% on waste management costs while maintaining 99% on-time service.



What we do: We lead with comprehensive medical waste disposal solutions, plus pharmaceutical waste management, secure document destruction, and compliance training services—all powered by innovative technology and a client-first approach.



Why it matters: We handle the critical but complex challenge of medical waste management so healthcare providers can focus on what they do best: delivering exceptional patient care.



Our impact: From physician practices to hospitals, dental offices to long-term care facilities, we're trusted advisors and strategic partners—not just vendors. We combine proven expertise with environmental responsibility and comprehensive protection to solve complex operational challenges.



Ready to grow with us?

Join a fast-scaling, mission-driven company where we Do The Right Thing, roll up our sleeves with a "figure it out" attitude, and win as a team. We're building something meaningful—making healthcare safer, more compliant, and more efficient—one client at a time.



Position Overview

MedPro Disposal is seeking a highly proactive and experienced Executive Assistant to support executive leadership across multiple business entities. This role sits within our Executive Division under Executive Operations, directly supporting senior leadership in driving day-to-day effectiveness and execution.



This is a high-impact, remote role requiring someone who can operate independently, manage competing priorities, and communicate effectively in an asynchronous environment. The ideal candidate brings 7–10+ years of experience, strong organizational discipline, and the ability to engage confidently with executives—both verbally and in writing.



Beyond task execution, we are looking for an impact-driven professional who can demonstrate how they’ve made leadership roles easier and more efficient—improving workflows, streamlining communication, and supporting company priorities and direction.



The ideal candidate is also highly tech-savvy, with experience leveraging AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) and platforms like Asana or similar project management tools to enhance productivity, organization, and overall operational efficiency.



Key Responsibilities



Executive Support & Impact

• Manage and optimize executive calendars, priorities, and scheduling across multiple stakeholders

• Proactively identify ways to save time, reduce friction, and improve executive productivity

• Track deliverables, follow-ups, and key priorities to ensure consistent execution

• Demonstrate ownership in making leadership workflows more efficient and scalable



Communication & Coordination

• Draft, edit, and manage executive-level communications 
s, updates, reports, presentations)

• Serve as a liaison across teams, ensuring clear, timely, and effective communication

• Support executives in both synchronous and asynchronous environments

• Ensure alignment across stakeholders, priorities, and deadlines



Operations & Organization

• Prepare and organize reports, dashboards, and executive-level materials

• Maintain structured systems for tracking tasks, projects, and key initiatives

• Manage competing priorities with a high level of organization and attention to detail

• Anticipate needs, identify gaps, and proactively solve problems



Technology, AI & Tools

• Leverage AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) to streamline workflows, documentation, and communication

• Utilize Asana (or similar tools) for task tracking, project management, and accountability

• Continuously identify and implement tools or systems that improve efficiency and collaboration



Confidentiality & Trust

• Handle sensitive information with a high level of discretion and professionalism



Required Qualifications

• 7–10+ years of Executive Assistant experience supporting senior leaders

• Proven ability to communicate effectively with executives (written and verbal)

• Demonstrated track record of creating impact—improving processes, saving time, and supporting leadership effectiveness

• Strong organizational and time-management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities

• Experience working remotely in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Tech-savvy with proficiency in Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, and collaboration tools



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience supporting executives across multiple companies or business units

• Familiarity with Asana or similar project management tools

• Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) to improve productivity

• Background in reporting, operations support, or content creation

• Experience working with U.S.-based teams or clients



Key Traits for Success

• Highly proactive and impact-oriented

• Strong communicator with the ability to engage effectively with executives

• Organized, detail-oriented, and execution-focused

• Able to anticipate needs and operate with minimal direction

• Committed to supporting leadership and company goals



Compensation & Benefits:

• $5-8/hr (based on experience), paid weekly.

• Permanent work-from-home

• 40 hours per week, aligned with U.S. business hours (CST, graveyard shift).

• Fixed weekends off (Saturday & Sunday)

• Work Anniversary Bonus

• No work with pay on US Holidays



Application Process

1. Submit your most updated resume to all of these
s:







2. Shortlisted candidates will complete a brief criteria skills assessment after the initial interview.



Equal Employment Opportunity Statement



MedPro Disposal is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace and encourage applications from all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristic.

title: Meta Ads Buyer & Google Ads Specialist
description:

 Manage
/Instagram ad campaigns driving traffic to our VSL funnels

 Optimize bids, budgets, audiences, and placements to hit 3.5x+ ROAS targets

 Analyze the full VSL funnel (ad ? VSL page ? application ? sales call ? customer)

 What You Bring



 Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)

 Technical Skills:

title: SEO Specialist
description:
We are looking for a high-level Local SEO expert who specializes in Google Business Profile growth and Google Maps rankings.



This role is for someone who understands how to dominate local search, build authority backlinks, and turn Google Maps visibility into real leads and revenue.



We are not looking for a general SEO assistant.

We are looking for someone who has already ranked businesses in the top 3 of Google Maps and can repeat the process consistently.



Your Mission

Increase Google Maps rankings, calls, and leads by building authority, optimizing Google Business Profiles, and executing strong local SEO strategies.



Key Responsibilities

Google Business Profile Growth

Optimize Google Business Profiles for higher Google Maps rankings



Improve local relevance, proximity, and authority signals



Manage GMB posts, services, products, Q&A, and updates



Implement review acquisition strategies



Local SEO Strategy

Identify high-intent local keywords



Optimize location pages and local landing pages



Conduct local competitor analysis



Improve Google Maps visibility



Backlink & Authority Building

Build high-quality local backlinks



Create citation and directory strategies



Develop authority signals for local ranking



Execute link outreach campaigns



Performance Tracking

Track Google Maps rankings



Monitor calls, leads, and traffic



Deliver weekly performance reports



Requirements

You must have real, proven results with Local SEO.



Proven success ranking businesses in Google Maps Top 3



Strong experience with Google Business Profile optimization



Expertise in local backlinks and citations



Deep understanding of Local SEO ranking factors



Experience with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, BrightLocal, Whitespark, SurferSEO



Ability to analyze competitors and reverse engineer rankings



Bonus Experience

Home services industries (roofing, remodeling, construction)



Multi-location SEO strategies



Reputation management and review generation



Schema and local structured data



Success Metrics

Your performance will be measured by:



Google Maps ranking improvements



Increase in calls and leads



Growth in domain authority and backlinks



Organic traffic growth



To Apply

Please include:



Google Business Profiles you ranked



Keywords where you achieved Top 3 Google Maps rankings



Your backlink strategy for local SEO



Tools you use for Local SEO growth



Respond with:



What is the capital of California?



Send a video responding to all these questions:



1. How would you increase the visibility and authority of our Google Business Profile?

Please explain the specific actions you would take to grow and improve our GMB page.



2. Describe the exact steps you would take to rank a Google Business Profile in the Top 3 of Google Maps in a competitive market.



3. Explain your backlink strategy for Local SEO.

What types of backlinks do you build to improve Google Maps rankings?



4. If a competitor is ranking higher on Google Maps, how would you analyze and reverse engineer their strategy?



5. Do you have access to backlinks?





Only respond to these questions in a video format.

title: Marketing Manager-  SEO, ADS, SMM
description:
Looking for a Marketing Manager / Digital Marketing Director

We’re seeking a results-driven Marketing Manager / Digital Marketing Director with deep expertise across the entire digital marketing landscape. This role demands both strategic leadership and hands-on execution — the ideal candidate knows how to build high-performing digital strategies and turn them into measurable growth.



If you live and breathe data-driven marketing, online lead generation, and digital scale, you’ll thrive in this role.



Key Responsibilities

Digital Marketing Strategy



Develop and execute a comprehensive digital marketing plan focused on lead generation, brand growth, and ROI.



Integrate all marketing channels — SEO, paid ads, content, and automation — into one cohesive growth system.



SEO Leadership



Lead all aspects of SEO, including on-page, local, and technical SEO, plus link-building strategies that enhance domain authority and local visibility.



Continuously audit, test, and improve website performance and search rankings.



Paid Advertising (Google & Meta)



Build, manage, and optimize Google Ads and
/Meta Ads campaigns targeting high-quality traffic and strong conversion rates.



Develop creative ad strategies that cut through noise and deliver measurable revenue outcomes.



Content Marketing & Brand Storytelling



Oversee creation of high-impact blogs, landing pages, and digital content that strengthen brand authority and drive conversions.



Guide messaging strategy to ensure every piece of content supports the buyer journey.



Analytics, Optimization & Reporting



Use analytics tools (Google Analytics, Search Console, Ads Manager, etc.) to track campaign performance and uncover growth opportunities.



Translate data insights into actionable marketing improvements.



Marketing Systems & Funnel Optimization



Build and refine digital funnels, CRM systems, and conversion tracking.



Identify bottlenecks and continuously test new strategies to lower acquisition costs and improve lead quality.



Competitive & Market Intelligence



Monitor competitors’ digital strategies and implement data-backed tactics to outperform them across all digital platforms.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience leading SEO, Google Ads, and Meta Ads campaigns.



Expertise in Local SEO and Google Business Profile optimization.



Strong understanding of marketing funnels, digital conversions, and growth mechanics.



Analytical mindset with the ability to turn performance data into strategic decisions.



Excellent written communication — especially for ad copy, landing pages, and content marketing.



Familiarity with marketing tools, including Google Analytics, Search Console, Ads, SEMrush, Ahrefs, or similar.



A self-starter passionate about testing, innovating, and scaling digital results.



The Ideal Candidate

You think like a marketer, strategist, and growth architect. You understand customer psychology, know how to build digital authority, and thrive on measurable performance.

You are always testing, improving, and scaling — looking for that next creative way to generate more leads at lower cost.



Screening Questions (Required)

Please answer these questions in detail:



If a company’s Google Business Profile isn’t ranking in the Top 3 of Google Maps, what exact steps would you take to improve it?



Describe a Google Ads campaign you personally managed. What was the monthly budget, cost per lead, and what optimizations did you make?



Explain your backlink strategy for Local SEO. What types of backlinks would you build to improve rankings?



If a competitor is ranking higher on Google Maps, how would you analyze and reverse-engineer their strategy?



Describe your process for writing SEO blog content that truly ranks on Google.



What are the three most important metrics you track when managing Google Ads campaigns?



Share one real example of a business you helped grow through digital marketing — what actions did you take, and what results did you achieve?

title: Accountant for Australian Recruitment Business
description:
The Accountant is responsible for the following – 

 

Onboarding of New Contractors and Extensions

• Compliance checking of paperwork (including the appropriate parties’ signature, correct clients’ and contractors’ details, dates & rates calculation)

• Completing onboarding of new and existing contractors into the Payroll System utilising knowledge of payroll legislation (including superannuation, payroll tax and insurances)

• Completing immigration working rights checks for non-Australian passport holders

• Liaising with internal staff and external personnel, including contractors and clients 

• Chasing Purchase Orders for relevant clients

• Maintaining proper audit trails for all electronic file documentations



Accounts receivables/ Credit Control



• Invoice preparation for all contracting invoices (weekly, fortnightly, monthly)

• Credit control and collection of outstanding invoices (ensuring the debtors’ days are kept below 30 days and no invoices are older than 90 days)

• Uploading invoices into the Supplier’s portal

• Payment allocation to the correct invoices

• Working with the Finance team to resolve discrepancies

• Liaising with internal staff and external personnel as required







Timesheets check and reporting

• Checking and approving of internal approval contractors’ timesheets

• Preparation of weekly debtors’ reports

Other

• Prepare and post general journals

• Ad-hoc tasks

• Prepare reports

• Assisting the team with month-end and year-end tasks

• Importing journals and invoices

• General support to the Finance team



Profile

Australian Recruitment Business Experience required

Accounting background with local work experience of 5+ years, preferably in payroll Award interpretation. 

Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Software experience preferred – Xero, Astute Payroll, Excel (intermediate level), Microsoft Office

Team player and Can-do Attitude

title: Customer Reactivation and Revenue Closer
description:
CUSTOMER REACTIVATION & REVENUE CLOSER (REMOTE)

READ THIS FIRST

We are not hiring average.

We are hiring someone who can:

Communicate clearly

Execute consistently

Owner the result

This is NOT cold calling.

You are reactivating past customers who already know us.

If you can’t turn warm conversations into revenue, don’t apply.



THE ROLE

You will call past customers and reactivate them with a simple offer.

That’s it.

No long sales cycles.

No chasing cold leads.

No complicated products.

You:

• Call past clients 

• Present one offer 

• Close on the call 

• Collect payment 

• Move on 



WHAT YOU’LL DO DAILY

• Make 200+ calls/day to past customers 

• Have 25+ real conversations 

• Close 5–10+ deals/day 

• Send payment links via SMS/email 

• Confirm payment on the call 

• Update CRM 

• Send follow-up
 after close 

• Ask for 2–3 referrals every time 



WHAT MAKES THIS DIFFERENT

You are NOT calling strangers.

You are calling:

People who have already done business with us

That means:

• Higher trust 

• Faster conversations 

• Easier closes 

If you’re good, this becomes predictable income quickly.



HOW WE SELL

We sell ONE offer.

No options.

No confusion.

No overexplaining.

You say:

“Do you want me to reserve that for you?”

Then you send the link.



CORE VALUES (HOW YOU OPERATE)



1. CLEAR COMMUNICATION

You say what needs to be said simply and directly.

• No rambling 

• No confusion 

• No filler 

If they don’t understand, that’s on you.



2. RELENTLESS CONSISTENCY

You execute every day.

• 200 calls = 200 calls 

• No drop-off 

• No excuses 

Consistency wins here.



3. CONFIDENT OWNERSHIP

You own your results.

• Calls 

• Conversations 

• Revenue 

No blaming:

• leads 

• timing 

• script 

You adjust and improve.



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

• Dialer ? GoHighLevel 

• CRM ? HubSpot 

• Payments ? Stripe 

• SMS +
 

You must move fast between all of them.



COMPENSATION

• Hourly: $6–$10/hr

o $10–$15 per sale 

o Bi-weekly bonuses 



EXAMPLE

10 sales/day:

$100–$150 bonus/day

Plus hourly



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• You close within your first few days 

• You confidently ask for payment 

• You move quickly from call to call 

• You improve daily 



YOU WILL FAIL IF

• You hesitate 

• You talk too much 

• You avoid asking for the sale 

• You get discouraged 



CALL PROCESS

1. Open 

2. Present offer 

3. Ask for sale 

4. Send payment link 

5. Confirm payment 

6. Log in CRM 

7. Ask for referrals 

8. Thank you
 and intro



FINAL WORD

This role rewards:

Clear communication

Relentless consistency

Confident ownership

You are working a warm list with a proven offer.

If you can close:  You will make money here

If you can’t: You won’t last



Put this in your subject: Closer Application – I Close on the First Call

I would like a 60 second video on why you and why now!

title: Tech Virtual Assistant - Part-Time (approx. 20 hours per week)Part-time Tech VA

Working extensively with AI systems and integrating them into workflows

Building and managing automations within Go High Level (GHL)

Setting up and maintaining automated workflows more broadly

Editing and updating websites



What We Are Looking For



Above all, we need someone who is technically excellent and genuinely self-sufficient. Specifically, you will be someone who:

title: Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)
description:
Outbound Enrollment Closer – Career Certification Programs (Remote, EST)



This is not customer service.

This is not inbound order-taking.



This is a phone-driven, outbound enrollment closer role for professionals who know how to control a consult, qualify fast, overcome objections, and close.



We are a U.S.-based online career school enrolling students into IT and Project Management certification programs (CompTIA, PMP, and related tracks). We provide warm leads. You bring the discipline, urgency, and closing skill.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily Reality)



Make high-volume outbound calls to prospective students



Run structured, consultative enrollment calls (needs analysis ? recommendation ? close)



Control the call, set next steps, and ask for the enrollment



Handle objections around price, time, confidence, and urgency



Follow up relentlessly until the prospect converts or disqualifies



Log activity and outcomes accurately in CRM



Hit daily activity targets and monthly enrollment goals



Improve close rates through coaching, scripts, and call reviews



If you don’t like calling, this role will break you.



Who This Role Is For



Proven outbound / inside sales closers



Comfortable dialing daily and living on the phone



Strong command of English with clear U.S. cultural fluency



Confident asking direct questions and pushing for decisions



Competitive, coachable, metrics-driven



Organized and accountable without supervision



Experience selling education, training, coaching, or professional services is a major plus



Familiarity with certifications (CompTIA, PMP) helps—but closing ability matters more



Bachelor’s degree required



Who Should NOT Apply



Anyone who needs inbound-only leads



Anyone uncomfortable asking for money



Anyone who avoids objection handling



Anyone who wants a “soft” admissions role



Anyone who disappears when targets tighten



Schedule



Monday–Friday



10:00 AM – 6:30 PM EST



Compensation



Base pay: $1,200–$1,600 USD per month



Performance-based advancement and leadership path



Long-term role with stability and growth for performers



(Top performers move fast. Average performers don’t last.)



What You Get



Warm leads with real intent



Clear scripts, frameworks, and coaching



No gimmicks, no fake promises—just real programs that work



A sales culture that rewards results



Bottom Line



If you can:



Control a sales conversation



Build urgency without lying



Close consistently



Take coaching and improve



You will win here.



If not—this role will expose you quickly.

title: Credit Specialist
description:
Job Description

The Credit Specialist will be responsible for reviewing, analyzing, and managing credit reports, assisting clients with credit repair strategies, and ensuring accurate documentation. You will also communicate with credit bureaus, creditors, and clients to resolve disputes, track progress, and provide regular updates.

This role requires strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and discretion with sensitive financial information.

Key Responsibilities

    •    Review client credit reports for errors, inaccuracies, and opportunities for improvement.

    •    Prepare and send dispute letters to credit bureaus and creditors.

    •    Monitor and track dispute progress; follow up on pending cases.

    •    Advise clients on credit-building strategies and best practices.

    •    Maintain detailed records of client communications, disputes, and results.

    •    Generate weekly and monthly reports on client progress.

    •    Collaborate with tea
mbers to improve internal systems and processes.

Qualifications

    •    Prior experience as a Credit Specialist, Credit Analyst, or similar role preferred.

    •    Strong understanding of credit reports, credit scores, and dispute processes.

    •    Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

    •    High level of accuracy and attention to detail.

    •    Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

    •    Proficiency in Microsoft Office/Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, etc.).

    •    Experience using credit software tools (preferred but not required).

Work Schedule

    •    Full-time (40 hrs/week), Monday–Friday

    •    Philippine time (with some flexibility to overlap with U.S. business hours)

Compensation & Benefits

    •    Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

    •    Long-term, stable work with growth opportunities

    •    Paid training and performance bonuses

How to Apply

Please submit the following:

    1    Updated resume

    2    A brief cover letter explaining your relevant experience

    3    Your expected monthly salary

title: Short-Form B2B SaaS/AI Video Content Producer
description:
Remote • Philippines-Based • Retainer • £700–£1,500/month



Are you obsessed with AI, short-form video, and creating great content? This role might be for you.



The role in one line: 



You will be a research-driven content producer who turns loose ideas into daily short-form video scripts and presentation slide briefs across LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



What You Will Do:



- You will take a loose content idea — sometimes given to you, sometimes your own — and turn it into a complete, ready-to-film package. Each package lives as a single card on a shared Notion board and contains: a script (with hook, spoken word, CTA, and caption copy), and a brief for a separate designer to build the accompanying slides that appear behind the client on camera.



- Some videos will be in faceless format using the client’s voice or AI-generated voice. You need to be comfortable creating quick screen-recordings to showcase the point you’re making. Your videos must be example-packed — never conceptual or high-level.



- The goal is one video posted per day, which means you need to stay ahead of that volume consistently. Typically 1minute long. The client approves every script before filming. Videos may be bulk-filmed in advance, so building a strong queue is a core part of your job.



Content Focus:



 - The content covers GTM strategy, AI features and tooling, and growth — not generic thought leadership. Roughly 50/50 of your output will be evergreen VS timely trend-jacking, so you need to stay on top of what’s happening in the AI and B2B marketing space.



- A critical part of your role is sourcing real data, stats, and concrete examples — especially examples of tools, features, and use cases. This is research-heavy work, and more around cohesive narratives than traditional copywriting. If you love digging into the details and turning them into tight, punchy content, you’ll enjoy this.



What Success Looks Like After 90 Days:



- The client is posting at least one video per day on a consistent schedule across channels.



- Your scripts are tight, well-researched, and require minimal revision.



- You are proactively bringing ideas to the table - not just waiting for direction.



- The Notion board should be a well-oiled queue with scripts and designer briefs always ahead of the filming schedule.



Must-Haves:



- You genuinely use and understand AI tools — not just a passing interest. We want to see that AI is part of how you actually work.



- You understand LinkedIn and TikTok content formats well, with Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts as secondary platforms.



- You can work from a very loose direction and still produce structured, detailed output without needing your hand held.



- You are a strong researcher — comfortable digging up data, stats, case studies, and real-world examples.



- Your written English is excellent. Natural, confident, and B2B-appropriate.



- You can work autonomously without timezone overlap, as long as your output stays ahead of schedule.



- You are based in the Philippines.



Nice-to-Haves:



These will help you stand out but are not dealbreakers:



- You have experience writing scripts specifically for short-form video — not just blog posts or social captions.



- You are familiar with the B2B SaaS or growth marketing space.



- You are familiar with the AI space.



- You have worked with a personal brand before, not just a company.



- You are comfortable working in Notion & Google apps.



The Setup:



- Retainer position — starting part-time/flexible, with potential to go full-time for the right person.



- Pay: £700–£1,500/month depending on experience and output.



- Fully remote. No timezone overlap required - as long as your queue stays ahead of schedule.



- Zero client interaction. This is entirely behind the scenes.



- Reference creators will be shared with you during onboarding so you know exactly what style and format to match.



- Brand voice guidance will be provided or developed together during onboarding.



If you believe you're the right fit, please send your portfolio and/or resume to 
 with the subject line: "I am your B2B SaaS/AI Video Content Producer."

title: Direct-Response Video Editor (Meta Ads & YouTube) — Premium Australian Appliance Brand
description:
Who We Are: MOD Appliances makes the MOD Cold Press Juicer and MOD Auto+ cold press juicer, sold direct to consumers across Australia. 



Our customers are health-conscious Australians who take quality seriously. Our content needs to reflect that.

We have a lean, high-output creative team. You'll work directly with our Creative Performance Lead who provides strategy, raw footage, and clear briefs. No chasing people. No unclear direction. Just focused, well-organised creative production.



The Role

We don't need cinematic wedding videos or CapCut templates.

We need a Direct-Response editor who understands that the first 3 seconds determine everything — someone who obsesses over pacing, hooks, and retention the same way a media buyer obsesses over ROAS.



What You'll Edit Every Week

-Meta ad hook variations (2 ad sets): 12–16 short form edits

- YouTube Shorts (repurposed fro
ta): 3–4 edits 

- YouTube long form: 1 video occasionally



Mostly short form UGC under 60 seconds. Fast, iterative, brand-consistent.



You're The Right Person If You:



- Understand Direct-Response — you know the first 3 seconds determine the sale

- Work in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut — we need project files, not mobile exports

-Do clean premium motion graphics — no generic templates

- Are obsessed with pacing — you know exactly when to cut to keep viewers watching

- Understand caption style, sound design, and scroll-stopping hooks

- Can take a brief and execute without hand-holding

- Want stable long-term work with a premium brand, not one-off gigs



What You Won't Do



-Use CapCut templates or generic transitions

-Wait for detailed instructions on every edit

-Disappear after submitting — revisions and iterations are part of this role

title: Expert Short-Term Rental Guest Support (US Evening/Night Shift)
description:
Hours: US evening/night shift (approximately 5PM–1AM Central Time USA). Full-time, 6 days per week.

Pay: $20-50k PHP monthly depending on experience and performance. Room to grow.

About Us:

We operate 21+ short-term rental properties across. Our guests book through Airbnb and VRBO, and we pride ourselves on fast, friendly communication and smooth stays. We're a small, growing team and we need someone reliable to own the overnight guest experience.

What You'll Do:



Monitor and respond to guest messages across Airbnb/VRBO via Hospitable (our property management platform)

Handle check-in/check-out questions, lockout issues, Wi-Fi troubleshooting, and common guest concerns

Coordinate with cleaners and runners through Breezeway and Slack when issues come up during your shift

Escalate maintenance emergencies following our written SOPs — gather information first, don't just forward problems

Complete shift handoff notes in Slack so the day team knows exactly where things stand

Monitor noise alerts and security cameras and respond per our protocols



What We're Looking For:



Prior experience in hospitality, property management, Airbnb co-hosting, or live chat customer support (strongly preferred)

Comfortable with: Slack, ClickUp, Hospitable (or similar PMS), and learning new tools quickly

Strong written English — you'll be writing directly to guests and your tone matters

Reliable. This is non-negotiable. You are covering the overnight shift alone. If you go offline, our guests have no one. We track active hours

Problem-solver who can follow SOPs but also think through situations independently

Stable internet connection and backup power plan



How to Apply:

Send us a message with:



A brief summary of your relevant experience (hospitality, STR, or live chat support)



Your available start date

A Loom video (under 5 minutes) responding to the scenario below. Don't script it — just talk through how you'd handle the situation naturally. We want to hear how you think, not a rehearsed answer.



Scenario:

It's 10 PM. You're the only person on shift for a company that manages 21 short-term rental properties. Three things happen within 5 minutes of each other:



A guest checking in tonight messages that their door code isn't working and they're standing outside with luggage.

A current guest at a different property sends a message complaining that the Wi-Fi has been down for an hour.

You notice a new booking request that expires in 3 hours. Nobody has responded to it yet.



In your video, walk us through: What do you do first, second, and third? Why that order? And what would you actually say to each guest?

Applications without the Loom video will not be reviewed.



Huge bonus if you have experience with claims 

Huge bonus if you worked higher up at airbnb



NO LOOM = NO LOOK AT YOUR APPLICATION

If you are reading right off the screen it will be hard for us to take you seriously

YOU NEED TO BE INDEPENDENT AND RELIABLE
