title: Medical Virtual Assistant - Veteran charting assistant
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a highly reliable and experienced Medical Virtual Assistant (VA)  to support Veteran Affairs (VA) medical charting and disability evaluation documentation on a remote/contract basis.

This role focuses on accurate pre-charting, medical record research, data entry, and preparation of service treatment records (STRs) for providers working with veterans. The ideal candidate has a strong clinical/medical background and excels in fast-paced, detail-oriented medical documentation.



Key Responsibilities



-Perform accurate medical charting and documentation for Veteran Affairs records

-Research and verify medical information, events in service treatment records (STRs), and other files

-Pre-chart all necessary information (including ICD-10 codes, diagnoses, and clinical notes) for the provider prior to veteran visits

-Work proficiently with ICD-10 coding, medical terminology, diagnoses, and clinical documentation standards

-Input veteran schedules into the master calendar and manage conflicts with other appointments

-Maintain strict confidentiality and full compliance with HIPAA and VA standards

-Deliver high-quality work with a strict 24-48 hour turnaround time per charting assignment

-Manage workload efficiently with excellent time management and organizational skills



Qualifications & Requirements



Strong medical/clinical background required (Registered Nurse, Pharmacist, Medical Scribe, or equivalent experience strongly preferred)

Proven experience in medical charting, data entry, ICD-10 coding, and working with medical records

Previous experience with veteran charting, VA disability exams (DBQs), Compensation & Pension (C&P) evaluations, or STR review is highly preferred

Excellent research skills — able to locate and summarize relevant events in service treatment records in a timely manner 

Must be willing and able to sign a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA compliance immediately

Strong English proficiency, attention to detail, and professional work ethic

US time zones preferred for better coordination with providers (Pacific Time overlap is a plus)

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace for handling Protected Health Information (PHI)



What We Offer



Fully remote, flexible work-from-home position

You can work on your free time

You don't need to work during US daytime hours

Opportunity to make a meaningful impact by supporting accurate documentation for veterans

Potential for ongoing or full-time contract work



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit a proposal that includes:



A brief introduction (1–2 paragraphs)

Your resume (attach PDF)

Detailed relevant experience in medical charting, data entry, ICD-10, or veteran/VA work (with specific examples if possible)

At least 2 professional references from previous medical or administrative roles

Your preferred price range per month or hourly pay



Screening Questions 



Do you have direct experience with veteran medical records, STR review, VA disability charting, or DBQ preparation? Please describe in detail.

Are you able to sign a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) and handle Protected Health Information compliantly?

What is your typical turnaround time for medical charting or record research tasks?

What is your current time zone and availability for Pacific Time overlap?

Do you have experience using ICD-10 codes and medical terminology in documentation?



Only serious, qualified candidates with relevant medical experience will be considered. Low-effort or generic proposals will be ignored.

Thank you for helping support veterans through accurate and timely medical documentation!

title: Motion Designer
description:
Job Type: Project-Based (40+ hours/month minimum, with strong potential for consistent ongoing work)

Rate: USD $8–$12/hour (based on experience)



About Us



MoveUp Studio is a motion design and digital content studio based in Auckland, New Zealand. We specialise in premium, highly custom animations for B2B SaaS and tech companies. Think product feature explainers, social cutdowns, paid ads, and event promos. Our work is bespoke, never templated. We care about quality and we're building something worth being part of.



Website: 



The Role



We're looking for a talented motion designer to join our small, collaborative team. To be upfront: this starts as project-based work, not a full-time position. We have an immediate project ready to go, with a minimum of 40 hours/month.

Here's what matters though. We're a growing studio actively scaling our client base. The right person who delivers great work and shows commitment will see that reflected in more consistent projects and a bigger role over time. We want to find someone who grows with us, not someone we have to keep rehiring for.



What You'll Be Doing



Creating motion graphics and animations in After Effects

Working from design files and storyboards to produce polished final animations

Exporting and optimising assets for web, social, and digital ad formats

Collaborating with our designers and production lead to hit deadlines and maintain quality

Contributing ideas and creative solutions, not just executing briefs



What We Need From You



Technical skills:



Strong proficiency in Adobe After Effects (non-negotiable)

Solid working knowledge of the broader Adobe Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro)

Ability to export in multiple formats optimised for different platforms

Clean, organised project files



Who you are:



Trustworthy. We give you responsibility and expect you to own it.

A strong communicator. You flag issues early, ask questions when things aren't clear, and keep us updated without being chased.

Efficient. You manage your time well and deliver on deadline.

A fast learner. You pick up new styles, techniques, and feedback quickly.

A creative thinker and problem solver. You don't just follow instructions. You think about how to make the work better.



What We Offer



A real path to consistent work. We're not looking for a one-off freelancer. If you prove yourself on early projects, you'll be the first person we call as work grows. Our pipeline is building and we need reliable people we trust.

A collaborative remote culture. We're a small team that genuinely enjoys working together. You'll have a voice, not just a task list.

Creative projects that push you. We're always trying to create better work. You won't be churning out the same thing on repeat.

Flexibility and trust. We don't micromanage. We trust you to do great work and manage your own time. In return, we expect your best effort and strong communication.



How to Apply



Please send:



Your portfolio or showreel. We want to see your motion work specifically (not just static design).

A short message about why you think you'd be a good fit for MoveUp Studio. Be specific. Tell us what stood out to you about us and what you'd bring to the team.



Generic applications without a portfolio or a personalised message won't be considered.

We're excited to find the right person. If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Proofreader / Copy Editor (Work from home opportunity)
description:
Job description

We are looking for a highly proficient proofreader/editor responsible for maintaining the quality of the SEO content we write for our range of clients. We prefer someone from a journalism and communications background, and the candidate must have an extremely high level of attention to detail. Experience writing for Australian audiences for an agency is a plus. We work across multiple different topic areas with strict deadlines.



Area Ten is a global digital agency that services large corporations to fast-growing upstarts across Australia, Asia and North America. One of the keys to our success lies in the quality of our staff. We have a strict policy of no junior staff which means you’ll be working with the highest calibre of colleagues in the industries, hence there is a scope for ample opportunities to learn and develop.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



·You will have to:



*Acquire and review content briefs, ensuring alignment with client requirements. Develop and manage brand guides and templates to maintain consistency across all content

*Perform end-to-end content editing, from line edits to comprehensive copy edits, ensuring all content meets Area Ten's high standards and client specifications

*Provide constructive feedback to copywriters, manage revisions, and update content based on client feedback to refine and perfect deliverables

*Work closely with a team of editors and content creators, sharing insights and strategies to enhance content quality and workflow efficiency

*Help manage our content database, which requires regular upkeep on the progress of content projects across multiple clients



REQUIREMENTS



*Strong background in content editing and proofreading, preferably within a digital agency setting.

*Exceptional attention to detail and a keen eye for grammatical and stylistic errors. Must be committed to following style guidelines such as the Australian Government Style Manual and the Associated Press Stylebook, 2019.

*Must have a high-speed internet connection and a laptop with high specifications.

*A degree in journalism, communications, or a related field is preferred.

*The resource will also have to experiment with various AI tools and produce quality SEO content for our partner clients. This is a full-time role and involves closely working with the other editors and the rest of the team.



Mandate Requirement: The candidate should have a high-speed internet connection and a laptop with high computer specifications.



Please note: You will have to complete 1 copy test and 1 proofreading exercise as a part of the interview process.



ELIGIBILITY:



· Proofreading: 2 years (Required)



· Copywriting: 5 years (Required)



HOW TO APPLY:



If you’re interested in a role with us, please answer this:



Job Type: Full-time, Permanent



Benefits:



Work from home

title: SEO Content Writer
description:
We are looking for a highly proficient full time SEO Content Writer.



Area Ten is a global digital agency that services large corporates to fast-growing upstarts across Australia, Asia and North America. We're an SEO agency that needs copy written for a range of clients covering an extensive range of industries/topics. One of the keys to our success lies in the quality of our staff. We have a strict policy of no junior staff which means you’ll be working with a high calibre of colleagues which presents ample opportunities to learn and develop. For a bit more context please feel free to view this video from the founder Jeremy Tang.



You will be expected to take briefs that define details like keywords and questions to use to build out into 900-word articles, highlight where you've used primary and related keywords in the content and add internal links to other pages (which we will provide you with).

Typically, we require 2 to 3 articles per day.



Job Requirements:



Fluent in written and verbal English

Experience writing for e-commerce

Experience writing for service businesses

Strong attention to detail

The ability to follow instructions and specific writing guidelines

Pedantic about spelling & grammar

Punctual and highly responsive

Demonstrated capability and experience writing across an extensive range of topics

To produce an absolute minimum of 1800 words per day worth of copy

Mandate Requirement: The candidate should have a high-speed internet connection and a laptop with high computer specifications.



We are seeking a dedicated candidate committed to working full-time with undivided focus and attention on this role, without engagement in external side hustles or concurrent employment commitments.





Please note: You will have to complete 2 copy tests as part of the interview process.



Job Type: Full-time



How to apply:



To apply for this exciting opportunity, kindly follow the link below to access our Google Form application:  



Please take your time to fill out the form with accurate and up-to-date information. Your responses will help us understand your qualifications better and evaluate your fit for the role.

title: Sales Account Executive
description:
How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to 



About us:



Gushwork.ai builds AI Agents that help small and medium businesses automate their entire inbound marketing stack — from SEO and website content to reviews, blogs, and lead funnels. Our current focus is the manufacturing and industrial distributors industry.



In plain English: we’re replacing bloated marketing agencies with intelligent, always-on software.



Backed by Lightspeed, SIG, Beenext, and B Capital, Gushwork.ai is one of the fastest-growing AI companies globally.



In just a year, we’ve grown to $1.5M ARR and are scaling fast toward $15M ARR in the next 12 months — helping thousands of small businesses grow smarter, not harder.



The Role:



We’re looking for a closer who thrives in fast-paced, high-velocity sales environments. You’ll own the full sales cycle from discovery to close for qualified meetings booked by our 10-person BDR team. This is a quota-carrying role where you’ll close 4-8 deals monthly, with deal cycles ranging from 1-3 calls.



Working Hours: US Shift (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST)

Work Mode: Remote



What You’ll Do:



- Run discovery calls with qualified prospects (OEMs, distributors, manufacturers) to uncover pain points around lead generation and digital presence

- Deliver compelling demos that connect our AI SEO solution to specific business outcomes and revenue impact

- Navigate buying committees within SMB organizations, typically engaging with Marketing Directors, Sales Leaders, and C-suite

- Close deals on 12-month contracts with ACV of $5k-$25k, meeting or exceeding monthly quota

- Manage pipeline with discipline—forecast accurately, maintain detailed CRM hygiene, and move deals forward with urgency

- Partner with Growth Managers post-sale to ensure smooth handoffs and identify expansion opportunities

- Iterate on sales methodology by sharing wins/losses and collaborating on improving conversion rates



What Success Looks Like:



- Month 1-2: Ramp on product, market, and sales process; close your first 2-3 deals

- Month 3+: Consistently hit/exceed quota of 4-8 closed deals monthly

- Ongoing: Maintain 30%+ demo-to-close conversion rate and sub-30 day sales cycles



You’re a Great Fit If You Have:



- 2-4 years of closing experience in B2B SaaS, MarTech, or digital services

- Proven track record hitting/exceeding quota in a high-velocity sales environment

- SMB sales chops—you know how to build urgency, handle objections, and close without lengthy procurement cycles

- Consultative selling skills—you diagnose before prescribing and can articulate ROI clearly

- Comfort with ambiguity—you’re joining an early-stage startup where adaptability matters

- CRM proficiency (Zoho, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and strong process discipline

- Excellent English communication skills for engaging with global prospects

- Want to hustle like crazy to hit the numbers!



Bonus Points For:



- Experience selling to manufacturers, distributors, or industrial/B2B companies

- Background in SEO, content marketing, or lead generation solutions

- Track record in 1-3 call close environments

- Familiarity with AI-powered products

- Experience selling to US/international markets



What We Offer:



- Accelerators for over-quota performance—top performers earn significantly more

- Qualified pipeline delivered daily by our BDR team—focus on closing, not prospecting

- Fast feedback loops—short sales cycles mean you learn and earn quickly

- Career growth—as we scale, top performers move into senior AE or team lead roles

- Equity in a VC-backed rocketship

- Collaborative, high-performance culture where wins are celebrated and losses are learning 
nts

- Remote work



Our Sales Process



- BDR books qualified meeting ? hands off to you

- Call 1: Discovery (30-45 min) - understand business, pain points, buying process

- Call 2: Demo + Proposal (45-60 min) - tailored walkthrough, ROI discussion, pricing

- Call 3 (if needed): Negotiation/Close - handle final objections, terms, signatures

- Handoff to Growth Manager for onboarding



How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to

title: Senior Data Analyst
description:
***PLEASE ATTACHED YOUR RESUME LINK ON YOUR APPLICATION***



Our client is a U.S.-based digital media company dedicated to providing expert content and specialized tools that help users maximize credit card rewards and travel more efficiently. They operate as a small, high-energy, and passionate team focused on delivering high-value, accessible information to a rapidly growing community. The environment is fast-paced, with a heavy emphasis on content performance, website usability, and maintaining a consistent, trusted brand.

About the Role

We are seeking a Senior Data Analyst to serve as the functional backbone of our reporting systems. This is an operational role focused on continuity and growth—you will maintain existing data infrastructure while building out reporting for an exciting new product launch.



Unlike a "greenfield" architect role, this position is for a "doer" who enjoys managing scheduled queries, troubleshooting pipelines, and ensuring leadership has the Tableau dashboards they need to make decisions. You will work closely with Marketing, Tech, and Operations to translate business questions into technical insights without needing to rebuild the foundational infrastructure.





Responsibilities





System Maintenance & Continuity: Run and maintain current data pipelines and reporting systems to ensure zero downtime for existing business units.

New Product Reporting: Build additional reporting layers on top of existing data pipelines to support upcoming product launches.

SQL & BigQuery Management: Write, debug, and optimize intermediate-to-advanced SQL queries. Manage scheduled and preset queries within BigQuery for maximum efficiency.

Dashboarding: Design, build, and iterate on Tableau dashboards, ensuring all visualizations are accurate, intuitive, and updated for stakeholders.

Pipeline Troubleshooting: Perform hands-on troubleshooting of data pipelines and refresh failures to maintain data integrity.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with Marketing and Product teams to provide ad-hoc reporting and actionable insights for growth.



Competencies and Qualifications



Must-Have

5+ years of professional experience in Data Analysis.

Intermediate to Advanced SQL proficiency (querying, optimization, and debugging).

Hands-on experience with BigQuery and managing cloud-based data environments.

Proven track record of building and maintaining complex Tableau dashboards.

Demonstrated ability in Data Cleaning & Manipulation and troubleshooting data pipelines.



Nice-to-Have

Degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field.

Experience with HubSpot, Stripe, and GA4 (Google Analytics) data.

Familiarity with ETL workflow management and data modeling/schema design.

Tableau Desktop or Google Data Analytics certifications



Key Qualities

Collaborative: You thrive in a team environment and communicate technical "whys" clearly to non-technical peers.

Analytical & Detail-Oriented: You have a natural tendency to double-check data accuracy and hunt for anomalies before they reach a dashboard.

Inquisitive: You don’t just pull data; you ask questions to understand the "so what" behind the numbers.

Action-Oriented: You are a proactive problem-solver who fixes query inefficiencies or dashboard lags before being asked.

Long-Term Focus: We are looking for a candidate seeking a stable, long-term role where they can grow with the company.



What We Offer



100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

Career Growth Opportunities – Gain hands-on experience, and continuous learning.

Application Process

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month )
description:
Paid Trial To Complete (Required to Apply, $150 if you pass it)

When submitting your application, include these 3 trial videos: https://exchange-life-community.notion.site/Editor-Application-Test-Brief-326f1855927780788969ede1d820b810?source=copy_link



NOTE: Applications without the trial will not be considered.



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Meta Ads Campaign Manager (Part time)
description:
About Us

We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part-time and want a long term core client, not just a one-off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: Sales Manager
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced Sales Manager to lead and scale EVORETRO’s B2B distributor and retailer sales efforts, with a strong emphasis on retail partnerships and B2C-driven growth strategies. This role owns the end-to-end sales strategy across distributors, retailers, and direct-to-consumer–influenced channels, while managing and developing the sales team.

The Sales Manager will be responsible for driving revenue growth through retailer acquisition, promotional strategy, product bundling, and data-driven sales forecasting, while ensuring strong client relationships and operational excellence. The ideal candidate brings 3–5 years of sales experience, prior people-management exposure, and hands-on experience managing Shopify-based retail and wholesale environments.



Key Responsibilities:

Sales Strategy & Leadership

Own and execute the B2B sales strategy for distributors and retailers, with a strong understanding of B2C buying behavior and retail sell-through

Develop and manage retailer-focused sales strategies, including promotional calendars, product launches, and seasonal campaigns

Lead, coach, and manage the sales team, setting targets, monitoring performance, and driving accountability

Identify high-potential markets, retailers, and distributors across regions

Act as a senior point of contact for key retailer and distributor accounts

Drive structured outreach, follow-ups, and pipeline reviews to ensure consistent revenue growth

Business Development & Partnerships

Research, qualify, and onboard new retailers and distributors aligned with EVORETRO’s premium brand positioning

Lead negotiations covering pricing, payment terms, MOQs, promotional support, and merchandising agreements

Design and execute promotional strategies and product bundling initiatives to increase order value and sell-through

Present business cases, sales forecasts, and market demand insights to leadership

Represent EVORETRO at trade shows, conventions, and industry events (virtual or in-person)

Sales Operations & Team Management

Oversee sales operations across retailer and distributor channels, including:

Order accuracy and fulfillment coordination

Pricing and promotion compliance

Contract and commercial term alignment

Manage and optimize Shopify retail and wholesale sales channels, including retailer access, pricing tiers, and order workflows

Ensure CRM discipline and visibility across the sales team, including:

Lead and account status

Conversion rates

Forecasted revenue and pipeline health

Client & Account Management

Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with key retailer and distributor partners

Serve as a trusted advisor to clients by understanding their sales goals, challenges, and merchandising needs

Ensure a high-quality partner experience from onboarding through ongoing account management

Cross-Functional Collaboration

Work closely with Product, Marketing, Finance, and Logistics teams to ensure:

Effective promotional execution and product bundling

Accurate pricing, margin, and cost alignment

Smooth order fulfillment and inventory planning

Share retailer and market feedback to support product development and pricing optimization

Performance Tracking, Forecasting & Analysis

Define, track, and report on key sales metrics, including:

Pipeline growth and velocity

Retailer and distributor conversion rates

Sales revenue, order volume, and average order value

Lead sales forecasting and performance analysis to support inventory planning and leadership decision-making

Deliver regular performance reports with insights, risks, and strategic recommendations

Continuously refine sales and promotional strategies based on data and results



Qualifications:

3–5 years of experience in B2B sales, retail sales, business development, or account management

Proven experience managing and leading a sales team

Strong background in retailer sales, with an understanding of B2C-driven growth strategies

Demonstrated success closing distributor, wholesaler, or retail partnerships

Experience managing Shopify-based retail and wholesale platforms

Strong negotiation, presentation, and client relationship management skills

Experience working with distributors, retailers, or international accounts

Familiarity with collectibles, trading cards, toys, or retail distribution is a strong advantage

Proficient in CRMs, spreadsheets, and productivity tools (Google Workspace, Excel)



Key Competencies:

Strategic, results-driven sales leadership

Strong sales strategy and promotional planning expertise

Product bundling and merchandising mindset

Excellent client and stakeholder management

Data-driven approach to forecasting and sales analysis

Highly organized with strong execution and follow-through

title: Product Development Manager
description:
Position Overview:

The Product Development Manager plays a central role in managing distributor relationships and leading product development initiatives across various markets. This role ensures the seamless execution of projects from ideation to delivery, maintaining high standards for product quality, project timelines, and profitability. The manager also spearheads private label programs, optimizes e-commerce platforms, and supports cross-functional collaboration with sales, marketing, logistics, and supply chain teams to drive operational success.

 

Key Responsibilities:

Manage and maintain distributor accounts via
 and scheduled meetings.

Oversee full-cycle product development for new and existing items, ensuring quality, profitability, and timely delivery.

Lead private label product development, including design, costing, supplier coordination, and timeline execution.

Coordinate with suppliers, factories, and internal departments to execute purchase orders and monitor production timelines.

Communicate order statuses and shipping updates to clients.

Investigate and resolve client quality issues through factory coordination and timely feedback.

Manage Rare Candy’s product listings, pricing, and customer service inquiries.

Develop and maintain sales tracking tools to monitor performance and listing effectiveness.

Supervise and support the sales department in targeting clients and preparing product specifications.

Guide the sales team in building strong business relationships with professionalism and strategic intent.

Collaborate with the marketing, design, and Shopify teams for successful product launches and branding.

Source, evaluate, and manage supplier relationships to ensure favorable terms and consistent quality.

Ensure accurate product information, photo assets, and listings across platforms and departments.

Qualifications:

Education & Experience

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Product Development, or a related field.

Minimum of 3–5 years experience in product development, account management, or a similar role.

Proven experience in managing cross-functional teams and projects in a product-driven business.

 

Skills & Competencies

Strong project management and organizational skills.

Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

Strategic thinker with an eye for detail and a proactive approach to problem-solving.

Ability to handle multiple projects and deadlines while maintaining high-quality standards.

Skilled in supplier negotiation and relationship management, especially in global markets.

Strong analytical skills with the ability to use data to drive decisions and improvements.

Experience in handling e-commerce platforms and product listing management is a plus.



Preferred:

Experience working with international suppliers and distributors (e.g., U.S., Europe, Middle East).

Familiarity with private label development and quality assurance protocols.

Proficiency in Canva, Shopify, and project management platforms.

 

Collaboration & Reporting

Product Development Team – For managing timelines, product quality, and execution of new and existing items.

Sales Team – To align on client requirements, develop product specifications, and support strategic outreach efforts.

Marketing Team – To coordinate product launches, promotional materials, and ensure brand consistency.

Design Team – For packaging layouts, 3D mockups, and product visuals that meet branding and client expectations.

Shopify & E-commerce Team – To ensure accurate product listings, pricing updates, and availability of photo assets.

Supply Chain Team – To coordinate production schedules, monitor factory output, and ensure integration with inventory systems.

Warehouse & Logistics Team (China) – For shipping coordination, order fulfillment, and inventory tracking.

Suppliers & Manufacturers – To manage production, negotiate terms, resolve quality concerns, and ensure timely delivery.

title: Technical Documentation Coordinator (Electrical/Electronics Engineer)
description:
Job Summary

SynergizeX Inc. is seeking a Technical Documentation Coordinator with a background in Electrical or Electronics Engineering to join our project operations team. This is a critical "bridge" role where engineering theory meets field execution. You will be responsible for deconstructing complex Scopes of Work (SOW) and technical drawings into actionable project tasks, ensuring our field teams have the exact parts and plans they need to succeed in low-voltage system deployments.



Key Responsibilities

• Engineering Review: Conduct deep-dive reviews of project drawings and Scopes of Work (SOW) to identify technical 

  requirements and potential integration challenges.

• Project Architecture: Translate approved designs into detailed "tickets" and tasks within our project management platform, 

  creating a clear roadmap for field technicians.

• BOM Generation: Accurate generation of Bill of Materials (BOM) and parts lists, ensuring all low-voltage components, 

  cabling, and peripherals are accounted for before mobilization.

• Progress Monitoring: Act as the "technical eyes" on project velocity, monitoring milestones and reporting on progress to 

  ensure alignment with the initial engineering design.

• Document Control: Manage the lifecycle of technical submittals, RFI responses, and as-built revisions.



What We’re Looking For

• Educational Background: Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, or a closely related technical 

  field.

• Low-Voltage Expertise: Solid understanding of low-voltage systems (CCTV, Access Control, Fire Alarm, or Structured Cabling).

• Analytical Precision: Ability to read a blueprint and immediately identify the specific hardware and wiring requirements 

  needed.

• Platform Proficiency: Experience with project management software  and Microsoft Excel.

• Communication: Ability to explain technical discrepancies to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders.



Why SynergizeX?

We offer a high-energy environment where your engineering degree isn't just a credential—it’s the engine that drives our project accuracy. If you are a detail-oriented engineer who loves organizing complex data and seeing a project move from paper to reality, we want to meet you.

title: Wordpress Web Designer (Gig-Based)
description:
Hey, I’m looking for a reliable web designer to help me build websites for clients on a gig basis.



(Heads up - only accepting people who use at least 10 AP, and also you need to include the secret word which is somewhere in this job posting)



I regularly get clients who need websites built, but I don’t have the time to do all of them myself. So I need someone I can rely on to step in, build high-quality sites, and handle revisions when needed.



This is gig-work, so as it comes I'll reach out to you and hand it over to you.



I’m open to hourly or per-project pricing. Most work will be based on a fixed price per website.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Building websites based on a clear brief



I’ll provide:

The pages required (e.g. Home, About, Services, Contact, etc.)

All client content and info

A section-by-section breakdown of what goes where

You’ll take that and turn it into a clean, professional website

Making revisions based on feedback (fro
 or the client)



The Type of Websites We Build:



Simple, clean service-based websites

Usually 4–5 pages:

Home

About

Services

Contact

Privacy Policy (templated)

Built using templates as a starting point, then customised



A standard 5-page website usually takes me around 20–25 hours, so that gives you an idea of the scope.



Quality Standard (Important):

I’m looking for someone who can match (or get very close to) the quality of these sites:



???? I’ll include example websites here











The designs don’t need to be overly fancy, but they must be:



Clean

Professional

Easy to navigate

Mobile-friendly

Fast-loading



What I’m Looking For:



Strong experience with WordPress (Elementor preferred - I use starter templates for the beginning template)

Good eye for layout and clean design

Secret word: oranges

Ability to follow instructions and structure

Good communication

Reliable and able to meet deadlines



To Apply, Please Include:



Links to websites you’ve built (very important)

How long it would take you to build a standard 5-page website

Your rate (per hour or per project)

A quick note on your experience

title: Senior QBO e-Commerce Bookkeeper – RECON Focus| up to PHP45K | Remote | Morning Schedule | with Time Doctor
description:
About the Role



We are an Australian-based e-commerce business looking for a bookkeeper who can take full ownership of our books.



This is not a maintenance role.



You will be responsible for reviewing and reconciling 12–24 months of historical data, identifying discrepancies, and bringing the books to a clean, accurate state — then maintaining them moving forward.



If you are used to clean, easy books, this role is not for you.



If you are confident working through complex reconciliations where things don’t match, you will do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Initial Focus

1. Review and reconcile 12–24 months of accounts

2. Identify discrepancies and fix issues

3. Ensure all records are accurate and properly structured



Ongoing Work

Daily: Post invoices and bills in QuickBooks Online

Weekly: Reconcile key accounts, assist with payroll

Monthly: Full reconciliation, review P&L, check accuracy

Quarterly: Assist with BAS and GST checks



What We’re Looking For:

1. Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

2. e-Commerce bookkeeping experience (WooCommerce, WordPress, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay, etc.)

3. Experience handling full reconciliations independently

4. Comfortable working with messy or incomplete records

5. Basic understanding (or willingness to learn) Australian accounting (BAS, GST, payroll)

6. Strong attention to detail and ownership mindset

7. Looking for a long-term role, not short-term work



Important (Please Read Before Applying)



This role involves:

1. Cleaning up backlog

2. Fixing discrepancies

3. Working through accounts that don’t immediately match



We are specifically looking for someone who:

1. Can investigate and solve problems independently

2. Does not give up when reconciling gets difficult

3. Wants to stay and improve the system long-term



Work Setup (Remote)

Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: 7AM - 11AM & 1PM - 5PM PHT

SALARY: PHP 40,000 – 45,000/month



Compensation & Benefits

1. PHP 40,000 – 45,000/month

2. Free HMO (principal + 1 dependent)

3. Paid Christmas and New Year holiday break

4. Annual performance review (with potential salary increase or added perks)

5. Annual company-paid team building (meet the CEO and team)



Additional perks may include (based on performance and tenure):

1. Gym/Fitness assistance

2. Rent/housing assistance

3. Child tuition support

4. Medical expense support



How to Apply (STRICT):

1. To be considered, you must complete our screening form: 

2. Use subject line: RECON – [Your Name]



Applications without this will be automatically rejected.

title: Customer Service Agent
description:
Job Summary:

At Purdy & Figg, we are seeking a highly skilled Customer Experience Representative to join our amazing and hard-working Customer Service team.



The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring customer satisfaction by providing exceptional support via
, live chat, social and occasionally phone. The role requires someone who is an excellent English speaker/writer, detail-oriented, proactive, and able to handle multiple tasks simultaneously. Experience with Dixa software (or very similar e.g. Gorgias, Zendesk) is essential.



Responsibilities:

- Responding to customer inquiries via
, live chat, social and phone in a timely and professional manner.

- Providing exceptional customer support and addressing any concerns or issues that customers may have through to full resolution.

- Tracking and documenting all customer interactions to ensure key trends and recurring themes are consistently being captured.

- Escalating important feedback to the Customer Experience Manager at all times.

- Developing and maintaining a deep understanding of the company's products and services.

- Using software such as Shopify, SKIO and inventory management portals to manage customer orders and subscriptions.

- Encouraging positive reviews via Trustpilot.

- Providing technical support and troubleshooting assistance as needed.

- Continuously identifying opportunities to improve the customer experience and processes.



Requirements:

- Excellent all round English (verbal, written, listening).

- High school diploma or equivalent; Bachelor's degree preferred.

- Proven customer service experience, preferably in a remote setting.

- Proficiency in Dixa software essential (or similar, e.g. Gorgias, Zendesk).

- Experience working in subscriptions a bonus.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

- Empathy (understanding customer needs and responding appropriately).

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to prioritise tasks and manage time effectively.



If you meet the above qualifications and are interested in joining a dynamic team dedicated to providing exceptional customer support, please submit your CV and cover letter for consideration.

title: Influencer Scheduling & Logistics Coordinator
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Influencer Scheduling & Logistics Coordinator to join our team and own the scheduling and calendar management side of our influencer program.



You’ll play a critical role in ensuring campaigns run smoothly by coordinating posting dates with influencers, managing weekly content flow, and preventing bottlenecks across a high-volume creator pipeline.



This is a fast-paced, execution-focused role ideal for someone who is extremely organized, communicates clearly, and can proactively follow up without being micromanaged.



What You’ll Do:

You will own all scheduling and calendar coordination after contracts are signed.

Core Responsibilities

Communicate directly with influencers and agents to schedule and confirm posting dates

Send scheduling
s and follow up consistently until dates are locked

Manage a high volume of creators and ensure no one falls through the cracks

Coordinate scheduling across multiple campaigns and product lines

Assign creators into the correct weekly content batches based on internal capacity

Move creators across weeks when needed to balance workload

Track scheduling status and update internal systems (Airtable + Google Sheets)

Flag creators who are unresponsive or at risk of delaying timelines

Ensure all confirmed creators are properly logged in calendar and tracking sheets

Support rescheduling when timelines shift

What Success Looks Like

Future month schedules are locked early (not back-loaded)

Weekly content volume is balanced and predictable

Minimal last-minute scheduling chaos

Fast and consistent follow-up with creators

Clear visibility into who is scheduled, pending, or at risk



Who You Are:

You are extremely organized, proactive, and comfortable managing a lot of moving pieces at once.

Must-Have Skills

A+ written English (this is critical — you will be communicating externally daily)

Strong experience with external communication 
ing clients, partners, or creators)

Experience with scheduling, calendar management, or coordination roles

Ability to manage high-volume workflows without dropping details

Strong follow-up skills — you are persistent but professional

Comfortable working in Google Sheets and/or Airtable

Highly responsive and reliable

Nice to Have

Experience working with influencers, agencies, or creators

Experience in marketing, partnerships, or campaign coordination

Experience in operations, logistics, or project coordination roles

Familiarity with tracking systems or CRM tools



How You Work:

You take ownership — you don’t wait to be told to follow up

You are detail-oriented and don’t miss small things

You are comfortable managing ambiguity and figuring things out

You communicate clearly and concisely

You stay calm under pressure and can manage shifting timelines

Role Details

Remote (full-time)

Working hours aligned with Eastern hours

You’ll be working closely with our influencer operations team

Important Notes

This is not a creative or strategy role.



 This is an operations and execution role focused on scheduling, coordination, and follow-through.

How to Apply



Please fill out this Google form here:

title: E-commerce Operations Rockstar – Online Gaming Retailer
description:
Want to be part of the future of gaming retail?

Are you highly self-motivated, detail-oriented, and a bit of a tech detective? We are looking for a Product & Operations VA to join our team at our online gaming retail shop. This isn't just "typing data": it’s about managing the pulse of our online stores across WooCommerce, Amazon, Shopee, Lazada, Carousell and TikTok.



The Mission:

We are a growing gaming retail company. Your work will involve everything from hunting down product specs for the latest ASUS gear to managing price health and keeping our social media buzzing.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- The Hunt: Source product data/images from Amazon, Play-Asia, GameFly, and manufacturer sites. No links provided, you find the best info!

- Store Management: Data entry, content verification and data migration between platforms.

- Pricing & Stock Ninja: If a supplier drops a price by $30, you're the one updating our store to stay competitive. If they restock, you're reactivating our listings.

- AI-Powered Socials: Use AI tools to write and schedule engagement-triggering posts.

- Problem Solving: Handling "Listing Errors" (e.g., if TikTok rejects a brand, you find the workaround)

- Operations: Order processing and occasional customer service when needed.



The "Tech-Forward" Catch:

We are obsessed with efficiency. To help us build better tools for you, you will live-stream your screen via a private YouTube link during your shift. This helps us identify bottlenecks and eventually build automation that makes your job easier and more focused on high-level verification rather than manual typing.



What You Need:

- The Beast: A PC with at least 16GB RAM (Non-negotiable).

- The Connection: Fast Fiber + 5G Backup for when the power/internet dips.

- The Brain: Self-motivated, meticulous, and an independent learner. Gaming interest is a HUGE plus.

- The Commitment: 48 hours/week. Monday to Saturday.



Salary: $450 USD / Month (Fixed), no 13th month. Paid bi-weekly via Wise.



How to Apply: I do not check DMs. Please apply strictly via this Google Form:

title: Shopify Developer Needed to Migrate Existing WordPress WooCommerce Store to Shopify
description:
I am looking for an experienced Shopify developer to help migrate my existing WordPress (WooCommerce) webshop to Shopify.



The goal is to recreate my current online store as closely as possible in Shopify, including the design, product structure, and key functionalities.



Scope of work:



Migrate all products, including variants, images, descriptions, prices, SKU and inventory

Migrate customers and order history (if technically possible)

Rebuild the website design so it closely matches the current store

Recreate important functionalities currently handled by WooCommerce plugins using Shopify apps or custom development

Set up payments, shipping settings and general store configuration

Fully test the store and prepare it for launch



Requirements:



Proven experience with Shopify store development and store migrations

Experience migrating stores from WooCommerce to Shopify

Ability to recreate an existing design accurately

Good communication skills and ability to suggest improvements

Deliver a fast, clean and mobile-optimized Shopify store



Please include examples of Shopify stores you have previously built or migrated.

title: AI Assisted Data Entry Operator
description:
The position consists of training an Artificial Vision platform. The contractor will watch video footage captured in constructions of all kinds. This platform can recognize complex, diverse information about it, but some mistakes can only be fixed by humans. It is a quality assurance (QA) job, fixing imagery rather than numbers or data. 



All candidates will go through two video-chat interviews, each taking approximately 30 minutes. The first interview will be conducted with Oliant Recruiting. The second interview might or might not take place depending on the results of the screening conducted by Oliant Recruiting. 

The second interview is conducted by the Client’s Team Lead. It is possible that the client sometimes requests a third interview. Interviews will almost always happen in the morning in Central Time (Chicago), Pacific Time (California), or Australian Time.



A reliable internet connection and a computer are mandatory; accommodation to meet this requirement will be discussed before starting.



Responsibilities



- You will work 40 hours a week, distributed over 5 days of 8 hours. Shifts might change in the future, starting at different times.

- There is no requirement to work weekends or National Holidays; however, we will always ask if some people can work those days, which will be paid higher.

- You must communicate in English; candidates must be able to understand and read/write English. Extreme fluency is not required, but the videos and instructions are recorded and written in English. Team leads speak English as well.

- You must have a computer and a good internet connection to perform daily duties. Those two conditions must be fulfilled before starting the job.

- This is fully remote work. 

- The formal description of the tasks to perform is “Capture track DQA analysis and adjustments, BIM model alignments, progress tracking DQA analysis and labeling, progress tracking segments upload.”

- The responsibilities are not limited to the description mentioned above; other DQA duties can be added in the future (QA support, new tools developed, and so forth)



Onboarding



- There is a training period to learn how to do the job, which normally takes 7-21 days. 

- NDA agreements must be signed before starting. NDA stands for Non-Disclosure Agreement, and it outlines privacy rules and legal implications. 

- Further information can be disclosed in private.



Performance 



- There are diverse metrics that will be disclosed to the employee during the training period. Employees must comply with the metrics at certain times that will be shared once the employee is working.

- The quality of the work is also measured and evaluated periodically. 

- Failure to comply with metrics and quality can result in termination of employment.



Salaries will be adjusted in the future based on performance.



Online applications on our company's website will be considered first. Please apply at the following link:

title: Video Editor

clear communication

attention to detail

ownership of your work

ability to adapt across different brands and content styles

title: Real Estate Site Analyst and Lead Generation
description:
Job Title: Real Estate Site Analyst and Lead Generation



Job Status: Part-Time (20 hours/week) with a clear path to Full-Time (40 hours/week) within 30-60 days based on performance.



Job Description:



We are seeking a high-level Real Estate Site Analyst to assist our US-based investment firm in identifying and qualifying property leads in New York City. This role is a blend of geographic site analysis and targeted lead generation. You will be responsible for scanning specific urban areas to find underutilized land that meets our strict development criteria.



Compensation & Incentives



+ Base Salary: $6 - $8/hr per hour.

+ Project Success Incentives: We offer significant performance bonuses for high-quality leads that transition into meaningful business opportunities (e.g., successful site site-control or lease execution). We believe in rewarding the researchers who find the "needle in the haystack" that drives our company's growth.

+ Growth: This position starts at 20 hours per week. For an analyst who demonstrates exceptional speed and accuracy, we will transition the role to a permanent Full-Time position with a salary increase.



Responsibilities:



Site Identification: Perform manual and data-driven scans of specific neighborhoods using satellite imagery and city maps.



Criteria Filtering: Identify parcels that are Vacant Land or Parking Lots with specific size qualifications



Data Extraction: Use official NYC databases (Zola, MapPLUTO, OASIS) to pull the BBL (Borough-Block-Lot) number for every qualified lead.



Ownership Research: Identify the private entity (LLC or Corporation) that owns the land. Exclude all government or city-owned property.



Skip Tracing: Find accurate contact information (Mobile Phone and
) for the principal decision-makers of the owning entities.



Reporting: Maintain a clean, organized database in Google Sheets or Excel.



Required Skills:



Mapping & GIS: Experience with Google Earth Pro, ArcGIS, QGIS, or similar spatial tools.



Data Research: Proven experience in real estate lead generation or property data analysis.



NYC Knowledge (Preferred): Familiarity with NYC property data tools (Zola, ACRIS, PLUTO) is a major advantage.



Spreadsheet Expert: High proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel (sorting, filtering, and data organization).



Detail Oriented: Ability to follow complex instructions regarding property assembly and ownership verification.



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume and a brief summary of your experience with real estate data. To prove you have high attention to detail, please include the 10-digit BBL number for the Empire State Building in the first line of your application.

title: Guest Communications Manager
description:
Personal Assistant: Will be responsible for any tasks assigned by Gianina and Christopher. This will range from personal tasks to business tasks.

      

Support Agent Role (RELIEVER ONLY): Manage and provide communication with guests/tenants (prospective & confirmed), coordinate maintenance & cleaning for all managed properties, and various administrative work using a variety of somewhere and methods of communication. Any tasks that the Company ask for as it relates to their business, the Support Agent is expected to complete with proper training and explanation from the Company. Support Agent should show initiative and also offer to take on tasks or suggest changes for the business to the Company.

II. Responsibilities

      

SUPPORT AGENT AGREES TO FOLLOW AGENT DUTIES AS SPECIFIED BY the Company Including and not limited to the following:

2.1. Respond to all guest inquiries and internal chats immediately, this includes answering all questions and includes all read and unread messages. This is the company priority and should not be secondary to other tasks. If training or assisting another employee or support agent, these tasks can be incorporated as the training and never ignored.

2.2. Archive all messages once all guest questions are answered and necessary information is provided.

2.3. Responsible for all pre-approval and approval inquiries using all protocols on WIKI/Knowledgebase.

2.4. Review inbox for missed messages (even ones marked as “read” or pre-approved) and expired/not possible/ canceled inquiries (on all platforms). This includes following up with guests that have not answered. 

2.5. Always have browser windows open as per agent duties. All messages have to be answered using the associated PMS platform upon logging in.

2.6. Keeping track of
s from 
 and reply accordingly within the past 6 calendar days. 

2.7. Responsible to contact support from each platform if involvement is required i.e. damaged items in the units caused by the guest. 

2.8 Support Agent will have access to Company Slack and Asana to keep up with tasks assigned. The Support Agent must have Slack and Asana open from start to end of shift.

2.9. Responsible for writing responses to guest reviews and ensuring no guest reviews are missed.

2.10 If reviews are less than 5 stars, the Support Agent will need to submit these to Airbnb for review and request to be removed from the listing.

      

Cleaning & Maintenance

      

2.11. Responsible for tracking unidentified guest in the properties using various apps that the Company will provide to the Support Agent and making sure all cameras are working on a daily basis for applicable properties

2.12. Responsible for coordinating cleaners to all units.

2.13. Responsible for coordinating maintenance and/or repairs to all units.

2.14. Keep track/manage all work orders through Asana. 

2.15. Keep track and monitor cleaning reports/checklists, video and picture evidence

Personal Assistant

2.16 Must acknowledge tasks assigned

2.17 Must communicate when tasks are completed

2.18 Must track time and announce how long each task took to complete

2.19 Responsible for submitting timesheet report with tasks completed every 15th and end of the month

      

III. Compensation

      

3.1. AS NEEDED BASIS: Hourly rate: $4.375 USD per hour.

3.2. After completion of training ( 2 weeks). Monthly Salary will be paid using the Remitly app on the 15th and end of each month.       

3.3. Pay Increase: A full time support agent working for a total of one year from the start date of this contract will undergo a performance review where a pay increase will be discussed and decided.  



Must have following skills



High level of customer service



Airbnb app



Property management apps



Team player



High initiative



Must be reliable



Education background is required



Must be available to work 12 hour shifts

title: Windows Server / Hyper-V Virtualization Specialist – Server Optimization Project
description:
Company:

Injazat Information Technology – Saudi Arabia

We develop ERP, HR, Payroll, and Real Estate SaaS systems and run our infrastructure on Windows Server and Hyper-V.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Windows Server and Hyper-V specialist to review and optimize our virtualization server. The server is already running multiple virtual machines, but we believe the system is not configured for maximum performance and efficiency.



This is initially a project-based job to review, optimize, and document the server environment. If the work is successful, this may turn into long-term part-time support.



Current Environment

Huawei Server

Windows Server 2022 Standard

Hyper-V

256 GB RAM

Dual Intel Xeon processors

Multiple Virtual Machines

SQL Server on some VMs

TSPlus Remote Access

Backup system in place

Scope of Work



The specialist will be responsible for:



Server Review

Review Hyper-V configuration

Review virtual machine CPU allocation

Review virtual machine memory allocation

Review disk and storage configuration

Review virtual network configuration

Review backup strategy

Review checkpoints/snapshots usage

Review Windows Server performance settings

Review SQL Server performance (if applicable)

Review remote access performance (TSPlus / RDP)

Optimization

Optimize VM CPU and memory allocation

Configure Dynamic Memory where appropriate

Optimize disk layout and VM storage

Configure antivirus exclusions for Hyper-V

Improve server and VM performance

Configure proper backup and restore procedures

Set up monitoring and performance tracking

Recommend best practices for Hyper-V environment

Ensure system stability and reliability

Documentation (Very Important)



The specialist must prepare documentation including:



Server architecture

VM allocation plan

Storage layout

Backup procedure

Restore procedure

Disaster recovery plan

Network layout

Performance recommendations

Maintenance checklist

Required Skills

Windows Server 2019 / 2022

Hyper-V

Virtual Machine performance tuning

Storage configuration

Backup systems

Networking

Remote Desktop / TSPlus

SQL Server basics

PowerShell (preferred)

System documentation

How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



Your experience with Windows Server and Hyper-V

Number of servers you have configured or optimized

Example of similar project you worked on

Your hourly rate or project rate

Availability to start



If a Hyper-V server has 256 GB RAM and 5 virtual machines, how would you allocate memory and CPU to the VMs to maximize performance and stability?

title: Research & Outbound Sales Development (Divorce Coaching Niche)
description:

We need a researcher and cold-caller with **excellent English** to drive client partnerships for a men's divorce coaching business. You'll identify high-fit targets and execute outbound campaigns via phone,
, and social media.



What You'll Do

Part 1: Research & Lead Generation

Identify divorce lawyers, mediators, and law firms in Northern California who serve men.

Research relationship/divorce podcasts and influencers with relevant audiences

Find decision-makers and contact info; assess fit for partnership

Document findings and create contact lists

Make cold calls to divorce law firms (pitch: client referrals or group coaching)

Send cold
 and DMs to podcast hosts and influencers (pitch: speaking opportunity)

Track all outreach activity and results



Success Metrics

Lawyer/mediator calls booked (qualified, good-fit prospects only)

Podcast/influencer conversations booked



Required Experience:

Proven experience doing research-based lead generation (bird-dogging)

Proven experience making cold outbound calls that get meetings

Excellent English (both written and verbal)

Comfort with prospecting tools (LinkedIn, phone,
, social DM)

Ability to assess target fit (not spray-and-pray applicants)



Non-Negotiables

20 hours per week

Must be available for calls 9 AM–12 PM PT (this is when you'll make outbound calls)



Start date: Monday, April 7, 2025

Reliable communication and weekly check-ins

Ability to follow a specific outreach framework



Compensation: $4.50/hour



How to Apply

title: LinkedIn Ghostwriter (Employee Advocacy Program)
description:
We’re looking for a LinkedIn ghostwriter to support our employee advocacy program and help bring multiple voices from our team to life:  authentically, consistently, and in a very non-corporate way.

You’ll work closely with our Brand Manager and support 8 profiles across the business, each with a distinct perspective and role:

- CEO

- Head of Ops

- Head of Marketing

- Partnerships Manager

- Digital PR Manager

- Customer Success Manager

- 2× Customer Support Specialists



The goal is simple: build brand awareness, clearly position our expertise and services, and humanise the brand by showing the people and work behind the scenes.



What you’ll be doing

- Ghostwriting LinkedIn posts for senior leadership and key tea
mbers

- Helping shape different perspectives, tones of voice, and points of view (no copy-paste personalities)

- Translating real work, opinions, and experiences into engaging LinkedIn content

- Supporting idea generation and brainstorming with tea
mbers who also write their own posts

- The answer to the secret question is that "Good LinkedIn content sounds human, not corporate."



Content volume

- Top management (CEO and Head of Ops): ~5 posts per person per week (10 posts total)

- Everyone else: ~2 posts per person per week (12 posts total)

- Additional support with brainstorming post ideas for employees creating their own content

Total: ~22 LinkedIn posts per week



What we’re aiming for

- Increased brand awareness on LinkedIn

- Clearer positioning of our expertise and services

- More behind-the-scenes content that builds credibility and trust

- Content that sounds human, opinionated, and real - not corporate or over-polished



Nice-to-haves

- Strong understanding of LinkedIn as a platform (and how people actually engage there: formats, attention, behaviour, not just posting);

- An eye for trends, 
s, and internet-native formats;

- An eye for good design and familiarity with Canva (basic visuals, carousels, simple layouts) - you will work closely with our designer;

- Proven experience ghostwriting for founders, leaders, or subject-matter experts;

- Ability to adapt tone of voice across different roles and personalities;

- Knows how to make B2B content feel relatable, not boring

- Proactive with hooks, angles, and content ideas;

- Familiarity with Trello for content planning and collaboration.



What will make you stand out even more:

- Solid understanding of digital marketing, including link building and customer service;

- Experience creating lead magnets (guides, checklists, simple resources);

- Hands-on experience working on employee advocacy programs: ghostwriting and shaping content for several people within the same company, without making everyone sound the same.



Working style

- Collaborative and async-friendly

- Direct access to our Brand Manager for context, feedback, and direction

- Focus on quality, clarity, and consistency.



Important Information

- Employment Type: Full-time, remote

- Core Working Hours: 8 AM - 4 PM BST/GMT

- Pay: £7 per hour



Hiring Process:

- Submit your application here: 

- Please note: applications submitted through OnlineJobs messaging will not be considered

- Standout applicants will be invited to complete a recorded video interview

- Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a video call with our hiring team



If you enjoy building personal brands, shaping sharp LinkedIn content, and making B2B feel human again, we’d love to hear from you.

title: GoHighLevel Expert – AI Video Automation & Social Media Lead Generation
description:
A fast-growing Dubai-based AI technology company is hiring a highly skilled GoHighLevel (GHL) specialist who knows the platform inside out. This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who has already built complex GHL workflows, understands sub-account architecture deeply, and can own the full automation pipeline from video production through to booked appointments.

You will be working on cutting-edge AI influencer video automation — producing, scheduling, and distributing content across multiple client sub-accounts — and then closing the loop by automating lead capture, engagement, nurturing, and calendar booking from social media responses.



What You'll Be Responsible For

GHL Platform Management



Build and manage complex multi-client sub-account structures

Configure and maintain GHL media libraries across sub-accounts

Set up and troubleshoot social media channel integrations per sub-account

Build, test, and maintain advanced automation workflows, pipelines, and triggers



AI Video Production & Automation



Work with AI video generation tools to produce consistent, high-quality AI influencer videos

Build automated systems that produce videos at scale across different verticals and client niches

Automatically push finished videos into the correct GHL sub-account media libraries

Auto-schedule video posts to the correct social media channels per client sub-account



Social Media Response Automation



Set up automated capture of comments, DMs, and reactions from social media posts

Build GHL workflows that auto-respond to social media engagement

Create lead warming sequences triggered by social media interactions



Lead Generation, Qualification & Booking



Build end-to-end funnels that take a social media lead from first touch to qualified and booked

Configure AI-powered or rule-based lead qualification logic inside GHL

Automate appointment booking directly into GHL calendars

Set up follow-up and no-show sequences





You Must Have



Minimum 2 years hands-on GHL experience — sub-accounts, workflows, pipelines, calendars, media library, social planner

Proven experience building multi-client or agency-level GHL setups

Experience with AI video tools (e.g. HeyGen, Synthesia, RunwayML, Kling, or similar)

Experience building social media automation — not just scheduling, but response capture and auto-reply

Strong understanding of lead nurturing and qualification automation

Ability to work independently, document your work, and manage multiple client setups simultaneously

Reliable internet connection and ability to work within UAE business hours (or overlap)





Nice to Have



Experience with Zapier, Make (Integromat), or n8n for bridging external tools into GHL

Experience with AI chatbot or conversational AI setup inside GHL

Background in real estate, hospitality, or professional services verticals

Video editing or prompt engineering skills for AI video generation





What We Offer



Competitive salary (based on experience — please state your expected monthly rate in USD in your application)

Fully remote, work-from-home position

Long-term stable role with a growing AI company

Opportunity to work on genuinely innovative AI automation at scale

Clear scope with room to grow into a senior systems role





How to Apply

Send your application with the following:



A brief summary of your GHL experience (sub-accounts managed, workflows built)

Examples or screenshots of GHL automations you have built (pipelines, social planner, media library usage)

Any AI video tools you have used and what you produced with them

Your expected monthly rate in USD

Your available start date



Applications without GHL examples will not be considered.
