title: Marketing Director for Streetwear Brand
description:
ABOUT KORELIMITED



KORELIMITED is a culture-driven fashion brand celebrating Korean heritage through elevated design and storytelling. We exist at the intersection of identity, community, and modern streetwear — creating pieces that honor culture while shaping the future of it.



As we continue expanding globally, we are seeking a strategic and culturally fluent marketing director to lead brand growth, storytelling, and community expansion at the highest level.





OVERVIEW

The Marketing Director will lead the overall marketing vision and execution for KORELIMITED. This role requires both strategic leadership and hands-on execution. You will own brand positioning, growth strategy, campaign development, influencer partnerships, community building, and performance marketing.



You should deeply understand culture-driven brands, fashion marketing, and digital ecosystems — especially how storytelling, identity, and community translate into measurable growth.



This role is ideal for someone who understands that KORELIMITED is not just apparel — it’s representation.





RESPONSIBILITIES

Brand Strategy & Positioning

- Identify and evolve KORELIMITED’s brand narrative and voice

- Lead seasonal campaign strategy and product storytelling

- Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints (social,
, web, retail, events)



Growth & Performance Marketing

- Develop and execute paid acquisition strategy (Meta, TikTok, Google, etc.)

- Oversee
, SMS, and retention marketing programs

- Drive customer acquisition, LTV growth, and conversion rate optimization

- Manage marketing budget allocation and performance reporting

- Rigorous A/B testing



Influencer & Community Marketing

- Lead and oversee influencer seeding, partnerships, and ambassador programs

- Build authentic relationships within Korean-American and global Korean communities

- Oversee creator collaborations and campaign activations

- Expand community initiatives and cultural partnerships



Content & Social Strategy

- Guide content strategy across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and emerging platforms

- Oversee campaign creative direction alongside internal and external teams

- Identify culturally relevant trends and moments for brand participation



Team Leadership

- Build and manage internal marketing team

- Collaborate closely with design, e-commerce, and operations teams

- Manage external agencies, freelancers, and partners



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in fashion, streetwear, or culture-driven brands

title: Marketplace Virtual Assistant
description:
About the role

We are a UK-based multi-channel eCommerce business selling across Amazon UK, Amazon EU, eBay UK, OnBuy, B&Q, The Range, Allegro (Poland), Shopify, and Temu. The business is owner-operated and growing fast.



We need a sharp, experienced, self-motivated Marketplace Specialist to take full ownership of our day-to-day operations — inventory, listings, customer communications, compliance, and supplier coordination. This is not a general admin VA role. We need someone who genuinely understands how online marketplaces work and can run things without constant hand-holding.



This is a long-term role with real opportunity to grow as the business grows.



Platforms you'll manage

Amazon UK

Amazon EU (×5)

eBay UK

OnBuy

B&Q Marketplace

The Range

Allegro (Poland)

Shopify

Temu

What you'll do

Customer communications — Monitor and respond to all customer messages across every platform using structured templates. Target: same-day response, zero unanswered messages at end of each working day.

Inventory management — Consolidate inventory data from all 9 platforms into a master Google Sheet. Cross-reference to identify missing or inactive listings. Prepare weekly exception reports.

Contractor supervision — Oversee and quality-check output from external Fiverr workers handling listing creation. Review before anything goes live. Return errors for correction.

Stock & purchase orders — Monitor stock levels in Linnworks. Identify low-stock SKUs proactively. Prepare draft purchase orders and follow up with suppliers on ETAs.

Returns management — Guide customers through returns. Maintain a shared Google Sheet of all return/refund cases for business owner to process.

Listing audits & compliance — Regular audits across all platforms. Fix missing images, closed listings, suppressed ASINs, compliance errors, and attribute gaps. Keep on top of policy changes per marketplace.

Competitor & pricing monitoring — Flag undercutting on key SKUs. Prepare repricing recommendations for business owner review.

Weekly reporting — Every Friday: tasks completed, open issues, stock alerts, listing errors resolved, contractor performance notes.

Business intelligence — Research new product opportunities and suppliers. Present findings in a structured format.

What we need from you

Amazon Seller Central (UK + EU) — this is non-negotiable. You must have hands-on experience.

eBay UK Seller Hub — proficient, not just familiar.

Multi-channel marketplace experience (more platforms = stronger application)

Excellent written English — professional standard, no errors in customer-facing messages

Google Sheets — comfortable with data organisation, filters, basic formulas

Linnworks — basic to intermediate experience is a strong advantage (training available)

Experience supervising freelancers or external contractors

Minimum 2 years of eCommerce operations experience

Self-motivated and proactive — you flag problems before being asked, not after

Available to work full-time, exclusively for us (no other concurrent employer)

At least 2–3 hours of overlap with UK business hours (9am–5pm GMT/BST)

What we offer

$4.00–$5.50/hour based on verified experience (paid weekly or bi-weekly, your preference)

Full-time, 40 hours/week, Monday to Friday

Long-term position — we are not looking for a short-term hire

30-day paid trial period with agreed KPIs, jointly reviewed at the end

Direct working relationship with the business owner — no middle layers, no bureaucracy

Real scope to grow: this role may expand to include team supervision and advertising management within 6–12 months for the right person

title: Meta Ads Account Manager
description:
ABOUT KORELIMITED

KORELIMITED is a culture-driven fashion brand celebrating Korean heritage through elevated design and storytelling. We exist at the intersection of identity, community, and modern streetwear — creating pieces that honor culture while shaping the future of it.



As we scale our global footprint, we are looking for a data-driven Meta Ads Account Manager to own our paid social ecosystem. You will be responsible for turning our brand story into a high-growth engine through
 and Instagram advertising.



OVERVIEW

The Meta Ads Account Manager will lead the strategy, execution, and optimization of all paid social campaigns. This is a high-impact role that sits at the intersection of creative strategy and technical performance.



You aren't just pushing buttons in Ads Manager; you are analyzing customer behavior, scaling winning creative, and ensuring KORELIMITED reaches the right audience at the right time. You understand that in streetwear, a high ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) comes from the perfect marriage of "The Math" and "The Magic."



RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Management & Scaling

Full-Funnel Strategy: Build and manage Meta ad campaigns across the entire customer journey: Prospecting (TOF), Retargeting (MOF/BOF), and Retention/LTV.



Budget Oversight: Manage and scale daily/monthly spend to hit aggressive revenue targets while maintaining efficiency (ROAS/MER).



Technical Setup: Ensure pixel health, Conversions API (CAPI) stability, and accurate catalog management for Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns (ASC).



Creative Strategy & Testing

Creative Directives: Collaborate with the content team to request high-performance assets (UGC, motion graphics, lifestyle photography) based on data-driven insights.



Rigorous A/B Testing: Lead a "test and learn" culture—testing hooks, headlines, formats (Reels vs. Static), and landing pages to constantly lower CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost).



Creative Analysis: Deep-dive into creative metrics (Hook Rate, Hold Rate, CTR) to understand why an ad is winning or losing.



Data & Reporting

Performance Reporting: Provide weekly and monthly reports on key metrics including Spend, Revenue, ROAS, CPA, and New Customer Acquisition.



Audience Insight: Build and refine Lookalike (LAL) audiences and high-intent interest stacks relevant to the streetwear and Asian-American cultural niche.



REQUIREMENTS

3+ years of experience specifically in Meta Ads/Media Buying for an E-commerce/D2C brand (Streetwear/Fashion experience is a major plus).



Proven Track Record: Experience managing 6-figure monthly budgets with a history of scaling brands profitably.



Analytical Mindset: You love spreadsheets as much as you love streetwear. You can look at raw data and turn it into an actionable strategy.



Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Shopify, and attribution tools (e.g., Triple Whale or GA4).



In-Office: This role is based at our HQ to ensure tight collaboration with the design and marketing teams.

title: Operations & Calendar Virtual Assistant (CRM + Systems + Client Coordination)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and reliable Virtual Assistant to support daily operations for a growing photography and creative studio.

This role is focused on:

* managing calendars

* organizing client workflows

* setting up and maintaining systems (CRM)

* ensuring no leads or tasks fall through the cracks

You will work directly with the owner and act as a right-hand support system to keep the business running smoothly.



Main Responsibilities:

1. CRM Setup & Management (Important)

* Set up and manage workflows inside a CRM (HoneyBook or similar)

* Build pipelines:

    * Inquiry ? Booking ? Shoot ? Delivery ? Follow-up

* Create automations:

    * Auto responses

    * Invoice reminders

    * Follow-up messages

* Keep client pipeline organized and updated

* Ensure no missed leads or delayed responses



2. Calendar Management (Very Important)

* Manage multiple calendars:

    * Personal calendar

    * Photography shoot calendar

* Schedule and confirm appointments

* Send reminders to clients

* Reschedule when needed

* Add structure and organization to daily schedule



3. Client Communication (Basic Support)

* Respond to basic inquiries

* Send follow-ups to leads

* Send booking links and invoices

* Notify owner of important clients

(You are not responsible for closing sales, only support and follow-up)



4. Daily Task & Operations Support

* Create and manage daily to-do lists

* Help organize tasks for the team

* Ensure nothing is missed or forgotten



5. Systems & Automation (Important)

* Build and improve workflows

* Set up simple automations

* Help create dashboards for tracking:

    * leads

    * bookings

    * tasks

* Use tools like ChatGPT or AI to improve speed and efficiency



6. Admin & Organization

* Organize Google Drive files and folders

* Keep backend systems clean and structured

* Assist with general admin tasks



Tools You Will Use:

* Google Calendar

* Google Drive

* CRM systems (HoneyBook or similar)

* Google Sheets (for dashboards)

* ChatGPT / AI tools



Work Style:

* Must be available during the day (flexible communication)

* Able to work independently and complete tasks without constant supervision

* Hybrid role (real-time + assigned tasks)



Hours:

* 10-15 hours per week (to start)

* Opportunity to grow long-term



Additional Requirement (Important)

We are looking for someone who understands systems, workflows, and automation.

You should be comfortable:

* Organizing step-by-step processes

* Creating simple workflows (example: inquiry ? booking ? follow-up)

* Using tools to automate repetitive tasks

* Thinking ahead and preventing things from being missed



We Are Looking For Someone Who:

* Is extremely organized

* Communicates clearly and professionally

* Has experience with CRM systems and workflows

* Understands automation and efficiency

* Takes initiative and solves problems

* Is comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT



To Apply:

Please include:

1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with CRM systems (HoneyBook or similar)

3. Your experience with calendar management

4. Any experience with automation or workflows

5. Answer the questions below

6. The word “FLOW” at the top of your application



Application Questions (Required):

1. Workflow Thinking

If a client sends an inquiry for a photo shoot, explain step-by-step how you would handle this from inquiry to booking.



2. Organization Scenario

If there are:

* 3 new leads

* 2 scheduled shoots

* 1 client that has not responded

How would you organize and manage this?



3. Automation Understanding

Give an example of a task you would automate in a business and how you would set it up.

title: AI Implementation & Integration Specialist (Software Engineer)
description:
As part of its digital transformation strategy, the company is investing in artificial intelligence and automation technologies to enhance data analysis, client engagement, and internal operational efficiency.



About the Role



We are seeking an AI Implementation & Integration Specialist (Software Engineer) to design and develop AI-powered applications and automation tools that support business operations.



The successful candidate will be responsible for building scalable AI solutions, integrating machine learning systems into existing platforms, and supporting the development of internal technology tools that improve data analysis, client management, and workflow automation.



Key Responsibilities



· Design and develop AI-enabled software applications and internal automation systems.

· Build and deploy machine learning models and AI applications for business data analysis.

· Develop APIs and backend services to integrate AI tools with existing business platforms.

· Implement conversational AI systems, including chatbots or voice-enabled agents.

· Develop data processing pipelines and integrate structured and unstructured data sources.

· Work with business stakeholders to translate operational requirements into technical solutions.

· Monitor system performance and continuously improve deployed AI applications.

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement scalable software solutions



Required Skills and Experience



· Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering or related field.

· Experience in software development using programming languages such as Python, JavaScript or similar.

· Experience developing APIs or backend systems using frameworks such as FastAPI, Flask, Node.js or similar.

· Familiarity with machine learning or AI frameworks and tools.

· Experience integrating AI solutions into real-world applications or business systems.

· Understanding of database technologies and data processing workflows.

· Strong analytical, troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

· Ability to work collaboratively within a team environment



Desirable Skills



· At least 1 year experience with AI automation tools or conversational AI systems.

· Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure or GCP.

· Knowledge of data pipelines, vector databases or AI model deployment

title: n8n Developer
description:
Role Overview

As an n8n Developer, you will design, build, and maintain automated workflows across a range of platforms and services. You will work closely with internal teams to identify automation opportunities and deliver robust integration solutions using n8n.



Key Responsibilities

• Design and develop automated workflows using n8n to connect internal and third-party systems

• Build, test, and maintain integrations with APIs, databases, webhooks, and cloud services

• Identify manual processes that can be streamlined through workflow automation

• Document workflows, processes, and integration architecture for internal use

• Troubleshoot and resolve workflow failures, errors, and performance bottlenecks

• Collaborate with product, engineering, and operations teams to gather requirements

• Monitor live workflows and ensure high availability and reliability

• Stay current with n8n updates, new nodes, and best practices



Requirements

• Proven hands-on experience building workflows in n8n (self-hosted or cloud)

• Strong understanding of REST APIs, webhooks, JSON, and HTTP methods

• Experience integrating tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, HubSpot, Airtable, Notion, or similar SaaS platforms

• Ability to write basic scripts (JavaScript / Python) for custom n8n function nodes

• Familiarity with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB) and SQL queries

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Excellent communication skills in English — written and verbal

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously



Nice to Have

• Experience with other automation platforms (Make, Zapier, or similar)

• Background in DevOps or self-hosting n8n on cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or DigitalOcean)

• Familiarity with Docker and container-based deployments

• Experience working in a remote or distributed team environment
